name: Chairman Jim MacEachern - NHGOP
subject: Last Chance: Amos Tuck Event with Senator Ernst!
body:
The event is tomorrow night. It's the last chance to get tickets to the Amos Tuck Event.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=5b6778c06c&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | Good Evening,
The NHGOP Amos Tuck Event is tomorrow and it’s your last chance to get tickets! We have a great night planned with special guest Iowa Senator Joni Ernst and Governor Kelly Ayotte.
---
[|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=39ad7fec58&e=f3aa6419cd)

The event is tomorrow night in Manchester - Senator Ernst, Governor Ayotte and the rest of the NHGOP team hope to see you at the reception!
---

Donald Trump has spent every day of his presidency trying to undermine the American people.
* While Americans struggle to survive, Trump has sent the economy into a spiral and downplayed his promises to make groceries more affordable.
* He’s blatantly ignoring the Courts, ending DEI programs and forcing out hundreds of thousands of federal workers.
* And now he’s demanding Republicans pass a budget that cuts taxes for billionaires while stripping away affordable health care.

We all knew Trump planned to put himself over people — but the level of disregard for our democracy and working Americans has reached a new level.

That’s why we are asking our supporters to go on the record about what they think of Trump’s second presidency so far.
[**_Please submit your grade for Donald Trump before midnight:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109062404/549888724/-16569837?refcode=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.06.05_Grade-Trump_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWYyZDM0OS02YTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZJkEB4JptthVgfunChkvmrWRUWbIAOuL_MeBZ92Vnb0=&emci=a2fff73a-4742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=aaf2d349-6a42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7659029)

clean_body: | It has been 5 months of Donald Trump’s second presidency. | | | | | | | Donald Trump has spent every day of his presidency trying to undermine the American people. While Americans struggle to survive, Trump has sent the economy into a spiral and downplayed his promises to make groceries more affordable. He’s blatantly ignoring the Courts, ending DEI programs and forcing out hundreds of thousands of federal workers. And now he’s demanding Republicans pass a budget that cuts taxes for billionaires while stripping away affordable health care. We all knew Trump planned to put himself over people — but the level of disregard for our democracy and working Americans has reached a new level. That’s why we are asking our supporters to go on the record about what they think of Trump’s second presidency so far. | | | | | | Thank you, Team Gillibrand =

name: Team Marlene
subject: Schweikert is all in on Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109062703/549894668/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.06.05_Schweikert-All-In-On-Trump_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U5Mjg1MGYtNmM0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=viapS2UCAQEU1lD5jf7I694RYo6Ml54Td1-qSX0xEek=)

It’s clear that Schweikert is all in on Trump and his extremist agenda. **While he literally slept through the vote, he made it clear he supported the bill that would gut billions in funding for life-saving programs like Medicaid and SNAP.** This would rip away healthcare coverage and access to food assistance from hundreds of thousands of Arizonans. _Not only would seniors, children, and people with disabilities suffer, but under this same bill, the federal deficit would balloon to $2.4 trillion — a clear showing of the self-proclaimed “deficit hawk’s” cowardice and hypocrisy._ And there’s more. name: Schiff HQ
subject: Trump and Musk in a fight on social media
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8657%2E5257348%2ERTjx6K ]Adam Schiff for Senate

In case you missed it, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are duking it out. On
social media.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8657%2E5257348%2ERTjx6K ]Tweet from Elon: Time to drop the really big bomb - Trump is in the
Epstein files. That is the real reason they have not been made public.
Post from Trump: Elon was 'wearing thin,' I asked him to leave, I took
away his EV mandate that forced everyone to buy electric cars that nobody
else wanted...

This is how we look reading this content 👇😂🍿

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8657%2E5257348%2ERTjx6K ]Throwback pic of Adam and his brother laughing

Yes, that’s a photo of Adam and his brother cheesing for the camera.

But in all seriousness, that the President of the United States and the
wealthiest man in the world are duking it out on social media instead of
working to lower costs, improve access to affordable health care, and
protect our planet is unproductive, at best.

Adam is calling for accountability from Trump and Musk, fighting for our
families, and defending our democracy. He’s not waging wars on social
media or spreading salacious rumors all over the internet.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8657%2E5257348%2ERTjx6K ]Pitch in to help Adam keep Trump and Musk’s feet to the fire and
deliver for hard-working Americans.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

subject: Trump vs. Elon
body:
Are you seeing this?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109062816/549899632/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlYmQxNTUtNmQ0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ex0OxBqx3Oi6w2rri9Q3q9W_-sdItOUIXXzoV8xNSjo=) | Team - Are you seeing this insanity on Twitter right now? That’s right, in the least shocking end ever, Trump and Elon’s partnership has met (at least for now) a timely demise. Like the mature adults they are, they have taken to threatening each other online. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109062817/549899633/1119658952?&refcode=E13596-20250605-TrumpvsElon-Image-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlYmQxNTUtNmQ0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ex0OxBqx3Oi6w2rri9Q3q9W_-sdItOUIXXzoV8xNSjo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109062818/549899634/1119658952?&refcode=E13596-20250605-TrumpvsElon-Image-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlYmQxNTUtNmQ0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ex0OxBqx3Oi6w2rri9Q3q9W_-sdItOUIXXzoV8xNSjo=)** These are two of the most powerful men in our country behaving like teenagers. And the rest of the world is laughing at us. **We deserve better. We need leaders who our kids can look up to, not ones who turn our government into a circus. It’s embarrassing.** That’s why taking back the House is so important. My swing district is one of the most competitive in the country; winning this seat is critical to getting our government back to work for the American people. [_**If you’re sick and tired of the chaos, will you chip in today to help restore sanity and responsibility to Washington?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109062819/549899635/1119658952?&refcode=E13596-20250605-TrumpvsElon-SL-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRlYmQxNTUtNmQ0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ex0OxBqx3Oi6w2rri9Q3q9W_-sdItOUIXXzoV8xNSjo=) \- Josh

clean_body: Lets hit them while they are down. We can use this new rivalry to kill the GOP budget bill and defeat MAGA in the 2026 midterms but we need to act fast. | | Friend, The spectacular and public breakup between President Trump and Elon Musk that began yesterday, stemming from Musk's opposition to the spending in the GOP budget bill, has escalated even further. Trump is now tweeting about revoking all of Elon's government contracts. In response Elon is sharing footage of President Trump with Jeffrey Epstein and is working to tank the budget bill. | The GOP was banking on Elon's billions to win the 2026 midterms. Now that critical funding source is cut off. No Dem Left Behind is capitalizing on this moment. We can take advantage of this vulnerability to kill the GOP budget bill and defeat MAGA in the 2026 midterms but we need to act fast. Thank you in advance for helping us seize this critical opportunity. Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Add your name: Ban members of Congress from playing the stock market
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
American politics is so divided these days — but there is one thing that unites almost all of us...
#

American politics is so divided these days — but there is one thing that unites almost all of us, and that is banning members of Congress from trading stocks.
Almost 90% of Americans — Republicans, Independents, and Democrats — overwhelmingly agree that members of Congress should not be playing the stock market while we hold office.
That's why Senator Ossoff introduced legislation to ban the practice shortly after he was elected.
Last month, he reintroduced it again.
Members of Congress are making decisions everyday that impact the stock market, that impact businesses and industries. And they receive confidential information on big events that are coming.
They should not be using their power and influence to personally profit through stock trades.
**[Please add your name to our petition to say you stand with Jon Ossoff and support banning members of Congress from playing the stock market while in office.**](https://act.electjon.com/signup/ossoff-em-stock-trading-june25/?source=em250605-full&akid=416%2E5691347%2EsBNUxY)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.electjon.com/signup/ossoff-em-stock-trading-june25/?source=em250605-full&akid=416%2E5691347%2EsBNUxY)**
The public is weary of hearing about members of Congress trading stocks that they regulate. This is ethics reform that is long overdue.
Thanks for your support on this.
Jon Ossoff for Senate
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.electjon.com/signup/ossoff-em-stock-trading-june25/?source=em250605-full&akid=416%2E5691347%2EsBNUxY)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=416%2E5691347%2EsBNUxY) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Not backing down / Nosotros no estamos retrocediendo
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/PNG%202023%20TOP%20Newsletter%20Header.png]
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Condemning clear-cut racial gerrymandering in Tarrant County
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Fort%20Worth%20redistricting%20Tarrant%20County%20BlackTOP.jpg]
What happened this week in Tarrant County was nothing short of a racist power grab. With a 3-2 vote, the Commissioners Court approved a redistricting map that strips Black and Latino communities in Precinct 2 of their voice and their power.
This mid-decade redraw, with no new census data and no public mandate, is a calculated act of racial gerrymandering. It tears apart neighborhoods that have consistently come together to elect candidates who reflect their values.
Let’s be clear: this isn’t just partisan politics, it’s systemic racism doing what it always has. But we see it, we name it, and we'll fight back.
Tarrant County Judge Tim O’Hare has openly admitted [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/tarrant-county-judge-defends-redistricting-process-its-100-about-partisan-politics/] in the past that this redistricting is about securing Republican control, stating, “The mission is to get three Republican commissioners” on the court. This confession lays bare the true intent: to dilute the voting power of communities of color for partisan gain. This isn’t just unethical; it’s illegal. The Voting Rights Act and the 14th Amendment were created to stop exactly this kind of racial discrimination. We won’t sit back while our communities are carved up and silenced. Coming as no surprise, Tarrant County is now being sued by its residents for this despicable act. [https://www.keranews.org/government/2025-06-04/tarrant-county-redistricting-lawsuit-filed]
For more information on our efforts to fight back against this blatant GOP power grab, contact David Villalobos at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Vote this Saturday, San Antonio
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/San%20Antonio%20TOP%20PAC%20canvass%202025.jpg]
ELECTION DAY is this Saturday, June 7, in San Antonio's municipal runoffs. For the first time since 2017, city voters will elect a new mayor who will shape policy in the seventh-largest city in the United States.
TOP-endorsed mayoral candidate Gina Ortiz Jones [https://ginaortizjones.com/] will listen to our communities, lead with purpose, and fight to make San Antonio more affordable for ALL of us.
Polls will be open from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. Election Day. Find a list of voting centers here. [https://www.bexar.org/DocumentCenter/View/9423/Election-Day-Sites]
Let's finish this runoff election strong.Tell your San Antonio family and friends to GO VOTE!
LGBTQIA+ rights are human rights.
Happy Pride!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Small%20-%202025%20TOP%20Pride%20graphic.JPG]
TOP reaffirms its solidarity with our LGBTQIA+ community, especially our Black and Latino brothers and sisters, with Pride Month starting this week.
It’s a time of reflection, celebration, and growth, as we honor all who've courageously protested, fought injustice, and built bridges to win the societal progress we've made — while reminding ourselves of the vital work we face now to defend this progress and move us closer to collective liberation.
Check out TOP’s Pride Vibes playlist on Spotify. [https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1feXpOEhiWruZ5MushkBNh?si=2afc6fc51ce24d61]
TOP Tip: Take better phone pics on your summer vacation
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Better%20phone%20pics%20photos.jpg]
Whether you're traveling abroad, across the state, or just within your community, utilize these easy tips [https://www.blurb.com/blog/take-better-photos-with-your-phone/] on how to get the most out of your smartphone photos this summer to capture those special moments, and have fun in the process!
Español
Condenando a la clara manipulación racial de los distritos electorales en el condado de Tarrant
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Fort%20Worth%20redistricting%20Tarrant%20County%20BlackTOP.jpg]
Lo que ocurrió ayer en el Condado de Tarrant fue nada menos que una toma de poder. Con una votación de 3 a 2, la Corte de Comisionados aprobó un nuevo mapa de redistribución de distritos que le quita voz y poder a las comunidades morenas y latinas del Precinto 2.
Este cambio a mitad de década, sin nuevos datos del censo ni mandato público, es un acto calculado de manipulación racial del mapa electoral (gerrymandering). Rompe comunidades que constantemente han trabajado juntas para elegir candidatos que representen sus valores.
Seamos claros: esto no es solo política partidista, es el racismo sistémico haciendo lo que siempre ha hecho. Pero lo vemos, lo nombramos y vamos a luchar contra ello.
El juez del condado de Tarrant, Tim O’Hare, ha admitido [https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/tarrant-county-judge-defends-redistricting-process-its-100-about-partisan-politics/] abiertamente en el pasado que esta redistribución de distritos tiene como objetivo asegurar el control republicano, declarando: “La misión es tener tres comisionados republicanos” en la corte. Esta confesión revela claramente la intención: diluir el poder del voto de las comunidades de color para obtener una ventaja partidista. Esto no solo es inmoral; es ilegal. La Ley de Derecho al Voto (Voting Rights Act) y la Enmienda 14 fueron creadas precisamente para detener este tipo de discriminación racial.
No nos quedaremos de brazos cruzados mientras nuestras comunidades son divididas y silenciadas. Como era de esperarse, ahora el Condado de Tarrant está siendo demandado por sus propios residentes por este acto despreciable. [https://www.keranews.org/government/2025-06-04/tarrant-county-redistricting-lawsuit-filed]
Para más información sobre nuestros esfuerzos para combatir esta flagrante apropiación de poder por parte del Partido Republicano, contacte con David Villalobos en dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Vota este sábado, San Antonio
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/San%20Antonio%20TOP%20PAC%20canvass%202025.jpg]
El DÍA DE LAS ELECCIONES es este sábado 7 de junio son las elecciones municipales de segunda vuelta en San Antonio. Por primera vez desde 2017, las y los votantes de la ciudad elegirán a una nueva persona como alcaldesa/alcalde, quien definirá las políticas públicas en la séptima ciudad más grande de Estados Unidos.
La candidata a alcaldesa respaldada por TOP, Gina Ortiz Jones [https://ginaortizjones.com/] , escuchará a nuestras comunidades, liderará con propósito y luchará por hacer de San Antonio una ciudad más accesible para TODAS y TODOS.
Las urnas estarán abiertas de 7:00 a. m. a 7:00 p. m. el día de las elecciones. Encuentre la lista de centros de votación aquí. [https://www.bexar.org/DocumentCenter/View/9423/Election-Day-Sites]
¡Terminemos con fuerza esta elección de segunda vuelta! ¡Dile a tus familiares y amigos de San Antonio que vayan a votar!
Los derechos LGBTQIA+ son derechos humanos.
¡ Feliz Mes del Orgullo!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Small%20-%202025%20TOP%20Pride%20graphic.JPG]
TOP reafirma su solidaridad con nuestra comunidad LGBTQIA+, especialmente con nuestros hermanos y hermanas morenos y latinos, con el inicio del Mes del Orgullo esta semana.
Es un momento de reflexión, celebración y crecimiento, en el que honramos a todas las personas que valientemente han protestado, luchado contra la injusticia y tendido puentes para lograr los avances sociales que hemos conquistado — al mismo tiempo que nos recordamos la importancia del trabajo que aún tenemos por delante para defender estos logros y acercarnos a la liberación colectiva.
Escucha la lista de reproducción Pride Vibes de TOP en Spotify. [https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1feXpOEhiWruZ5MushkBNh]
Consejos de TOP: Toma mejores fotografías con tu teléfono en tus vacaciones de verano
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Better%20phone%20pics%20photos.jpg]
Ya sea que viaje al exterior, a través del estado o simplemente dentro de su comunidad, utilice estos sencillos consejos [https://www.blurb.com/blog/take-better-photos-with-your-phone/] sobre cómo aprovechar al máximo las fotos de su teléfono inteligente este verano para capturar esos momentos especiales y divertirse en el proceso.
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=Z9jOVSDBrYpnqMVE21UeZsA6CR4EUxRpoekmqfHEcgyF729Gf1ir8J6JDT1AseEd%2FlmlRpI4%2B5tzFlc96WBaFF9eTJ45PuunWb22iaaU6JP49d524NGngw0ML1oQWxlImXZNBYK%2FS5sq0VUn0PtGZyPU4QyHBWpuwcblEaHnQl%2Bxbb6AIgCjaLsbC99%2B2L7FdHk2Gn%2BP4hDeXT2JUbFVHEIT8Q63pBYTXOeCor%2BbBM5AEDkVv20n8103ctaG%2FZ3pk4gZ4h3ISsQTkNC2vnDdJAw48RiXIgrgT2gc38aRglhUOJKakPEOkQkwKQnOh7SaW7I6MOq7yLd8VwFbObbDwUQtLMgkakwNcnP%2F9Nlz0E7mLCBat5gSdx8M3lK2XBSk2clIurK7sAD2im3Du5xgEieJlaoWrZ0jzeyANnSqG6Q%3D .

| | Hi Friend, Last week, we asked folks across our seven cities –Oakland, Berkeley, Emeryville, Alameda, San Leandro, Piedmont, Albany– and beyond to share what issues matter most to them — **and the responses have been heartfelt, thoughtful, and rooted in real lived experience.** We heard from caregivers, students, transit riders, educators, and neighbors who took a few minutes out of their day to tell us what they’re facing and what they want to see change. **Here are just a few of the top issues that came up again and again:**
* Voting Rights and Democracy 🗳️
* Climate Action 🌎
* Healthcare 🩺

These aren’t talking points — they’re the everyday realities that folks in our communities are living. And they’re going to help shape how Lateefah continues to show up in Congress: with _urgency, clarity, and a deep commitment to the people who sent her there_. Thanks for being part of this movement. We’re building something real — and it starts with listening. — Team Lateefah HQ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**CHIP IN $5 NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109063407/549924556/-1048634449?express_lane=true&&refcode=E13585-20250605-IssuesSurveyFollowUp-EG-Survey&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIzNTUwNGUtNzY0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E4ssR23Y0h-Vh5P3pF0kCekkqn5ZADNkm_mixSOhxE8=)

clean_body: Last week, we asked folks across our seven cities and beyond to share what issues matter most to them — and the responses have been heartfelt, thoughtful, and rooted in real lived experience. | = = | | Hi Friend, Last week, we asked folks across our seven cities –Oakland, Berkeley, Emeryville, Alameda, San Leandro, Piedmont, Albany– and beyond to share what issues matter most to them — and the responses have been heartfelt, thoughtful, and rooted in real lived experience. We heard from caregivers, students, transit riders, educators, and neighbors who took a few minutes out of their day to tell us what they’re facing and what they want to see change. Here are just a few of the top issues that came up again and again: Voting Rights and Democracy 🗳️ Climate Action 🌎 Healthcare 🩺 These aren’t talking points — they’re the everyday realities that folks in our communities are living. And they’re going to help shape how Lateefah continues to show up in Congress: with urgency, clarity, and a deep commitment to the people who sent her there. Thanks for being part of this movement. Peter, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. **Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. **

I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, _"_Obama, of course_!"_
Then my husband introduced me to a book, _Please Stop Helping Us._ This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be __meant__ to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. **But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only _hold folks back_ from rising to the middle class. **

In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?"

I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." _It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. _

As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life.

I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it.

**It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. **

[**Now, Winsome Earle-Sears is running to be Governor, and I’m so proud to support her and be there for her again. I’m doing her a favor today and emailing you asking you to support her campaign and make history:**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/7Q2L7axIiF5eVweV-mc4bRRySdOWH93nBQdx4SF7oN88Z22Ky2Bm6R7Z3bluXMAz-kfMoGBfX6jXBJS5tcgfzhNLgf8P58bRXdwUqi5dgrLY5Yk8XqeTGwZERxmSalJyCu0AKicnM2RtFLr4rdWZQ16kr45mxsh7TzGGjGikAqYCl1a-WCCtKELHyh4IEsJtCgGjSNdHJGRdjpDT374Z1-ZepHWG53aZOigIUCygrgEyD8Vy6yzAjfiEVTSQo3xRzXi80Mqj8dJ8OWsLciz0PCDTs_MN6U6bdD_EdtrNvwiSJ6lzHQlhcBWfFi5mPnFEcT7PK9ztK0fPY2CjSWw91PoaiDPQqNL79Tb-TKVrhIWvRNxTnjZsfpOLUwh43XG8itfq2j3vPi-n5UAhGtX2x8GDekHw_bIvE4uR6P5fdh8SaN7GxTK10lZWVL5emxulhnwt5sL8QMqozyIE2C1KWNPbel5fx_0MWEPSwx99TXgGLTk4s2FpQ21PMwc-QM11WOQuG0QBHF7cLgxK4zzIL7tf1pWA4xl9b7Se266mDikl1rD5B4kGdbPQEVyp6qKoQx9MFS28q3Ni0lXohRziDUb7n-Ji7jkz-HwUmiIRZolSYqq8LOr2m2rKi1ioJNOWukdTyJTZYVsSlB8rhwl-fcn7FlM-n0JsfhRrnhCyWO2SI7PrcIG-00-IaNoI9o2D5X69HjS3eKDNI-T-sfg6TBqpGWGT7uWk66OU8uHj3wkobYerEF2_MsX5BpQIjbBUI-f_w9nk-V3-we_w66BVZ791b1sts25yvPzGcLTfnwY59cvB38dmMuLBlIV66FQGe2YBpJjq2zPboiV5cRgGQcq8lMtkcer04K_BhNJDedBxwn_aybVCBbBjZOUGjpGkULXLwyvvEbJ8Ri6JFCjJEvlehsmog5S9x0VnK2JivGrDCcWmJKiZ-ayBsDbbm7_zYQ/k55n3R2AnAhlPG8oVn4OJBFvr14yD7Sd/9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, "Obama, of course!" Then my husband introduced me to a book, Please Stop Helping Us. This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be meant to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only hold folks back from rising to the middle class. In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?" I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life. I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it. It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on. Thanks for your time, Tywana Hampton | | | | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | |

[****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxkz8GO2yAQgOGnwTdbeDDgHHzYNkpVNe2hVQ_tZUVgnJD1GC82cfP2FVaUy15_PhjG0DT4_t4x_YkBXLybGQATLwzg_c9KMV3p25fyKrgo39UPkvkUPj_oDZ54tCaE77-Of4-_j_NL476-_fu53uonX-4TPvFjaIVk_JCr3heuE73jTYFdrZtdrRstZHHpWt5rK4GDyQVt22tjW5RgjACJtvAdcJBcccVrCVxW7U5wxbVqT7t6h65hDd_mVIYwemvqeVlNjCFQZQMVQ3dZlmnePnZgcJjRpoiVGdGFJQsGh_CG2COh8-YcQ5pyonN5TSOWLvobllNd0qncMBOHtNDrHFK0yMT-g2SgMsjPJdrAo1hDk_HnkYk9nRgoQyGNCxN7kA-xYMw3gKsGXtdYF7Fz0-qHwc9Ks4aft0XzWrcO_gcAAP__kuOTMA) Patriot,

I’m James O’Keefe, and I founded OMG (O’Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won’t: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach—how they’re building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it “chilling,” and X users said it’s “the kind of journalism we’ve been starving for.” That’s OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I’ve been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden’s diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won’t stop. I don’t have a personal life—just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Colorado won’t save itself
body:
This is the line in the sand
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | Peter,

Every day, the Left gets bolder.
They’re flooding Colorado with out-of-state money, weaponizing the media, and pushing radical policies that strip away our freedoms. All while pretending they speak for _us_. Well, I’ve got news for them: They don’t.
I launched the **[]()[Rocky Mountain Voice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** to give the people of Colorado a megaphone — to speak truth, to fight back, and to hold the Left accountable.
But we’re up against a well-funded machine. And if we’re going to win this battle for our state, I need you with me.
🔥 If you believe Colorado is worth fighting for — **[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** 🔥 If you’re done being silenced by the woke mob — **[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** 🔥 If you want real change — **[DONATE NOW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
This is a movement. It’s growing. And it’s working but only because of supporters like you, Peter.
Now’s the time to double down. June is critical. The Left won’t take the summer off and neither will we.
Let’s stand together, speak louder, and fight harder.

---
[Chip in to defend Colorado >>](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
In liberty,
| | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee: Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable. Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z53havfn043fck0cjhsrnr86uvkh1hher0o5ckro_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze4s8qnn5g6i37brj1ufus7f43rqoia4o9irueno_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7kqi17pm2em34tsss8vj204bd7p6kkkmts54mng_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvr732cscq5e6e8ddqubpv4r3elo6f2jt5ocs220_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbt77i2e672nb1np93soo40ofuug8016l1os54c0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5889kjt8lmrg3knsq4vi0breq60l4980e2pf4tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfnnemfoatkds9v07kmv7rijdmhosj5h7b6dqmm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpeu9osjk7j0mdmkf4bdjp52587uu6lurks4ffp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z52p3nsikkh3sndamlpr0actl8utrcin5gerbuio_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)
---

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Meet the Man the Elites Fear
body:
I’ve seen what they’re capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I’m still standing because this matters—because you deserve to know how they’re gaming you.

| [****](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9infhsdj3me09st3q82q6c9f57vhrdnfb8nthf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)
[****](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvcrhbmarob67m7kl5ldd31hht5e5v7n15ru0b7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zii2j4g1b5c7tu2h31p1378205jkkeru43b93rgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqd8dn8tv57o18d1ms8llrv7m29uirk1gvv1669o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)**[**to keep going. Will you join us?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3j0lemtniv61e0ca3ik1vp6c8dlf2sd3efn8pa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)

**People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

Supporters say we're "rewriting the rules of journalism," while critics whine we're "too aggressive." Good. **The truth isn 't polite**.

But fighting the system takes resources--cameras, lawyers, guts--and we're running low. [**Your support keeps us in the game, digging into the shadows the elites want hidden.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm8001o28fbqhvdi73sbbr601r2kt3orbhcb3hh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)

I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

OMG's got more exposes ready to drop, [**but**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z533chm8oe86vke0sfvuu9q4g04icoeujlo5u0g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)**[**$64,600 by June**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkr26bm14vk824brtn7dhdfmqftruhfjk6kq30ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)**[**is our lifeline. Without it, we fade, and they win.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1lgepkkc427ecfgtd7gvun18n9ura69e5eoa0rg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs)

If you're sick of the lies, the cover-ups, the smug insiders laughing at us, then this is your fight too. [**Your donation today --$20, $100, whatever you can--fuels work the mainstream's too scared to touch**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv9n247259mbm6idal46alcouu6sttvi3a2padro_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62o36clh2bs).

I'm not here to play nice; I'm here to win. Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're unstoppable.**

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc1rq48ips6bk2f3j333n6m6cspasnuv7pmabdu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za27gso0kpt5s8srh5pf6eudvc7lgcvag2jt06do_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztt0vsqqt0omkip8ntc9d7u90h9gaj9maj5ifp78_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8ieauigg6ljm4o70rcvi6fcprhba13gp1klnat0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm0k1krek592l2iv3ag1337u2399m6h74tvqjsa8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6efkpgoqfkg3adl7vhc8nvedvd0ggm71i5821vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfm2kfgiqd39kpqbuj07d2cj70pil6tj7erhbr1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjneajqe1k0snulof05scsvh3ch6lkfbiv7b2a60_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g62p76cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: AMAC Action
subject: STOP SOROS!
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zogdi9rrcoi2cr4ll1pakq7h1bdpa6v3p257e128_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55dtokkg3vcvh5k5vuvs7cpb9u7tk7ad3gtuan8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9meeeqmp4b34k8t9ha9ufl6e3riqb4uj7vonu38_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zti2vte91doh28tmmk058vrn7p7lh18ddnp3sqeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3gnju19gg44dp5vgc1lgg02hd8qfsnv0fp4k3s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5fnmt4bpi4egd906lbva9sh3jaigb492228qnlg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zurtkp6ano4i3bmeb0b8baurl1927kbeg7erd34o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8f1qt0m0br89lt6kchdh4n0l6fss7m9nn2tej4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9g6eor6c5h2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.

Congressman John McGuire

| Dear Friends,
Correction: You're invited to join me and the Winsome for Governor Campaign Team for our Summer Kickoff in Danville, Virginia! After the event, we'll be heading out to knock doors and connect with voters. This is a great opportunity to energize the community and support the entire Virginia Republican ticket.
For details/ RSVP, please email:
michael@winsomeforgovernor.com

| McGuire's Political Director
---
FYI: My Political Director is Ramona Christian. She served on President Trump's platform team and is a dedicated, hardworking professional whom I trust completely. Ramona was instrumental in my 2024 victory and also played a key role in President Trump's return to the White House. For campaign-related inquiries, event requests, or other questions, please contact Ramona directly at ramona@mcguireva.com.

Thank you for your support! Please bring a friend. We would love to see you there!

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump-Musk Feud, Amazon Robots, and a Hungry Elephant
body:
The alliance between President Trump and Elon Musk [fractured publicly on Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAUBOCngS7WyQmGuKC4jbvcdkvEzyFhF0yESSzv06-8r7DdSCN90szHzdxsymm5_7eFdI_VLLStmXqnZnp7lWd5rV-RXsEW-12XVl3tq0HA8QTyBNIEm_JuBA86EiFdOOmzEhOCQCX5QwspBE0qeotTjFGF0RGStzFYh1JeedKHBhLkGUBcxkGhxwDonHASQEgmgELqtQ2fNS39QTHv9U1t8LXwrB-9P1d2-cdwZjhv2zY454-O4XyMYTjb1pPPdEQ_7vfp2rI6q8qbDs8t5ZxWqZiAe7Ep_6r9T1e8Nf4EAAD__2eZcy0) following disputes over Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill.”

# Friday, June 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1944, the Allied forces launched [Operation Overlord](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUgOGnwS7O4UhQC4rb2OW2WzIox8guSAZO4rhPv5N9ha3_ma_4P2725kIM-_2_S2R4zXano0ZipmK5PNMjPevXSk_vkvvOe8lz5moR8HoBfQFtvQvxtKrxZiVC6hoyslcjgsJeN5sZr9D1iOPQq8EN2i1ajrSAH-UsRznIJpi3Bhq0BFDdte1xQQ84z2rWAEoLBeQD59J-5rDzRms884tKu-TURLMxP6ro_gmcBE7HcbRbqJzL-e4CJ1c4LJGqwMlfvDubYvzjCDGGqnuh4J5ciL8W_2nAy-BPAAAA___N827U), the largest amphibious invasion in history, landing 156,000 soldiers on the beaches of Normandy, France. Historians consider D-Day the beginning of the end of World War II. Yesterday, we asked you to share your favorite songs, and hundreds of you responded with your all-time favorites. We couldn’t pick just a few to highlight, so we made a playlist of the 30 most-named tracks. [Listen to the playlist here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkE1uszAURVcDs6DHw5hk4MH3U9SqSRWpatqOkA3PiVODkW1C6OqrtEvo6A6udI50XnfNThprhuOT7ElE7ZqB5mApRvJN9FM_9lP40DR1spefbvBOuRgaBCxXwFfAm04auzQs7YQmQipSEnnFNggMK56eBGNFrlHzsuIMVa7yEkEirTdVt0ZodWrEjQYceA7AijKrsMUOUCmmOADjCQPqTHQ-OzszxBNpu7gL-ax1fWrFKcYxJMWfBOsE63mes8VNcVJ0-xOsRysXa0JMivpn_u-3d4fw_hYf9_bf7r5ha7u9Prfna3X4uxxL5V8eUi-6cTbWmsCrhMGxl8Z---KvIl0EfgUAAP__R_h7WA). It’s like the entire _Flyover_ community is throwing a party together. Thank you so much. We loved putting this together. We're sponsored today by an office favorite, [LMNT](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykjz1u6zAQBk8jdjaWK4oyCxavUefXpiQo7cpmzB-Domw4pw-cHCH1980A83F2Zx9iyJf_PrFta3GZn1vk1ri6Vvd0T_t2W3knn_xXybXMpW0OAYcD6ANoRz7El1OC7MqM3Au2clQGQeGoxdXScjJSYS-NkQNpGowiArnSMpzQLL0I9m0DDVoCqH44jrggAc6zmjWA0p0CptBKPX6WkNuV1_gqD67HpSQR7bW1e9f_63DqcKIa8i2m3N5jh9P0exXV0v0ZYgybHjsFl-RD_OHbn6IfFr8DAAD__zasa0M). Be sure to check out their new summer flavors, which will keep you hydrated and refreshed all summer long.
|

## Trump–Musk Alliance Implodes
The alliance between President Trump and Elon Musk [fractured publicly on Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAUBOCngS7WyQmGuKC4jbvcdkvEzyFhF0yESSzv06-8r7DdSCN90szHzdxsymm5_7eFdI_VLLStmXqnZnp7lWd5rV-RXsEW-12XVl3tq0HA8QTyBNIEm_JuBA86EiFdOOmzEhOCQCX5QwspBE0qeotTjFGF0RGStzFYh1JeedKHBhLkGUBcxkGhxwDonHASQEgmgELqtQ2fNS39QTHv9U1t8LXwrB-9P1d2-cdwZjhv2zY454-O4XyMYTjb1pPPdEQ_7vfp2rI6q8qbDs8t5ZxWqZiAe7Ep_6r9T1e8Nf4EAAD__2eZcy0) following disputes over Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill.” Musk criticized the bill for excessive spending and the removal of electric vehicle incentives, despite having supported it during his time in the administration. The feud escalated on X when Musk alleged that [Trump was named in unreleased Jeffrey Epstein files](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8GdxONCYGXgmIbd2_bLS0wQ0wWgwU4kffrV-QXXnM1o5GO5tw_3_O3CTGkx2-zkW4-z4neNVJrVOZWjm3fjvrX0-HMZv7lVLLNrc4c-Q1QAsrZmRDPWQxOeyJO14H0qMSdo-BKDqvGu5O0WOuVUfJrtIsYSSAqRfY-3szXEHSnoUQ5Iorr7aL4wh1ya4WViEIygeRCy-XyzCG1lXw884vKZcnbEPXa2l7Z9RfjE-NTOvdcWz8xPnUw4xPKHn06KnQ_xqeuBYuJsUI-GnxUoVPhSd4XOoH22igk8CFShbYSFDKxR82p7yes5kWQcgNLlGAzjmA_bAwL49NQtNvfIcZQpWICH5sJ8fNy-1HPL83_BwAA__-2gJNR). In response, Trump threatened to terminate federal contracts with Musk’s companies, including SpaceX, which holds major agreements with NASA and the Pentagon. Shortly after, Musk announced SpaceX would begin [decommissioning its Dragon spacecraft](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSmzAQhJ8GOnnOJyHsQkUaOqdNyQjpACUCMdLJjvP0Gfw_wt_uN_Pt7P56jA8bYtiXn3Yjw3Mad3qVSMyUR851O7Za_sxUvd3sv7TnNCUuIwJ2ArQAPXob4ntUrTczEZJsyVx7dUdQ2Ot2NV7idL9pC1r2nZvcHXtQ7qodzL1F5dtgThto0FcAJbtLjw494DSpSQMo3SggHzjly-8Udl5pju_0pHxxaWujWZmP0sgfDQ4NDrzSGmI8WYPDVEvYqZQGh07KTsubOPeIclhHf8UrxCiWnOruvyKX7cyiFvKCkyhrZY4kbOGcdlu5CGfzkk4WPtI2G3-cllB03yhYNhs-3S1_68ynwf8BAAD__3mtiws), used by NASA to ferry astronauts and cargo to the International Space Station.
## White House Issues Travel Ban on 19 Nations
President Trump signed a proclamation on Tuesday, enacting a [travel ban affecting 19 countries](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9ugzAYxJ8GNiPHGJMMHrqwpWtHZPBn8jX-g-wPaPr0FXmFbifd6XS_-7qPd4Me4_JpAmhyaYxwFA9EkEfKW1jDVp4ONmuC-U0xpylRGQUXHeOKcTVag_41ytpqByCgrUFfenkTXIpe1Q9te95KBZ3rpFXXm7reWiGnq-XuMptJyRr12cYVVxfOZds1vZiF5WKa5KQ4l6qSHCxSys13wkgPcP6VdsjNnELt9YNoLVX7UYmhEsNxHI1LPyfF6VdiWJNHwrlUYpjzW7EAnmw6InsTMgxrKhgXliHCAZaFrXgMbDKR7WiYxbJshc4EZbODZylbyMw4gswIck6ZGSIzP-us7Xqg91hUX0m-BIP-PZT-9e6uxV8AAAD__5Dyk-Y), citing national security and terrorism concerns. The ban fully [restricts entry for foreign nationals from 12 countries](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdI7MYMxN4eI2dNl2S2SHMXjXP8geEmWffgXKG2wzxTeaT3PO5226GR98Wj5MRE0uTwmfNSARlonKHre412-H-2yi-cmpZJupTiCg50JxoabZ-PCaZDNrhwjYNajbQV5BSBhUs2psZwkwdFK5Hp2zYrha1w-m742xrvvXeH3YhBKqFUJ2_WWAO8wCrJVWCSEVkwJnT7lcvrJPtKILr_zAcrnn2AS9Em2Vdf8ZjAzG9NpypWPFYDzEDEahjiEZjHvlRz4G45mNV7-kyreS78FEQz4nbk0pPi3c5YJ-STyd2ITKXcmR04oVeQtv_qaYCM8rWpHvh78pet6ePgRf1cCkWKLx4fyY_lTzQ8NvAAAA__-XGJOD)—including Afghanistan, Iran, Libya, and Somalia—and imposes partial restrictions on nationals from seven others, such as Venezuela and Cuba. The policy is set to take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on June 9 and includes limited exceptions for diplomats, NATO affiliates, athletes, and certain family cases. Reactions from foreign governments and organizations include reciprocal restrictions and concerns over the policy’s potential social and economic impacts.
## Amazon Testing Robots for Delivery Runs
Amazon is preparing to [deploy humanoid robots](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OozAUBeCnMZ3R5cbYpHCxDV223RIZfAFv_IOMAWWefpTJI0x_dI6-8-8xPIzzLi5_TSBd5jREunZPpVAeSj7CFo79OdNhTTBfKeY0prIPCNhykBzkYI3zr0FUVs9ESLeKdKPEHUGgktWqWzINgp1lM0EjTadAyXFSE7TYdZ28V06_20CCbADEra0VTmgBx1GMEkBIJoCsKynX_5OLZaXZv9JJuZ5SqLxeS9l2dvvDsGfYX9dVl5VOygu9Awz7t4hhLzvAtmPYfyS8ZOOiiwvfzPQ0C3FL3p2UX3w9gonJWf7RVlnb7XLeu10qJmAJxvmf8fKrx06N3wEAAP__33OAwg) designed to hop out of Rivian electric vans and bring packages directly to doorsteps. The company has built an indoor “humanoid park” at its San Francisco office, complete with a Rivian van and obstacle course, to simulate real-world conditions. [Watch a robot in action here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVvQxRyGDB4qVak6pEOXjsjmjuDW4NQcQenTV_QVun6f9Bv-H5fu4kIM8_XNTWxlSN3M2xJZhHMneZ1u07p8DbySm9xPmnPySZZOg64PYA5gOnIhPjosyA7MmquC7bHBkwbUjSlGawZqoXYtovf9qT61DYE30Lee6xqJimB3DQyYIwBWddnoXhNo79EbADQKgSlIyuVnCrOMPMRHunMu-zQV0Y4it0VVT0qflT5v21Y-0iqr5_3fFyf9qKrzXVXP3-0r-UTvL0cssqXbFmIMi2kUwnVyIf6R8q8Od6t_AwAA__9843F8). Amazon plans to trial several robot types, including one from China-based Unitree, while developing custom software. [Real-world delivery trials](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGyozAMxvHTmM6MIozZFC62ocu2WzLCFkEbgxljyGRP_yYvR3iNyt_o__29DTeSKOv9Dy3sypSGlZ975FI4DyUfy7Yc-2PiI9BC_9Oa05jKPiBgq8FqsEMgia_BVMFNzMhNxe7SmSuCwc5WszNkm86PV2jZhM63vwJPRN5fYWwMea7EvTWwYC8ApmnrDj0GwHE0owUwVhngICXl-l-Stcw8xVc6Odc-LVV0cynbrprfCnuFPUf2JfOj9klh_5YV9mDfxyjsPxW68F70fCy0Jgn6E6U38g-6sw4c5eT80llOoVV_SPH6pHVX2FfZhe0pMcpuO2XgvpDE72fKjxY8HX4FAAD__7S5hnw) are reportedly under consideration. Experts say last-mile delivery is the logical next step, but real-world conditions—pets, kids, weird driveways—still pose big challenges.
* * *

clean_body: The alliance between President Trump and Elon Musk following disputes over Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill.” | | | | | | Friday, June 6, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1944, the Allied forces launched , the largest amphibious invasion in history, landing 156,000 soldiers on the beaches of Normandy, France. Historians consider D-Day the beginning of the end of World War II. Yesterday, we asked you to share your favorite songs, and hundreds of you responded with your all-time favorites. We couldn’t pick just a few to highlight, so we made a playlist of the 30 most-named tracks. . It’s like the entire Flyover community is throwing a party together. Thank you so much. We loved putting this together. We're sponsored today by an office favorite, . Be sure to check out their new summer flavors, which will keep you hydrated and refreshed all summer long. | Trump–Musk Alliance Implodes The alliance between President Trump and Elon Musk following disputes over Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill.” Musk criticized the bill for excessive spending and the removal of electric vehicle incentives, despite having supported it during his time in the administration. The feud escalated on X when Musk alleged that . In response, Trump threatened to terminate federal contracts with Musk’s companies, including SpaceX, which holds major agreements with NASA and the Pentagon. Shortly after, Musk announced SpaceX would begin , used by NASA to ferry astronauts and cargo to the International Space Station. White House Issues Travel Ban on 19 Nations President Trump signed a proclamation on Tuesday, enacting a , citing national security and terrorism concerns. The ban fully —including Afghanistan, Iran, Libya, and Somalia—and imposes partial restrictions on nationals from seven others, such as Venezuela and Cuba. The policy is set to take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on June 9 and includes limited exceptions for diplomats, NATO affiliates, athletes, and certain family cases. Reactions from foreign governments and organizations include reciprocal restrictions and concerns over the policy’s potential social and economic impacts. Amazon Testing Robots for Delivery Runs Amazon is preparing to designed to hop out of Rivian electric vans and bring packages directly to doorsteps. The company has built an indoor “humanoid park” at its San Francisco office, complete with a Rivian van and obstacle course, to simulate real-world conditions. . Amazon plans to trial several robot types, including one from China-based Unitree, while developing custom software. are reportedly under consideration. Experts say last-mile delivery is the logical next step, but real-world conditions—pets, kids, weird driveways—still pose big challenges. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c38c5de-e4f6-4bbd-805a-f6db2593c98b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

subject: Human Gets Brain Chip, Law Overturned, and Surviving Zombies
body:
Paradromics, an Austin-based neurotechnology startup, announced Monday that its brain-computer interface (BCI) chip had been successfully implanted in a patient undergoing epilepsy surgery last month at the University of Michigan, marking its first in-human procedure.

# Friday, June 6, 2025
