**Good Morning!** On this day in 1936, the [Central Centennial Exposition](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAUhE8DHej5B3spXKSh27Qp0QM_gyVjkHHWy-0j9gqpvmq-Gc3Pc3yiDz4u37iRyW-3j5HKGShnSuP6u2FcKJ9TQh_n1R8By_6iNHLgXQOqATVa9OEaZW3NBLZnNRmmZc9Ba-jq1TAU0nVKzWLisyLFpunhtBKKaaE7p2tvbhkoUIwBk9D2PcqHBemEQ2CzriSQ9XlPbV4p0xtPF657RTvvWx3MmvNxVuKr4kPFh1JKm88V9xh8pHZPS8WHT6qxeDXTdaPiA8WcbgrV1cnYo_gQ_KnutmVDHz7y_L9LXob_BQAA__9pXHVh) opened in Dallas's Fair Park, marking 100 years of Texas independence. The $25 million exposition occupied 50 buildings and was the first world's fair held in the Southwest. The Fort Worth Zoo recently welcomed a porcupette (baby porcupine). ## Texas Woman Dies from Amoeba Infection
A 71-year-old Texas woman died after [contracting a brain-eating amoeba](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3SozAMQE9jOhghzF_hYht32XZLRmAZPGtwBjsh3P4b5wpfo0qj957-PaYHOe-O9S_trNLHhungK3pOic9pe-10rJzifJI7ls09PV3hzeeEgG0JXQndZMj5e5KFUTOYsS5Y1b0cEfoe2mJT_SC5HerW4sKdHc08oBls27Rkh8XMWDiVj0EHXV1DLaEaR5KDAWkbS1AvvZDAxqVwVmnjxB-K1t_ZolrCXni1pfSMovkjUAvU13VVr0gpGLrzgkAdUzhvgTqXCdQbk0-bQJ25AjV0eUiB-ptZMiV3rCXtgWcq_zvvY_nFllfY6RCoBwkNNqME6AXq4lTmeTnvXeyy7LqT81-39LuPvhX-BAAA___s74il) from tap water used in a nasal irrigation device at an RV campground, according to a report from the CDC. The report did not provide the woman’s name, the date of death, or the campground’s location. The woman reportedly used a nasal irrigation device with non-boiled water several times before developing symptoms, including fever, headache, altered mental status, and seizures. She passed away [eight days later](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAQhp9GO8yIgGtBcY3dXnulmYVRSBAMcsvu21_cV7h6km--7_-5L3f0wcftG3fS5bWmJVI9A5VCeXG_O8aNyvnI6KNx_ghY05PywoFLBoqBWiz68F5Ea_UD7NS3pPtRTBzGEWTrtLoBwQDDKgXaVeIqUZKwKMkoI7lpvb5goED1PfQCumlCcbMg1mFF6M3YCCDrS8pdcVToheca3pdFZ9LeBu1KOc5m-Gr43PC51toZl1O8rg2fr5yGz5iLN4EaPn8IrKYdI_t0McLi48ZwT_RAlp-Mw6BgnKA73NFmbY_qQ_CnulS2HX34fC7_2-up-V8AAAD___ZOgB8). Laboratory testing of the patient’s cerebrospinal fluid confirmed the presence of the amoeba, _Naegleria fowleri_ , which lives in warm freshwater. Investigators did not detect the amoeba during field testing, but they identified the municipal water system and the RV’s potable water tank as [possible sources of the contamination](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL_GdEHrxTGhcPEaurz2lmiDF7Bk48h2cPL3V-QXbj2jM6Pzc5_u5Lzb1_8U2JT3Eqeda_ZcCqdpewXaVy75kcjt8-aenmo8OE0IeL2AvoCeLDn_mVRjzQPsIBs2slcDQt_DtdkMWztLlKCZOzXcNFhUdMUbc2e7hahx5oSBBi0lSAXtMJC6WVBLtxDIuRcK2LoSU1s2LvymvPjP-aKdY2i82Up5ZtH9EzgKHGut7Wzndo2HwDGEmgSOR_SvwFng2Kuzk75Rr-RAqt1KaJKxz-q8d1mfe2sg57_48jcph8HfAAAA__86knVL). While the U.S. sees fewer than 10 infections each year, nearly every case is fatal. To reduce the risk of infection, health officials recommend using [distilled or boiled water](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGyrCAMQL9GO5yALEpB8Rq7fe0tnQhBmUFxlF13__4O_sLtUmTOycnPc3xiiGGb_-NKJn98Gje6zkg50zEurxW3mfI5HRg2u4Q94pXedIwCxIOBYqBGhyF-R1k7M4HTvCbDO6kFdB086sVY1WrsJ61lC6pX3UQWJBe9cFZ7b1UdTIGBAsU5cAmN1ih7B9K3HoHbrpJALuR0NHmhTB88ffyWKxqb1jqaJef9rNp_lRgqMVzX1fj0kSWjLFRiKGMlhjuCEeawzQzXRBMyR5gXdkOZxXWfj_TaXH0Yt18hxnCqop9XDPG25b_96G3EbwAAAP__G7B9DA) for nasal irrigation.
## New Gun Laws
Texas lawmakers passed several gun-related bills during this year’s legislative session, easing restrictions on short-barrel firearms and clamping down on local efforts to restrict gun ownership. [Senate Bill 1596](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb9GM6wGUcaA4CWTzUs3tFpplNpWp4CVmb_fcn5h8-57z7lfj_GBgcO-_MeNbH75Y9ypJKacKY7rz4b7QjlNEcM-r-HJWI6T4qhAdQJ6Af3oMPB71LWzE7hB1mSl0YMCY6CrV6vaeei1aU3XeWk00aBgHkznNHolUdfBXmHQQy8lSA3NMKC-OdC-9QhyNpUGciEfsckrZXph8vy-KJr52Gq2a87PVLX_KnWv1L2U0lwKhej7OqjU_fMj0J24z5TEFJhFpO04SaT1iFlMGCOx8CESxi0JpgVZXAr97VZH654lMIfUXyzLhoE_1flvg51W_QYAAP__HbyAzw) removes the prohibition on owning a short-barrel or “sawed-off” firearm without registering it with the federal government. A short-barreled firearm is defined as a rifle with a barrel less than 16 inches or a shotgun with a barrel shorter than 18 inches. [House Bill 3053](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L0OpCAUBeCn0Y4JIP4VFNvYzbZbmitclCyCges4vv3Gzb7BticnJ1_Or_f8Bh98XH_Cjpq-Ls0RrxKQCPO8nTvEFaksGXw0mz8CXOmDeZZctox3jHezBR_uWdVWL9yOokYtejVK3ve8rTdt3NKpwTULyMGIphfOGtu4FgauxrbB2utnjHe8E4ILxV_jCGqwXLnGARemrxRH6ynlF21I-IXiwv0oXibtddAb0VGq5kclp0pOD18ViBApRZ-ezr-0klNIBkIlp4IRKGVmIITC1jOy5bwXML8Lu6AQujMwk85ofNghMosOoy3syGnNsBdWwCHdbMGIzlOps7bH5UPwpXu46w4-_NXR_3360fJPAAAA__-P4pBb) prohibits cities and counties from sponsoring gun-buyback programs. Supporters of the measure have called such programs a waste of taxpayer money, while San Antonio City Councilman John Courage said, “ _It makes no sense_.” [Senate Bill 1362](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAMhp_GdMoIQSAUFNfQ7bVXMsIW4FljM6CEzdvfOK-wjSpJ__f9_77GL_bBx-Uvb9Lrz5zGKNcZRFWOcX1uHBfRczrYR7v6PfCVXnKMhHQHbACb0bEP77EuXD-h68pC-rKtO8K2xXux9i1W0uHdOYdT7agmeljiirtykq7qpPB9foYNNmWJZY23ruP64bCeq5mxtK2pUZzXdNx0FZUfPufwzhQ3m7Yi9Kvqfprqj6HB0HBd180Gb79pTc9TU8xbhoasZWj43BsacqahAfOgh6GBo3o4xMEceAG2CrqywpWewUHwm1e4VomwPOMJliNMAsrfEmE-0ga7pD0IsHtxtHKCj_CJgkwhhobi6N1--RD82WSlZWMfPgb6u95fPf0PAAD__xLymJ8) blocks the enforcement of extreme risk protection orders or "red flag laws." It prevents the seizure of a person’s firearms if he or she has not been charged with a crime or is not subject to a domestic protective order.
## Austin Startup Implants Chip in Human Brain
Paradromics, an Austin-based neurotechnology startup, announced Monday that its brain-computer interface (BCI) chip had been successfully implanted in a patient undergoing epilepsy surgery last month at the University of Michigan, marking its [first in-human procedure](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ywyAQhJ9G6vDcARKioEjjzmlTas7iZDEDkgLEP3n6jPwKabfYb7_9uowXCjGst09K7Opz3saVHyVyrZzH5SfReuNarpnCOi1hj_TY7pxHCbIT0AvoR08hvkbdencFb7Flh0ZbCcZA1y4OvWQ01nYalbpqhQRKTz3qwRpPtmuDO8qghx4RUMPJWtKDBz2rmQAn02hgH-qWT3Xhyk8qc3wdK07Tltrollr30qiPRp4bef7-PeJGnnfK5POWwlTEtKU9cuUi3kri7SNC2iOtVeDQoRmUUl2bnd8fIcZQ-oN7SxTiG1P_d87dyb8AAAD__3PEeDw). The company’s Connexus Brain-Computer Interface was implanted for about 20 minutes before being removed from the patient’s brain. The dime-sized chip aims to restore communication for people with impaired motor skills by using AI to [translate brain signals into speech](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2unDAQxfGngQ40Nr5mKVykobtpU6LBHpbR9QeyzbL79hF5hfRHRz_9_3wv38ie4_M3BjL1vaUl0lU81Up52c-A8Um1rBk52p0Pj1d6UV4kyK8OdAd6ccj-s6jWmRXcJFoyYlSThHGEr3Y3OKB4KG21nFBbkqsEC-BIPJy1SkHL5j4DDVoIEAr6aUL1cKC2YUMQdmwUkOOacl93qvTGsvnPrehtCq03e61HaYZfjZwbOV_X1YdPwYixpsjpHjVyXs_CkUpp5Iy5svXUyDnSmdFz_OnIp9iFs_x0HA6PsXYHZnQ5BbalkzBo0OPYH_vRZuOOi73nom_aMyD7f5L6f_1eRv4NAAD__5pshuQ) through a computer. “ _You do all of these steps, you validate the hardware... but still emotionally when it works and when it happens the way you expected it to, it’s still very, very gratifying_ ,” [said Paradromics founder and CEO Matt Angle](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdKCxYwwULrahy7ZbosEewmhtg4wTkr9_Ir_wmmlGOvfc--8-3ZEDp8dfjGTLe9mmROcRqBTK0_qMmB5UjjkjJ7fyHvDcXpQnBaqtwdRgJo8cPpOuvJ3BD7IiKzs9KOg6aKvVejOgHhYwXa_bGfteqs7RQrPTbU8IFdsLBgaMlCA1NMOAuvegl9uCIF0nNJDnsuWmrFTojccSPpdF47ZYBbuWsh_i9keoUajxPM_GpdldT6HGiy3UCOY6Sqgx0TNj4PS_3jGjz1tkd9TfpjXHPWAqzVpiqLL1-8kh8GEuhUdEDt_E8rudXlb9BAAA__8Xy3yA). Once it receives regulatory approval, the company plans to start clinical trials later this year. Founded in 2015, Paradromics has raised over $105 million in venture capital and received $18 million in grants from NIH and DARPA. It employs over 60 people in Austin.

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Texas Woman Dies from Amoeba Infection A 71-year-old Texas woman died after from tap water used in a nasal irrigation device at an RV campground, according to a report from the CDC. The report did not provide the woman’s name, the date of death, or the campground’s location. The woman reportedly used a nasal irrigation device with non-boiled water several times before developing symptoms, including fever, headache, altered mental status, and seizures. She passed away . Laboratory testing of the patient’s cerebrospinal fluid confirmed the presence of the amoeba, Naegleria fowleri , which lives in warm freshwater. Investigators did not detect the amoeba during field testing, but they identified the municipal water system and the RV’s potable water tank as . While the U.S. sees fewer than 10 infections each year, nearly every case is fatal. To reduce the risk of infection, health officials recommend using for nasal irrigation. New Gun Laws Texas lawmakers passed several gun-related bills during this year’s legislative session, easing restrictions on short-barrel firearms and clamping down on local efforts to restrict gun ownership. removes the prohibition on owning a short-barrel or “sawed-off” firearm without registering it with the federal government. A short-barreled firearm is defined as a rifle with a barrel less than 16 inches or a shotgun with a barrel shorter than 18 inches. prohibits cities and counties from sponsoring gun-buyback programs. Supporters of the measure have called such programs a waste of taxpayer money, while San Antonio City Councilman John Courage said, “ It makes no sense.” blocks the enforcement of extreme risk protection orders or "red flag laws." It prevents the seizure of a person’s firearms if he or she has not been charged with a crime or is not subject to a domestic protective order. Austin Startup Implants Chip in Human Brain Paradromics, an Austin-based neurotechnology startup, announced Monday that its brain-computer interface (BCI) chip had been successfully implanted in a patient undergoing epilepsy surgery last month at the University of Michigan, marking its . The company’s Connexus Brain-Computer Interface was implanted for about 20 minutes before being removed from the patient’s brain. The dime-sized chip aims to restore communication for people with impaired motor skills by using AI to through a computer. “ You do all of these steps, you validate the hardware... but still emotionally when it works and when it happens the way you expected it to, it’s still very, very gratifying ,” . Once it receives regulatory approval, the company plans to start clinical trials later this year. Founded in 2015, Paradromics has raised over $105 million in venture capital and received $18 million in grants from NIH and DARPA. subject: Trump and Musk Trade Barbs in Escalating Feud Over ‘Big Beautiful Bill’
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Trump and Musk Trade Barbs in Escalating Feud Over ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=a2e0446e03&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Steve Robinson on Jun 05, 2025 07:08 pm
President Donald Trump and Elon Musk, once allies, clashed publicly Thursday in a bitter dispute over the “One Big Beautiful Bill Act,” a sweeping Republican legislative package central to Trump’s second-term agenda. The escalating war of words, fueled by social-media broadsides, threatens to derail the bill, fracture Republican unity, and unsettle financial markets. The social [...]

President Donald Trump (R) invoked federal law to block foreign students from entering the country to study at Harvard University in an executive order signed Wednesday, citing national security concerns and alleging a lack of cooperation with America’s oldest post-secondary institution. Consequently, student and exchange visitor visas hosted by Harvard University have been immediately suspended [...]

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It’s something I NEVER wanted to have to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/2a4a78617fca2892/?utm_campaign=20250522&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Fellow patriot,

All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew
me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.

I helped take down the mob in New York...

I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after
tragedy struck on September 11th...

I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe...

And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the
Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.

Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like
YOU.

But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to
headlines like these:

_“GIULIANI LOSING HIS HOME AMIDST 2 INDICTMENTS...”_
_[MSNBC]_

_“GIULIANI BANKRUPTCY CASE DISMISSED, OPENING DOOR TO CREDITORS
PURSUING COLLECTION”_
_[CNBC]_

_“GIULIANI DISBARRED FROM THE PRACTICE OF LAW IN NEW YORK” _
_[New York Times] _

AND SADLY, AS I STARE DOWN THE DEMOCRATS’ FINAL SHAM INDICTMENT
AGAINST ME, I AM NOW THE ONE FORCED TO ASK _YOU_ TO HELP _ME_.

That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, friend...

_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. _

But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.

RIGHT NOW IN ARIZONA, THE DEMOCRAT ATTORNEY GENERAL IS SEEKING TO USE
A _STATE-LEVEL_ CHARGE THAT PRESIDENT TRUMP CANNOT PARDON IN ORDER TO
THROW ME IN PRISON UNTIL I’M 100 YEARS OLD!

My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my
dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.

_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal,
professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath
in a prison cell! _

Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we
fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this
scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded
patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their
political enemies.

And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,
_EVER_ SURRENDER to it.

_...Just ask President Trump! _

The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under BOOKING # 2313757.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/2a4a78617fca2892/?utm_campaign=20250522&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]
__

_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans
like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an
INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise
$231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my
freedom and justice. _

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND TO HELP
ME WIN THE FINAL BATTLE FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AGAINST THE DEEP
STATE AS THEY ATTEMPT TO JAIL ME FOR THE REST OF MY LIFE IN ARIZONA.
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/2a4a78617fca2892/?utm_campaign=20250522&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

__

CONTRIBUTE $50

CONTRIBUTE $100

name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8nno9lkre1orc17flqbai4igoqelr2qkei0m5jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9h66pb4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbvqdnpmjvj0aahf7tb2m4p538ue8tpajruf7fu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9h66pb4c3h2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsk8gsqrakbn1o8fm883fbo8hc33nv1r1mkm91l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9h66pb4c3h2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuo8cutmol8fhk41jouamapejbpja1gjvkqo5a18_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9h66pb4c3h2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2npco5sd06lipt729qfomddr629m179n3ti8no0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9h66pb4c3h2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp3l1id51t9iomj20ipbr9q7o1viqlhmqafk4740_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9h66pb4c3h2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi4j6nb5t8v0l76ak5lrf9gjcahj2kfgo3qlm9so_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9h66pb4c3h2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**

body:

But I’ve never gone with the safe option. I only follow the right option.

---
Friend,
---
My law licenses have been taken away and I can no longer defend myself in court. I may even face a 20-YEAR prison sentence in a case so severe that President Trump cannot even save me with a pardon.
---
_So, the “safe” thing to do right now would be to keep quiet and not say anything that would anger the powers-that-be._
---
_But that’s not who I am._
---
**Throughout my life, I’ve never gone with the “safe” option. I do what’s _RIGHT_.**
---
_And so, I’m speaking out and I’ve prepared a memo for you on something deeply troubling._

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: D-Day 1944: Courage That Changed History
body:
Join us in remembering the heroes and hearing Suzanne’s incredible journey.
| | | |
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abaa3cf9/1edb9794aba9ac11)
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Today marks the anniversary of the largest seaborne invasion in history. On June 6, 1944--D-Day--Allied forces from America, Britain, and Canada carried out an overnight airborne assault just after midnight, then stormed five Normandy beaches (Utah, Omaha, Gold, Juno, and Sword) at dawn. These combined operations began the effort to liberate France and Western Europe, as well as the eventual Allied victory on the Western Front. We honor the tens of thousands of young men who risked everything--storming mine-sown beaches, scaling cliffs under enemy fire, and charging into deadly chaos--all to stand firm against tyranny. Their courage, sacrifice, and resolve paved the road to victory and remind us what it truly means to defend liberty. To this day, the people of Normandy tend their graves with reverence, and we join them in grateful remembrance of those heroes who fought so bravely for our future. While D-Day raged, a baby girl was born at a hospital in Hungary. As her mother held her, the doctor stepped in and said, "The Americans have landed in France," before revealing that she'd given birth to a healthy daughter. That baby girl, Suzanne Guggenheim, survived tyranny and later arrived legally in the United States--becoming a patriotic citizen and tireless activist. I've known Suzanne for years, and in 2023 I had the honor of interviewing her on my podcast. She shared her incredible journey of survival, resistance, and liberation--and reminded us why preserving America's freedom is worth the sacrifice. **Today, I invite you to listen to both parts of Suzanne 's story--reflecting on the bravery of D-Day and recommitting ourselves to defend liberty.****
****LISTEN NOW********** **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | | | [ PART 1 ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abaa3cf9/1edb9794aba9ac13)
---
| | [ PART 2 ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abaa3cf9/1edb9794aba9ac15)
---
| **** In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: If there really are Trump-Epstein files, release them NOW. Tell Musk to say what he knows
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [If there really are Trump-Epstein files, release them NOW. Tell Musk to say what he knows](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta02efc6c-b115-4693-8400-556026ccdb6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ba05b16-2ed8-4ef5-b149-6d05d83bbe79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Elon Musk dropped a bombshell when he [posted that Trump was in the Epstein files](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61ddc0ff-04f0-4ded-b380-beb351e82801/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (convicted pedophile Jeffrey Epstein), and that's why those files hadn't been released. Was Trump in the files, in any kind of incriminating way? Musk had nearly unlimited access to federal records the last few months, so it's certainly possible he might have had access to files nearly no one else did. Or maybe he wasn't being serious, and just making a very, very cringe-worthy, unfunny joke. But the comment has spread like wildfire, and **people clearly need to know whether there's a cover-up for something truly awful - or whether this is just nonsense, and there's nothing to be covered up in the first place.** Musk can help answer this. He needs to say what he meant, what he knows, and how he knows it. If necessary, under oath and by means of a subpoena. [**Sign on: Tell Musk to say what he knows, and if there really are Trump-Epstein files, release them NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a665111-47c9-4710-8df4-f77a30bd1644/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
It’s Time to Cut the Waste
| | | | | [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ldo5eedpkAr7zfmEV-Ay6AriZ1zdbsGcFg5grb5TNVaKr3Se9xRi1IcG5hzpeJkCatGv-aHeYmAWe1ky3eFSYwjdcGozfrSfTAPmxpcAccOZFA6Hz_X515lCcCRb93W9nBnmXHdrenJqqS471tr3I0i7YEZWRRIk&c=SdEb4S7z_Smt5rXUF_DUIGBTL7ooFtrAbWfZ60Xbde_4tionYa0NLA==&ch=MW5CI2Vu3C0Y0PjjHkkRqyhuqNLmACYbu2264CS31GxtA_FLZ-PYJg==)
---
| Peter,
---
Washington is broken because no one's been held accountable. For decades, bloated agencies, reckless spending, and out-of-touch bureaucrats have wasted your hard-earned tax dollars while ignoring the people they're supposed to serve.
That's about to change.
---
|
---
President Trump is launching the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), and I'm proud to back it 100%. This bold new department will slash wasteful programs, streamline bloated federal agencies, and make sure every dollar works for the American people.
Nevada is Battle Born and Nevada Strong, and we deserve a government that respects our values. DOGE means less waste, smaller government, and more accountability. It's exactly what this country needs.
I'm ready to fight for this plan, but I can't do it without you. The same Washington insiders who've gotten rich off your tax dollars will do anything to stop it.
👉 Join me now and let's put common sense back in Washington.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ldo5eedpkAr7zfmEV-Ay6AriZ1zdbsGcFg5grb5TNVaKr3Se9xRi1C7iwSTwcH4pKbeOTfAz2QQ4WwN9ZAs58eQtp89v14aNeGQY51S3hB8UNr7lL0DB9XRZim6pAl7eWRdOt4TLN3PHcbIgJWPbcQDqNszi8iqM-K9lljLmCf3HbjKS79t5t2zSzJxo6UP9kRX8V5ihaSk=&c=SdEb4S7z_Smt5rXUF_DUIGBTL7ooFtrAbWfZ60Xbde_4tionYa0NLA==&ch=MW5CI2Vu3C0Y0PjjHkkRqyhuqNLmACYbu2264CS31GxtA_FLZ-PYJg==)

clean_body: It’s Time to Cut the Waste | | | | | == | Peter, Washington is broken because no one's been held accountable. For decades, bloated agencies, reckless spending, and out-of-touch bureaucrats have wasted your hard-earned tax dollars while ignoring the people they're supposed to serve. That's about to change. | President Trump is launching the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), and I'm proud to back it 100%. This bold new department will slash wasteful programs, streamline bloated federal agencies, and make sure every dollar works for the American people. Nevada is Battle Born and Nevada Strong, and we deserve a government that respects our values. DOGE means less waste, smaller government, and more accountability. It's exactly what this country needs. I'm ready to fight for this plan, but I can't do it without you. The same Washington insiders who've gotten rich off your tax dollars will do anything to stop it. 👉 Join me now and let's put common sense back in Washington. | == For Nevada, for freedom, and for America, Jim Marchant Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress - NV01 == | == == == | | Paid for by Marchant for Nevada | | | | Marchant for Nevada | 848 N Rainbow BLVD #464 | Las Vegas, NV 89107 US | | | | | | |

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Barack Obama wants to meet you. Yes you.
body:
It's Kamala.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=639%2E2563979%2ESXaaEA)

Good morning, Peter.
It's Kamala.
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/496?c0=.aG3D0-&refcode=em250606-1A&t=2&akid=639%2E2563979%2ESXaaEA)
---
You know Barack.
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/496?c0=.aG3D0-&refcode=em250606-1A&t=3&akid=639%2E2563979%2ESXaaEA)
---
He would like to meet you. Here’s why.
I know a lot of folks are wondering what’s going to guide us through this moment... How are we all going to chart the course?
There is only one answer -- and that is together. Everyone doing whatever it is they can: volunteering, organizing in your community, running for office, and more...
That is why Barack Obama has agreed to participate in a contest where one lucky winner and a guest will get the chance to meet him later this summer.
Flight -- covered. Hotel -- covered.
All you have to do is donate to the Democratic Party to enter.
[**Please contribute $5 or whatever it is that feels right to you today to the Democratic National Committee. You'll help build a strong party while getting a chance to meet Barack Obama.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-obama-contest?refcode=em250606-1A&refcode2=639_2563979_SXaaEA&akid=639%2E2563979%2ESXaaEA)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Republicans aren’t fighting for working families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4745%2E35263%2EL0mIH0)
Peter, When Donald Trump budgets around tax breaks for billionaires, _hardworking families, sick children, and seniors who depend on Medicaid will pay the price._ When Senate Republicans refuse to stand up to Trump’s agenda, _**228,00 Wisconsinites** on Medicaid are left wondering if they’ll still have health care._ _**Wisconsinites and Americans deserve better.** _ **[It’s never been clearer that Republicans aren’t fighting for working families. If you’re able, please chip in to help me support Democratic campaigns to unseat extreme Republicans and flip the Senate majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-jun25.1mF5PM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4745%2E35263%2EL0mIH0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-jun25.x5VxaC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4745%2E35263%2EL0mIH0)

While Trump and his Republican allies work to rip away a lifeline for millions of Americans, I’m fighting to protect it.
I introduced legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs, and I’m hosting round tables from Madison to Wausau, raising the alarm about Republicans’ deep cuts to Medicaid and talking to constituents who have been affected.
I’m not letting Republicans attack our health care, and I’m supporting Democratic candidates who will stand with everyday people — not bend to Trump’s will.
**[This is important work, and if there’s room in your budget, I’d appreciate your grassroots support today.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-jun25.1mF5PM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250602_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=4745%2E35263%2EL0mIH0)**
Thank you,
Tammy

name: Kathy Salvi
subject: Serious: Pritzker Just Doubled Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We are working daily to hold Pritzker accountable for his violence inciting rhetoric and lies
| | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92711e6c1ffe4d379f9af0a01d8883ae&_e=-sj3C1PdVcX19gcEK1DA6zNeS1tu3j0rCA-tD_qL_WX-TI3DYWgmsK3XSGtqlGb59E0UGgZx6Gr7INdHlvWDk5WFpN9qaZBO4_QpaqXDTu4nM-tHvR_U7RrXJJHLG_qCJIPPvIls5hS3BjkxEABMVuoG6EG0GbLMgrE9YwCkjjgJIr7C9lr26GTllZHBeLhAEB35cUc4587oVFW_RtCjv-UEVtiwsSgMvG8TlNhe9LxKxpF-O26w9kyPbAABX1FWq7I6awzCwFwz2o1u5XOCi9ZpsPsKMhUTHlrIw0ASD2b9xwLJNwnXDo7vK8uezvAR)
---

Fellow Republican,
Earlier this week, we**_[launched a fund to hold Governor JB Pritzker accountable](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92711e6c1ffe4d379f9af0a01d8883ae&_e=-sj3C1PdVcX19gcEK1DA6zNeS1tu3j0rCA-tD_qL_WX-TI3DYWgmsK3XSGtqlGb59E0UGgZx6Gr7INdHlvWDk5WFpN9qaZBO4_QpaqXDTu4nM-tHvR_U7RrXJJHLG_qCJIPPvIls5hS3BjkxEABMVuoG6EG0GbLMgrE9YwCkjjgKo0J0iQzeHXrxElFY08rQfmARcYwfP9S-EI8JjLMjlvDBeADqF43-mmX4Ob0NzbpJi8zg6obizZUtxJCC4T8RUrPDrTyLk0XlmIkLYKOpH9t1uQoNHiNkli2l2Mx4pMXMCWnLI9Yh6x2LbkftHtha)_** for his increasingly violent, dangerous, and inflammatory rhetoric.
Instead of backing down, he’s doubled down—again comparing President Trump and Republican policies to Nazi Germany.
Let that sink in.
A sitting governor, using the darkest chapter in history to smear political opponents, all while laying the groundwork for his own presidential campaign.This isn’t just offensive—it’s reckless. It’s designed to inflame, divide, and dehumanize anyone who dares to disagree with him. And in a nation where political violence is rising, his words carry deadly consequences.
We must stop him.
We launched the [**_Pritzker Accountability Fund_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92711e6c1ffe4d379f9af0a01d8883ae&_e=-sj3C1PdVcX19gcEK1DA6zNeS1tu3j0rCA-tD_qL_WX-TI3DYWgmsK3XSGtqlGb59E0UGgZx6Gr7INdHlvWDk5WFpN9qaZBO4_QpaqXDTu4nM-tHvR_U7RrXJJHLG_qCJIPPvIls5hS3BjkxEABMVuoG6EG0GbLMgrE9YwCkjjgmqRZid5S4hTPhvBEr9vaCGviQ02eT8Qx-xUce5qI8w878qGVpsB5P9OXOwWu96sBNKrjoJOWnork7TGXz-u_B3e6fbB2lVvolRol5E5Ay6KaAUX2X93pyAUvjGGpanBeS-dOghIC3izyMlvAP1aBO) to fight back and we’re asking every patriot in Illinois to help us meet our emergency goal by midnight.
Pritzker doubled down. Will you?

__

[RUSH A DONATION NOW →](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92711e6c1ffe4d379f9af0a01d8883ae&_e=-sj3C1PdVcX19gcEK1DA6zNeS1tu3j0rCA-tD_qL_WX-TI3DYWgmsK3XSGtqlGb59E0UGgZx6Gr7INdHlvWDk5WFpN9qaZBO4_QpaqXDTu4nM-tHvR_U7RrXJJHLG_qCJIPPvIls5hS3BjkxEABMVuoG6EG0GbLMgrE9YwCkjjj3NXvOgZ2aJFPYGv7CzQh40uZA77IKU7A0jSL298HcApSuVJwAtmAQia1wLRClVXRGpmp10mpphgJmRmjskdlJMywCQuk40VaPGOi9hupcY2we1AVm7fT6Wbh183_9NFuZthptKBe52Y4Rp0iEsRUl)
****Your gift will help us:
✅ Fund an aggressive media and digital response to counter his lies
✅ Call for a formal investigation into his rhetoric and conduct
✅ Show the radical left that their smear campaigns won’t silence us
Illinois is not Pritzker’s personal platform for national ambitions. He doesn’t get to rewrite history, attack his opponents, or destroy civil discourse to boost his profile.
It’s time to draw the line. And it starts right now—with you.

[HELP US HOLD PRITZKER ACCOUNTABLE →](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92711e6c1ffe4d379f9af0a01d8883ae&_e=-sj3C1PdVcX19gcEK1DA6zNeS1tu3j0rCA-tD_qL_WX-TI3DYWgmsK3XSGtqlGb59E0UGgZx6Gr7INdHlvWDk5WFpN9qaZBO4_QpaqXDTu4nM-tHvR_U7RrXJJHLG_qCJIPPvIls5hS3BjkxEABMVuoG6EG0GbLMgrE9YwCkjjgNlRnnKI-Za4ue61L9d0a7jgoVtdwz66sQPXdgYrhHgcL_ExYIfgw2fFJ1wGC7ZL3lg5A3WRRbeNgORWwM5CACrBu79MFJZN-W-ykYnvmhcCeF5-MOgJ7ZwmcwzGQQBNASjvZTM3U6AplGGwrzuGM_)
Thank you for being a warrior in this fight. Let’s show the country that Illinois Republicans still believe in truth, law, and leadership that unites—not divides.
With urgency and resolve,
Kathy SalviChair, Illinois Republican Party

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92711e6c1ffe4d379f9af0a01d8883ae&_e=-sj3C1PdVcX19gcEK1DA65byPRIpWAotS9PNb4A4yalk89dx-qz4TKfiu0U7Pl-sw0I8EHJNX-Ozg6u7fIjtcAuHu8afF0dKlpnkHpk-j9X6YYCCJ_oOaOaUOzQ2uG_52gCNV9YXrPc9aEzLAgUOQVXHGMjOYhmGuXisA7IDkrwZk-kJxpuFHuyu4dxIX5pZjJkB_e-cEV-v7aZuY_oj8osONhWrL1QLvHDM5-JQUWKCIPJPTTJLFG2y_FIwF6VCFB0qHXtwKmrFSZdOvZ_kpYW3oGyKBtDHFnPMesc1ph59a6-OPWdo5qpkLlISkIP-FSodc0yjZNEmEGHrrjisHgx7__nNZaxfnUBWnLu_8dmxVXVuAPZcIn4m4-S1kwMchRyVVeeF7Vvl2Wj_UbeTQ6HLTrHJrhERHDJnAi_vIok4N2VF3r13fsrT5cuRdnoI4gNPMVVUwlTX7fJx2icfvUvUaQrAamMsd9kYsuc4zIIXK3773m-kCpl0En2grNqbSHG9TCioCahpdaLF23XWa3cwz7yxVYUF39ozCFiMiBakSWb__6uOUy7gcuXBkpxW)__

clean_body: We are working daily to hold Pritzker accountable for his violence inciting rhetoric and lies | | | | Fellow Republican, Earlier this week, we for his increasingly violent, dangerous, and inflammatory rhetoric. Instead of backing down, he’s doubled down—again comparing President Trump and Republican policies to Nazi Germany. Let that sink in. A sitting governor, using the darkest chapter in history to smear political opponents, all while laying the groundwork for his own presidential campaign.This isn’t just offensive—it’s reckless. It’s designed to inflame, divide, and dehumanize anyone who dares to disagree with him. And in a nation where political violence is rising, his words carry deadly consequences. We must stop him. We launched the to fight back and we’re asking every patriot in Illinois to help us meet our emergency goal by midnight. Pritzker doubled down. Will you? ****Your gift will help us: ✅ Fund an aggressive media and digital response to counter his lies ✅ Call for a formal investigation into his rhetoric and conduct ✅ Show the radical left that their smear campaigns won’t silence us Illinois is not Pritzker’s personal platform for national ambitions. He doesn’t get to rewrite history, attack his opponents, or destroy civil discourse to boost his profile. It’s time to draw the line. And it starts right now—with you. Thank you for being a warrior in this fight. Let’s show the country that Illinois Republicans still believe in truth, law, and leadership that unites—not divides. With urgency and resolve, Kathy SalviChair, Illinois Republican Party | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | Illinois Republican Party | PO Box 78 Springfield, IL 62705

body:
The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with...| | |

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109088384/549966436/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250529questions_N_CB_90DO_9_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhZjJmMzA5LWRiNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h6wQdNAaEXTJJxa8HgiPtwBd1T_-pRiUchLuT47gSZo=)

Hi Peter,

Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith checked into a hospital with what she thought was an intense headache. At the time, Smith was about eight weeks pregnant.

The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead.

Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood”, a doctrine that entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections. Since Smith was 8 weeks pregnant, the law has required doctors to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer has brain function. Doctors will deliver the baby, who experts say will have medical challenges and may not survive, through a caesarean section...

**Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government – which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch, and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

**_We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy._**

[**There are far too many new laws across the country that give embryos more rights than women. At Her Bold Move, we are working to elect pro-choice, pro-women women who will fight for our daughters, sisters, mothers, grandmothers, neighbors, and friends. Every woman deserves bodily autonomy – and we know that getting more women elected to government will be our best defense against any law that threatens that right. Monica Simpson, Executive Director of SisterSong, the lead plaintiff in a lawsuit challenging Georgia’s abortion law, said Smith’s family, "deserved the right to have decision-making power about her medical decisions. Instead, they have endured over 90 days of retraumatization, expensive medical costs, and the cruelty of being unable to resolve and move toward healing.”

**Georgia state Senator Ed Setzler,_who sponsored the state’s abortion ban_** , has taken the opposite view. He told the _Associated Press_ that “it is completely appropriate that the hospital do what they can to save the life of the child.”

_Why is a man sponsoring a state’s abortion ban???_ Something is deeply wrong with this picture and, at Her Bold Move, we’re on a mission to solve it.

[**We desperately need more women in office advocating for women constituents and their bodies. We cannot allow this to continue. Rush $20.25 or whatever you can now to help us fight back with the best defense we’ve got: more qualified WOMEN in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109088391/549966443/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250606disturbing_N_THBM_90DO_10_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhZjJmMzA5LWRiNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h6wQdNAaEXTJJxa8HgiPtwBd1T_-pRiUchLuT47gSZo=)

Together,

Erica Henry

name: Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
subject: Peter–did you see this?
body:
Double down on repro rights
Peter—

Did you see this announcement from Nancy? I don't want you to miss this HUGE opportunity!

[**From now until midnight on June 30, every gift you make to the Center for Reproductive Rights will be DOUBLED, up to $100,000 thanks to a generous group of Center donors!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089070/549968637/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

The United States is in a reproductive health care crisis. Clinics are being targeted and losing funding, providers are being threatened, and people are being denied basic, life-saving medical care.

This is not the time to back down—it's time to double down. [**Please, don’t miss this opportunity. Be as generous as you’re able and make your matched gift before June 30!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089071/549968638/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Let's do this,

Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk
Senior Director, Individual Giving
* * *
From: Nancy Northup <info@reprorights.org>
Sent: Monday, June 2, 2025 9:16 AM
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Subject: Defend clinics❗All gifts DOUBLED
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089072/549968639/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

| Peter—

Since _Roe_ fell, anti-abortion extremists—backed by Trump's anti-rights administration—have been working relentlessly to make abortion care inaccessible. People are being denied essential, lifesaving care. Clinics are losing funding. The goal is clear: control our bodies by dismantling our rights.

If we don't act now, we risk losing even more.

[**Starting today, your gift to the Center for Reproductive Rights will be DOUBLED up to $100,000, thanks to a generous group of donors!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089073/549968640/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089074/549968641/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) In this environment, it's often the clinics and providers who are on the front lines fighting and struggling to stay open under a wave of bans and legal threats. [**We are their defenders, and supporters _like you_ make that possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089083/549968650/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) Our community powers the expert legal support we provide at no cost to clinics and medical professionals who rely on it to stay open and deliver care despite relentless attacks.

Without your donations, independent abortion providers—our clients—could be forced to turn away patients, cutting off access to critical, often lifesaving care for the people who need it most. [**Please, make a gift today and it will be DOUBLED, amplifying your impact on these clinics and the care they provide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089084/549968651/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [**DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089085/549968652/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT")

[**Please, don't miss this chance to DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT on the work to keep clinics open and abortion care accessible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109089086/549968653/1126318745?sourceid=1150742&utm_campaign=25emige-0602aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=fye&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjgyNC1kYzQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sQKwo2lJwY7mPADSiONK1jJz1R9SP37gw619UjrGsA=&emci=8ac00247-3942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b126824-dc42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Republican Rep. Andy Barr **[slammed Rep. Maxine Waters in front of congress](https://substack.com/redirect/9ddf8a40-203b-414d-94bb-afdb0ddd8be5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing President Donald Trump of running a crypto scam against his own supporters.
He absolutely goes off at her...
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9ddf8a40-203b-414d-94bb-afdb0ddd8be5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9ddf8a40-203b-414d-94bb-afdb0ddd8be5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Trump doesn't just want Americans to use his crypto, he wants us to put our money in his digital wallet while he guts our financial regulators!" Waters said. "Trump is not just scamming everyday Americans with his crypto con, he is even grifting his own supporters!"
Waters continued, "200 people collectively spent $148 million to attend his shady meme coin dinner with the promise of an exclusive experience. What did they get? Walmart steak, Costco freezer island halibut, recycled talking points and just 20 minutes of Trump time. I guess you get what you pay for!"
Barr jumped in to set the record straight, **["This baseless, politically motivated attack against President Trump,](https://substack.com/redirect/eaba36b8-f156-4442-965f-1f3b901df885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that his support for a regulatory framework for a digital asset market structure is somehow corrupt, that he's personally profiting from our agenda... this is absurd!!"
He pointed out that Trump's financial assets and businesses are managed by his children, who are not in the administration, in a blind trust.
**["When they throw these attacks out carelessly,](https://substack.com/redirect/eaba36b8-f156-4442-965f-1f3b901df885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** it's not just Trump Derangement Syndrome, it's about them opposing American leadership in crypto! It's about them so obsessed with their political hatred of the president that they're willing to sacrifice American leadership in the innovative technologies of the future!!"
"They don't like that Trump is an innovative, successful capitalist who understands that if America is to lead, we need this agenda!!" Barr added.
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/eaba36b8-f156-4442-965f-1f3b901df885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Trump says "zero interest" in meeting with Elon today after Big Beautiful Breakup leaves a sour taste
Despite White House aides apparently scrambling to arrange a Friday phone call with Musk, **[Trump firmly told ABC News he had "zero interest"](https://substack.com/redirect/19d14798-c604-415d-b304-55cd66f1aabb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in speaking to "the man who has lost his mind," showing he won't be pushed around even by former allies.
* **The president isn 't getting distracted by this** \- When asked about the public spat, Trump confidently stated everything was going "very well" and he's "never done better," pointing to his record-high poll numbers as evidence that the controversy isn't affecting his presidency.
* **The conflict erupted after Musk criticized Trump's massive spending bill as a "disgusting abomination"** \- Their public spat escalated quickly from Musk strongly attacking the Big Beautiful Bill for containing too much "government pork" and Trump criticizing Musk in the Oval Office on Thursday afternoon, leading to threats over government contracts and Musk even suggesting Trump should be impeached.
* **Musk made explosive accusations about Trump being in the Jeffrey Epstein files** \- The Tesla billionaire claimed Trump appears in unreleased Epstein documents and that this is "the real reason they have not been made public," representing one of the most serious personal attacks during their feud.
* **There are signs Musk may be ready to reconcile after outside pressure** \- Musk showed signs of backing down late Thursday after hedge fund manager Bill Ackman called for peace between the two men, with Musk responding **["You're not wrong"](https://substack.com/redirect/be2c06d5-28d8-416b-91f8-95d3aa9a2bed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to Ackman's tweet about the world benefiting from their friendship.

* * *
# **MAGA veteran HUMILIATES whiny Democrat in front of congress for defending the bloated bureaucracy**
GOP Rep. Eli Crane **[put Democrat Rep. Robert Garcia in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/eaba36b8-f156-4442-965f-1f3b901df885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trashing DOGE and Elon Musk's efforts to cut the federal government down to size.
"Would it be possible to get some therapy dogs in here,... I'm worried about their mental stability."

There are signs Musk may be ready to reconcile after outside pressure \- Musk showed signs of backing down late Thursday after hedge fund manager Bill Ackman called for peace between the two men, with Musk responding to Ackman's tweet about the world benefiting from their friendship. MAGA veteran HUMILIATES whiny Democrat in front of congress for defending the bloated bureaucracy GOP Rep. Eli Crane for trashing DOGE and Elon Musk's efforts to cut the federal government down to size. "Would it be possible to get some therapy dogs in here,... I'm worried about their mental stability." | | POLL Who's side are you in in the Elon/Trump spat? | ? ? ? ? * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: PoliticsPA
subject: New College Football System is Rigged
body:
Tune into the latest installment of the Voices of Reason podcast. | | | |
---
| | | Welcome to the latest edition of _Voices of Reason_ where we’ll recap exclusive news and data featured in our most recent podcast.

>From NIL policies and Title IX to the growing influence of major conferences, this segment highlights concerns about fairness, the impact on Pennsylvania schools, and why this issue is gaining attention in Congress.

This segment includes an exclusive interview with Congressman **Brendan Boyle** , who shares views and insights you want to know.
---
| **Big Names Make News**
---
| **Congressman Brendan Boyle** highlights the impact a new college football auto-bids system could have on the hundred of colleges outside of the Big Ten and SEC if it passes, stating, “this would limit their ability to make the playoffs, which means it would limit their ability to earn a pretty significant amount of revenue.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=106a8e6e98&e=b7b3eddce2)]

**Congressman Brendan Boyle** explains how student college athletes have been affected by the court ruling of “NIL,” which has turned varying state policies into “pay for play,” arguing that we “really need federal legislation in order to get everyone playing by the same rules of the road.” [[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=30d2f00b59&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
* * *
---
| **Numbers You Need to Know**
---
| _Voter Interests_
* [Senate Bill 9](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=705348f38f&e=b7b3eddce2), “The Save Women’s Sports Act,” passed the Senate**32-18** on May 6, 2025, and now moves to the PA House of Representatives for consideration. [[Palegis.us](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f3480fa9e2&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* PA is suing the USDA over cutting funding for a **$13 million** food aid program under a three-year contract, money that the state planned to use to buy food from farms to stock food banks. [[ABCNews](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5c62ca95bd&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Penn State football generated more than **$113 million** in revenue in the 2024 fiscal year with **$44 million** in ticket sales, more than **$43 million** in media rights and Big Ten revenue, and **$12.2 million** in parking and concessions for home football games. [[SportsIllustrated](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=014417f114&e=b7b3eddce2)]

_Public Opinion_
* A PA General Assembly position comes with the perk of at least **four free tickets** to a Penn State football game once a year. [[B+L](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d7959ca285&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* Penn State quarterback Drew Allar earns **$3.1 million** in NIL deals, ranking 8th in college football and 10th overall in NIL earnings. [[JarganJosh](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=70bede2754&e=b7b3eddce2)]
* In 2023, PA recorded **11,262** distracted driving crashes—Paul Miller’s Law, which bans hand-held device use even at red lights or brief stops, goes into effect on June 5, 2025. [[CBSNews](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9ec2e68260&e=b7b3eddce2)]

---
|
* * *
---
| **College Football is Broken with Congressman Brendan Boyle**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5d684d220c&e=b7b3eddce2 "Rep. Boyle warns: college football is broken | Voices of Reason feat. U.S. Rep. Brendan Boyle")
---
|
* * *
---
| **In Case You Missed It...**
---
| The _Voices of Reason_ podcast has covered the most important issues in Pennsylvania politics – from [education funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c23f7b39c3&e=b7b3eddce2) to [trust in elections](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=443ee58c89&e=b7b3eddce2). Secretary of the Commonwealth [Al Schmidt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=687d625728&e=b7b3eddce2), PA Treasurer [Stacy Garrity](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=83c06bc90c&e=b7b3eddce2), and House Appropriations Chairman [Jordan Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=efcb0a72d7&e=b7b3eddce2) are just a few of many influential guests who have joined us for exclusive interviews and roundtable discussions.
Visit the _Voice of Reason_ [YouTube page](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ad7e5136bd&e=b7b3eddce2) to experience all the great moments you missed.
---
|
* * *
---
| **Get in Touch**
---
| We like smart ideas and want to hear from you.

Send feedback and inquire about appearing on _Voices of Reason_ , at [press@politicspa.com](mailto:press@politicspa.com?subject=Voices%20of%20Reason%20Podcast%20Inquiry).
---
|
---

---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e10a5b0940&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
[](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=277d25a3ed&e=b7b3eddce2)

|

Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063
[Add us to your address book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&e=b7b3eddce2&c=814356a563) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7902855e75&t=b&e=b7b3eddce2&c=814356a563).

body:
If it were up to us, we’d overturn Citizens United TODAY
#

To be honest, we hate sending these pesky emails asking for money, Peter.
We’d rather be telling you about all the work Jon is doing to stand up to the Trump administration and fight back against the corruption in Washington. But the truth is, these emails make a huge difference for our team.
You see, Jon won’t beg federal lobbyists or dark money special interests to cut him a check. Instead, he relies on folks like you who give $5, $10, or $25 at a time to emails like this one to help us build the resources we’ll need to win this election.
And this race is going to be _particularly expensive,_ **because Jon Ossoff is MAGA’s #1 target.**
They are going to use every dirty trick in the book and spend hundreds of millions of dollars attacking Jon and trying to replace him with a MAGA lackey.
So even though we wish we didn’t have to, we are humbly asking for your support:
**[Peter, donate $5 to Jon’s re-election campaign today. It’s the ONLY way we’ll have the resources to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and win.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250605-f&t=1&akid=418%2E5691347%2EYS1b9_)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250605-f&t=2&akid=418%2E5691347%2EYS1b9_)**
Thanks for everything, Peter. We couldn’t do this without you.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=418%2E5691347%2EYS1b9_) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

subject: BREAKING: Secret plan to flip Georgia Senate seat
body:
BREAKING OUT OF GEORGIA:
Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.
This isn’t just about one race. It’s about control of the Senate, and whether Trump and his allies can bulldoze their way back to unchecked power.
Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.
We set a goal to raise $60,000 by the end of this month to power organizing in Georgia and defend other vulnerable Senate seats. But we’re still $13,638 behind, and the deadline is in just TWO DAYS. * ❌ Greater strain on banks already exposed to risky bonds
* ❌ Lower confidence in America's financial system

name: Rural Americans United
subject: Reminder: Reclaiming Education, Reclaiming Democracy
body:
It’s up to us—those who live in rural communities
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* Reclaiming Education, Reclaiming Democracy
* No Kings - June 14
* BBBB
* Potpourri

---
| |
---
| Education. Our government was established with checks and balances to ensure that no branch could corrupt the will of the people. But what was not written into the Constitution is this: the greatest check on our system of government is an informed electorate. As Thomas Jefferson wrote, "A well-informed citizenry is the best defense against tyranny."
Educating the electorate is Rural Americans United's primary goal. We use our communication skills to reach newly registered voters, young people, and marginalized communities with messages that resonate and in language that is accessible.
We know the Republican Party has taken full advantage of educating the public. You may question this, since as the party has moved further right, it has increased its lies, fictions, and hate-filled rhetoric--which doesn't sound much like education. But it is. And it has been effective.
Meanwhile, Democrats remain stuck in a 1970s version of education. Republicans have evolved--or devolved--with the times. They understood that as the public education system declined, so did Americans' interest in engaging with complex or nuanced topics. In its place, they offered spoon-fed messages that reinforce people's existing prejudices. By appealing to the lowest common denominator, everyone gets to feel informed, even when they're not. It's easy to build a web of lies when it's full of ideas people already want to believe--and when those beliefs are echoed by everyone around them.
Democrats, on the other hand, continue to rely on academic-style explanations that often sound condescending. The desire to "explain" has diminishing value in today's fast-moving political environment. Sound bites--true or not--land quickly and stick. Lengthy rebuttals, no matter how accurate, are tuned out. And while that was happening, the Democratic Party abandoned rural America in favor of deep-pocketed, college-educated urban centers. It was a lazy move. It was an arrogant move. And rural Americans saw it as such.
---
---
| |
---
| -Published in the Yakima Republican Party Newsletter May 2025
It's up to us--those who live in rural communities--to reeducate the American people on democratic values (which are not always the same as Democratic Party values). It is clear that Americans are hungry for strong voices, clear direction, and understandable leadership they can trust. So much so that some have become devoted to authoritarian figures with a cult-like intensity. Meanwhile, the Democratic Party is faltering--and fighting internal change every step of the way. The last eight members of Congress to die in office have all been Democrats. That's not just a statistic--it's a warning (source:[ ](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9qsm1ppx0MMd0hicSxnEY5xQPQkvLHR1eTO-BF-ee3jIj7F_O4RZothjmBD9Y9R87GxEoHBVXlhU1DB3c_s2l09Sfl1yC-_IhEgHuF8IcEMG1T80p33IH1eazw8DmQBUg-n6LDAb1xJI9oFMRc_HRxiVJnL9RpqzLM77tVuyF3QKi6FK5qBHnSrzdqHR2ZHm_BCJHjI8dnHRq19VjRii-u46ZxKO0Wm1ZekaUeMLvI=&c=pLGuPJzU70mqoIN4_DP1WC7pgSEhn562t1x4deaulqUMFLZFHj73lw==&ch=ytuZGckkNj2yHkSCBmtTsGcQoFF-CyevjZeAxdWYvlSZXqa9MtCl_w==)[Business Insider](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9qsm1ppx0MMd0hicSxnEY5xQPQkvLHR1eTO-BF-ee3jIj7F_O4RZothjmBD9Y9R87GxEoHBVXlhU1DB3c_s2l09Sfl1yC-_IhEgHuF8IcEMG1T80p33IH1eazw8DmQBUg-n6LDAb1xJI9oFMRc_HRxiVJnL9RpqzLM77tVuyF3QKi6FK5qBHnSrzdqHR2ZHm_BCJHjI8dnHRq19VjRii22XiGt0O8WZP8bqq4NTxLQ=&c=pLGuPJzU70mqoIN4_DP1WC7pgSEhn562t1x4deaulqUMFLZFHj73lw==&ch=ytuZGckkNj2yHkSCBmtTsGcQoFF-CyevjZeAxdWYvlSZXqa9MtCl_w==)).
So what can we do locally?
* Instead of explaining, we start conversations.
* Instead of offering stinging rebuttals, we lead the narrative.
* And we redouble our efforts to reach the communities that are shifting rightward at an alarming pace--especially Latino voters and our youth.

Now is the time to act. The stakes are too high for us to sit back and hope national strategies will fix what has been neglected. Change must begin where we live, with the people we know and the values we hold. Rural Americans United is committed to rebuilding trust, restoring democratic principles, and reigniting civic engagement in the places that have been overlooked for too long.
But we cannot do this alone. We need your voice. We need your commitment.
Join us. Attend a meeting. Bring a friend. Share our message. Help shape a movement that speaks with honesty, listens with humility, and leads with courage. Together, we can reclaim the promise of democracy--community by community, conversation by conversation.
---
| |
---
| | [Invest in Change - Because We Work for You - Click to Donate](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9qsm1ppx0MMd0hicSxnEY5xQPQkvLHR1eTO-BF-ee3jIj7F_O4RZqpsmfxdndcogI4EJ3x4ql5J06vGPw46MuXcalmBpHUDpiJ1o4GGVJRZuWgxuQkYd7J4xxPlqZW5_rNZwPc9Y-Tn8u1NtCQurdOoA-H9Kc3AMJ0kzgdZWrRLX1fOtooA8ssE04sV1XMTMekXjLin5PB8WitPKAao0pjb0CuIyMCECcSkqB1eTAw=&c=pLGuPJzU70mqoIN4_DP1WC7pgSEhn562t1x4deaulqUMFLZFHj73lw==&ch=ytuZGckkNj2yHkSCBmtTsGcQoFF-CyevjZeAxdWYvlSZXqa9MtCl_w==)

---
| PoliticsGirl on TikTok offers one of the most insightful summaries of the Big Beautiful Budget Bill.
PoliticsGirl breaks down how the budget bill isn't just about spending--it's also a tool used to shape what government can and cannot do. She highlights how conservative lawmakers quietly insert restrictive language that limits the enforcement powers of agencies like the DOJ or even the courts, effectively allowing certain laws to go unenforced. This creates a dangerous imbalance where only the executive branch (under a president's control) can decide what gets enforced--paving the way for authoritarianism. She stresses that what seems like "boring fine print" can actually erode democracy if people aren't paying attention.
---
| | | | Potpourri

This is where we are now, and it's not good.[Senator Senator Murray and RFK Jr. Modern Politics?](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9qsm1ppx0MMd0hicSxnEY5xQPQkvLHR1eTO-BF-ee3jIj7F_O4RZothjmBD9Y9RQ2NLFjAbsgdfAKVyF44HjXNlPBHw6CJZosZQBNB4wLFEWr-9NIeEHIquIOQD1wzE1V9M-ulE6PFMAklb7Rm2Q-WGwo-w6cG_wuC7LxPFiEK3hNumOWIH3JmmANPOY9NS0076ePAy92I=&c=pLGuPJzU70mqoIN4_DP1WC7pgSEhn562t1x4deaulqUMFLZFHj73lw==&ch=ytuZGckkNj2yHkSCBmtTsGcQoFF-CyevjZeAxdWYvlSZXqa9MtCl_w==)

| | Dear Fellow American,

Is it possible to repair the CIA?

**[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/ALnrP1kSl3tDCi9P_NUDREcgVix5jiZfUjDAY_nKMJNqR5toAygj8ZI1Tt8Qq1HSnwnGbLkDPea7rPaLU7e-jBTDPALNWmFsfZ6b5De_Jclt7eByfHYiq3M5jY-J32IEyWSYCCzfpmBBFg8TWSYnljAGkq3TbsQ_5YmriHIS3H_b8-EKVLil56l_yWIofbOEiALMyHKmlpwoPZzPfvKunt1Cs1f2HQ8u7KDTLsnieofb-OcKcVhj-Qc3pvV0tLXue-m6NtMQWKL9Na5bGLoX7WtTq0yzaAQXuuCqldW-wTdrTueGbxn55_gr00tNgC8Mg4N1vzlRpB0siBsP7whNMaxvGoEI2MtFLRH6XVY4I6E0cfbZF2sk8hzoafgwJUF4Tk5tgLp6qjqMQK_mz1yltynowXduJzkaxbpyCQISpkssd9AV5MkV-o4qFo9f-dxdRuc5gkeIsjtfaa2Oga92gxqdDEKsri-BeePvI19deFNIQVB4aJtoIKMAoLKi5SunSVQu_YNKA4cYf3fuTjJAbT6xwCQVVJhbFQt_vLX48U8HRejGg7XihSSSBDGg_MW_OZI3NWGn5yhRdkoVS0B1zIDui2s9Yq2Wc2_kH9oXBugWwvaSMxPUJpOFt3LtPPW-thRHhRD3Dn5ijk8JIulwH72eKdbDYiuq4WWsiZOUlda5Hs1kuYsR9p3lqVChaIou2lWst-nA1RoaiHFWzepCW3I/YGcvYH5GpaZY6JY4CMEpQoZaeg3lqaDO/9)****[To answer this question, Hillsdale College has created a FREE online video series on the history of U.S. intelligence](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/SDlWWm81jtu2G9tzCHiJ-ytyJOdfWK6P4KH2UcpY0UX6SxlR0RgzGQ7Q8AdKETPwt6vge8q009t-iGEnyAlbf2mzDfIHqKK2fEDhs2AMcohKWlEHsGrMPvhSp2PwmaGgm0VgZBBodU-YSBm9eo2JZ-G3UMuV6NnxDswNBVnn1GmnYqxHDkd8O4RLAQnnqEE0op4YkFL6FyL4sfa69qXTEBNoDpxl7luRRPzkyeMrdTnbCFVbEOYUFucoOhDRSi6KQxVwEQUR2-lOp6jb8ZjLRD6_3PvUoSMPC_dNuFFWAlnY3X2Gr3Z5HLzIyZSBsxA82FPpFybRuYfZX6KYQgSi8IEcUuKDP2OIb8x5Lhrex-vf72Iu5ShDdGnBSx4Y7Xm3FlDBlZnrsowYcGa5pZ2NGwJWIeOFqCEVs_JTxyA92OeX0Za-HMiIABbLwARkVRRTKNJ00zg-Ozg-Rmj2F1OCst7qTocyMQHgo_rZ4c-03APhQtkG4mEpxtCJEY9NJNJBJvjn276Hqzpi5n9srdOcbnKILegb7GYpogjgOoXIYd7bQK166g-mvgn8fefG0NTjDVqS0JPapxkR2vCUs-7INo5oegDBQp64tP_0y2zAeMAJwMkLTdphaOOiYcRFlgF8rrzsWJ6pd25qu6NBKzU4TL4sQmNL2j5xbula9R8PTI4zMd-XcAG493ynqxi6PM8tS03mL-0jLFNsuWc9a4f4rR0/dPn-aTjOBMQZMP7sHkDLoJ4VEb5M-fpP/9).**

In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn why we need intelligence and how it is used against American citizens and duly elected leaders.

The CIA--originally founded as the OSS--was created in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor to help protect America from foreign threats. But in the last few decades, this agency...
* FAILED to foresee the 9/11 attack and then took over a decade to find Osama Bin Ladin

* COVERED for the Obama administration after the assault on our embassy in Benghazi that led to four American deaths

* THREATENED the sovereignty of the American people with the Russia collusion hoax

* FAILED to warn Americans about COVID-19

* HID the origins of the Hunter Biden laptop and declared it Russian disinformation

America's Founders would not recognize this notorious intelligence agency.

We still need intelligence to help protect us from foreign threats. We needed it in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor, and we need it even more today.

But in recent years, the CIA served its own interests...not those of the American people.

And so it was no surprise that anyone in power who went after the CIA was soon _not_ in power.

You might remember when New York Senator Chuck Schumer told MSNBC, **" Let me tell you, you take on the intelligence community, they have six ways from Sunday at getting back at you."**

Whether or not Schumer meant to make such a revealing statement, it is further evidence that you and I live in a country in which powerful government agencies rarely operate according to the consent of the governed.

How did we get to this point? And how can we reform the CIA and our other intelligence agencies?

**I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free video series, U.S. Intelligence: History and Controversies.**
