clean_body: Is it possible to repair the CIA? | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Fellow American, Is it possible to repair the CIA? . In this online video series, filmed during a conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn why we need intelligence and how it is used against American citizens and duly elected leaders. The CIA--originally founded as the OSS--was created in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor to help protect America from foreign threats. But in the last few decades, this agency... FAILED to foresee the 9/11 attack and then took over a decade to find Osama Bin Ladin COVERED for the Obama administration after the assault on our embassy in Benghazi that led to four American deaths THREATENED the sovereignty of the American people with the Russia collusion hoax FAILED to warn Americans about COVID-19 HID the origins of the Hunter Biden laptop and declared it Russian disinformation America's Founders would not recognize this notorious intelligence agency. We still need intelligence to help protect us from foreign threats. We needed it in the aftermath of Pearl Harbor, and we need it even more today. But in recent years, the CIA served its own interests...not those of the American people. And so it was no surprise that anyone in power who went after the CIA was soon not in power. You might remember when New York Senator Chuck Schumer told MSNBC, " Let me tell you, you take on the intelligence community, they have six ways from Sunday at getting back at you." Whether or not Schumer meant to make such a revealing statement, it is further evidence that you and I live in a country in which powerful government agencies rarely operate according to the consent of the governed. How did we get to this point? And how can we reform the CIA and our other intelligence agencies? I invite you to learn more about this critical topic through our free video series, U.S. Intelligence: History and Controversies. You can receive instant access to this series right now using this secure link:** Learning about the history of U.S. intelligence is essential to understanding our current situation. I urge you to watch your free online video series on U.S. intelligence today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
This race is more than just Virginia's future – It's going to be a bellwether for the entire nation and the first major election after Trump’s inauguration.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109094935/549983213/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzExYTIwZTQtZTE0Mi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FR4dAaDBvcTpxBpJsZxUbEmnhysHTv3Cx1raKCUqGyY=)

| Peter,

We're less than two weeks away from our general election, and** we wanted to share two important things you should know about Abigail’s race for Virginia Governor this November:**
1. **This race will impact more than just Virginia's future** – It's going to be a bellwether for the entire nation and the first major election after Trump’s inauguration. The outcome will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. So we’ve got to win big.

2. **National attention and money will flood this race** – With Republicans determined to keep the Governor’s seat red, we can expect millions from their super PACs pouring in to try to sway the outcome.

We know this race is going to be one of the most closely watched in the country — and with the stakes this high, every dollar counts!

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: Trump can’t fix socialism, but you can
body:
Even though some may think Trump has solved a lot of issues while in office, there’s one battle no president can fight alone

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7egkjm5jkrsfg3nehdnmh7qnp9t5jhvf4eouu28_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9j62or2clh2bs) Friend,

Even though some may think Trump has solved a lot of issues while in office, there’s one battle no president can fight alone: **the war against socialism**.

Socialist indoctrination is pervasive in our schools, media, and social interactions. It has produced an ugly, resentful worldview among today’s youth.

Young people are convinced that capitalism has caused all the social ills of our world: greed, inequality, poverty, violence, and oppression. While young people may be correctly attuned to what’s wrong with the world, they are unable to see what’s right.
* They have no clue that free trade and entrepreneurship have raised the world from the depths of poverty and into abundance.
* They have no clue that the worst oppression results from overzealous and overpowered governments.
* They have no clue that minority rights and social acceptance are the result of a legal and philosophical system premised on individualism, tolerance, and mutual respect, and not collectivism.

Yet, the indoctrination won’t cease until someone presents them with a different worldview.

It takes education — _the right kind_ – to win the hearts and minds of the next generation.

**That’s why the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) exists!**

FEE is inspiring, educating, and connecting future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society: individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.

Every day, FEE reaches thousands of youth through our online content and in-person transformative programming that tells the _real_ story of freedom, personal responsibility, and free markets.

[Will you help FEE fight indoctrination and educate the rising generation? Click here to donate today >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0vosvtj4naihj47r8dsbllei52gc698tpb25dm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s9j62or2clh2bs)

The truth is that the battle against socialism won't be won in Washington.

It’ll be won in classrooms, in conversations, and in the minds of young people.

clean_body: Even though some may think Trump has solved a lot of issues while in office, there’s one battle no president can fight alone | | | Friend, Even though some may think Trump has solved a lot of issues while in office, there’s one battle no president can fight alone: the war against socialism. Socialist indoctrination is pervasive in our schools, media, and social interactions. It has produced an ugly, resentful worldview among today’s youth. Young people are convinced that capitalism has caused all the social ills of our world: greed, inequality, poverty, violence, and oppression. While young people may be correctly attuned to what’s wrong with the world, they are unable to see what’s right. They have no clue that free trade and entrepreneurship have raised the world from the depths of poverty and into abundance. They have no clue that the worst oppression results from overzealous and overpowered governments. They have no clue that minority rights and social acceptance are the result of a legal and philosophical system premised on individualism, tolerance, and mutual respect, and not collectivism. Yet, the indoctrination won’t cease until someone presents them with a different worldview. It takes education — the right kind – to win the hearts and minds of the next generation. That’s why the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) exists! FEE is inspiring, educating, and connecting future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society: individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government. Every day, FEE reaches thousands of youth through our online content and in-person transformative programming that tells the real story of freedom, personal responsibility, and free markets. The truth is that the battle against socialism won't be won in Washington. It’ll be won in classrooms, in conversations, and in the minds of young people. That’s why FEE is introducing young minds to the ideas of great thinkers like Hayek and Bastiat. We are giving them the intellectual tools to challenge collectivism. And we are showing them how liberty, not government control, is the key to a prosperous future. For many students, FEE is their first encounter with the fundamental principles of freedom. But we can’t do it without your help. Your tax-deductible gift directly funds our efforts to reach more students, create more life-changing content, and scale our programs to meet the growing demand for truth.** In liberty, Lawrence W. subject: FLIP OPPORTUNITY
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
In 2024, Wisconsin state Democrats gained over a dozen state legislative seats, and this year, they protected the state Supreme Court against a right-wing takeover. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Last November, Wisconsin was the closest battleground state – Trump won by just a single point, but down-ballot, state Democrats made HUGE strides. Wisconsin state Democrats gained over a dozen state legislative seats, and this year, they protected the state Supreme Court against a right-wing takeover and defied Elon Musk’s $23 million political gamble. In 2026, Wisconsin will be center-stage once again, with ultra-competitive races up and down the ballot. **Democrats have a real opportunity to flip the WI Assembly AND Senate for the first time in _over a decade_.** [ The DLCC is laying the groundwork to FLIP the Wisconsin Senate AND Assembly next November. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.dwspac.com/p/bg-w4eO8DEWuKhf2unAuQg2?unsubscribedata=YzSAorV8T7f8NJ9gkSJl6MniC4JP0Z4eX6gf8Fe8wBbOMEkxYZihkLtPcqwj9A7ZzHVExuVWJsUJFzzLtvN%2FGv1gbizazeVKX%2Bjc72eStL12HZ6ewxtow7IYyF5IlqJ5upzpUxnkbB%2FQFwLZkV2sQL2iCTs9IbR5rdq6MlGn6UuPGYmNsnwZAwuB%2FrmnFpN%2FK4jN8eDiHohpiJYDXXsPH8iT3CQ63YbYTQZWVA6Vbd6nZg0oaDTOTxPGpT6%2BbUXUDvRTim5BtNznCJXzIqoPhQVBvm6%2FyXCKJpxlKCR94SkVYVXey%2FHDlXaBXKjtpbuotuvirw1YfjeAAbVWoiVSrLRvmBmHEFvtCxR6ipCNu2DB05YdyeZqJYqBr%2Fzu0iHnu7OxOyCEolCcYgXprc1G92xWVc5DO2eRgFhFWsOhXdE%3D).
---
| Peter,

June marks the beginning of Pride Month — a time to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community, reflect on the progress we’ve made, and recommit ourselves to the fight for full equality.

As we celebrate, we must recognize a hard truth: LGBTQ+ rights are under attack in states across the country and on a federal level. Extremist politicians and this anti-equality administration are working overtime to pass laws that strip away protections, silence voices, and target some of the most vulnerable among us.

This is not what equality looks like, Peter.

That’s why this Pride Month — and every month — Democrats Win Seats is renewing our commitment to electing pro-equality Democrats. Leaders who will stand up for the LGBTQ+ community, protect our rights, and ensure every American can live freely without fear or discrimination.

Thanks for joining us in the fight to elect the pro-equality leaders our communities deserve in Congress.

— Democrats Win Seats PAC

---

name: Dan Goldman
subject: This is how authoritarians talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, There’s no way around it: Donald Trump doesn’t think the law applies to him — and that’s exactly what makes him so dangerous. In the past few weeks, Trump has said out loud what he’s long believed: because he’s the president, he doesn’t have to follow the Constitution. That he doesn’t have to honor due process. That simply winning an election gives him the right to do whatever he wants and ignore the law. _**It doesn’t.**_ I served as lead counsel in Trump’s first impeachment. I’ve spent years investigating, prosecuting, and exposing abuses of power. And I can tell you without hesitation: the Constitution is not optional. Due process is not a right of convenience. **These are the basic principles of our democracy, and they do not disappear just because they interfere with Trump’s authoritarian desires.** From the moment he took office in 2017, and every day since, Donald Trump has tried to bend the justice system to serve his personal and political interests. He’s now going even further, attacking the _very idea_ that the courts can hold him accountable. That’s not leadership. That’s _authoritarianism_. Like I said on _Meet the Press_ , when Trump shrugs off his constitutional responsibilities and punts them to his lawyers, he’s not just being cowardly — he’s undermining the presidency. The president doesn’t get to pick and choose which laws to follow. And no amount of political support should shield him from accountability. **That’s why I’m determined to protect our democracy and ensure that Trump can’t get away with this kind of constitutional vandalism. But I can’t do this alone. [Can you pitch in to fuel the fight against Trump’s attacks on the rule of law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109096599/549988662/916437137?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjY5ZjE4MS1lNTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzYPGT8aF9QtsXufJdwUfb9S2oeO__xs8V8fOQBttcw=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109096600/549988663/916437137?amount=&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjY5ZjE4MS1lNTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzYPGT8aF9QtsXufJdwUfb9S2oeO__xs8V8fOQBttcw=)
---
The truth is, Trump is attacking our most sacred institutions, and he’s counting on public apathy. He wants people to get overwhelmed, tune out, and give up the fight against him.
**We can’t let that happen.**
If you believe in the rule of law...
If you believe that due process applies to everyone...
If you believe the Constitution is still worth fighting for...
**[Then I hope you’ll stand with me and chip in to support the work I’m doing in Congress to stop Trump’s most dangerous instincts _before_ they become policy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109096601/549988664/916437137?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjY5ZjE4MS1lNTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzYPGT8aF9QtsXufJdwUfb9S2oeO__xs8V8fOQBttcw=)**

name: Team Eric Sorensen
subject: Eric needs your endorsement:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109097032/549989962/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDJhMWFhNi1lNjQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPwKW-whIVqz8efkMmYf__A9I71vAfrGpadayQNKcLU=)
Peter, It’s not a stretch to say that what happens in this district will have a major hand in the direction of Congress – and our country – for years to come. As early as it might seem, our race for IL-17 is the most competitive in the state, and outside dark money donations and Republican attacks have already started. That’s why we have to start building our grassroots team _now._ **[_To keep our momentum going into the summer, we set a goal of locking in 1,500 new grassroots endorsements today. Will you add your name to say you personally endorse Eric Sorensen’s re-election for Congress?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109097034/549989966/-1008466785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDJhMWFhNi1lNjQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPwKW-whIVqz8efkMmYf__A9I71vAfrGpadayQNKcLU=&emci=7056c46a-e642-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d42a1aa6-e642-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109097036/549989969/-1008466785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDJhMWFhNi1lNjQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPwKW-whIVqz8efkMmYf__A9I71vAfrGpadayQNKcLU=&emci=7056c46a-e642-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d42a1aa6-e642-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858) Unlike most members of Congress, Eric is NOT a career politician. He’s a meteorologist who spent two decades serving his home community, and only wants to focus on what will get them the care they deserve. name: Bryan
subject: US DOJ Accuses WEC of Fraud
body:
This Week, the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) accused the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) of violating federal election law by

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | _In case you missed it..._
---
| | | | | This week, the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) [**accused**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=50addb524f&e=e907534017)**** the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) of violating federal election law for lacking a complaint process required under the [**Help America Vote Act**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=63ae121baf&e=e907534017)(HAVA). HAVA was passed in 2002 in response to election issues, and requires a state-based complaints process to review voter concerns.
---
[|
---](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ec20dbb883&e=e907534017)
| Because of WEC’s alleged inaction, the state of Wisconsin may be at risk of [**losing millions in federal funding**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=553b1fba48&e=e907534017).
---
| _**I believe that it should be easy to vote and hard to cheat, and that everyone should follow the law.** _
_**Do you agree?**_
---
| [<<< TAKE OUR ELECTION INTEGRITY POLL >>>](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8ff8e4e248&e=e907534017)
---
| That’s why I am leading election integrity efforts in Congress including passing the [**SAVE Act**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8691dfbab2&e=e907534017) and investigating potential fraud at [**ActBlue**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f593e39d8a&e=e907534017).
But I can’t do it alone.
---
| [_**Can I count on your support by donating $5, $10, or $25 today?**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=893255986c&e=e907534017)
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=27d9aae7b4&e=e907534017)
---
| With your help, we can ensure that our elections are secure in Wisconsin.
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=e907534017&u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=a9cf6c532c)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=a9cf6c532c) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=a9cf6c532c)
---
|

Let me explain: I’m not a career politician. I’ve spent my career fighting for working families – from leading the effort to raise Illinois’ minimum wage to $15, to expanding broadband access in Illinois’ most rural areas.

I ran for Congress to bring that fight to Washington. **Despite the odds, I defeated a self-funded opponent and flipped this seat – becoming the first woman to ever represent IL-13 in Congress.**

Now I’m running for re-election for the second time, and I’m not taking anything for granted. The stakes are higher than ever before: Republicans are hell-bent on gutting programs like Medicaid, SNAP, and more – ripping lifeboats away from working families to give billionaires a tax break.

**[That’s why instead of asking you to chip in your hard‐earned money today, I’m only asking for a few seconds of your time and your signature. Can I count on your support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109097655/549991984/-1456375807?refcode=em-6.6.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRkODFlYi1lNjQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egj3vRcqrPxSLWuqynCjlezVkAnTljsY_r_vMx4U2wU=&emci=ea010ded-5742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=014d81eb-e642-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13891387)**

name: Becca Balint
subject: Blunt

Peter, I'm going to be blunt — Republicans are lying to you about their budget. They claim that their budget won't take away health care from anyone. Last weekend, Speaker Mike Johnson said 4.8 million Americans will only lose their Medicaid benefits if they "choose to do so." It’s a straight-up lie. They can dance around this however they want — but the truth is that the GOP budget contains the **largest cut to Medicaid in HISTORY. ** These Medicaid cuts aren’t just [_extremely unpopular_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109097803/549992388/-1469976548?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDRjODFlYi1lNjQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zg59oy_FFG2Tu8szZ1jjLMiwjxV2xHPw2Ban9VlzXS4=&emci=c548503e-1042-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ed4c81eb-e642-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272), they’re [_potentially life-threatening_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109097805/549992391/-454420328?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDRjODFlYi1lNjQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zg59oy_FFG2Tu8szZ1jjLMiwjxV2xHPw2Ban9VlzXS4=&emci=c548503e-1042-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ed4c81eb-e642-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272) for millions of Americans. name: Andrea
subject: The Wins and the Work Ahead
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7784de0f9220/the-wins-and-the-work-ahead?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
# THE WINS AND THE WORK AHEAD
Friends,

**Indianapolis is a special place. And, our community deserves leadership that reflects its strength, integrity, and heart. That's why I'm committed to continuing this work.**

During the 2025 legislative session, I collaborated with my colleagues to author and co-author several pieces of legislation, including bills to strengthen water utility regulations, protect DNA data privacy, and expand film and media tax credits. I also sponsored legislation to lower healthcare costs by eliminating barriers like prior authorization and unfair copay rules.

**These wins weren't just mine- they were ours. Every bill I championed this session was shaped by conversations with you. **You have been engaged, showing up to town halls, calling and writing in. I am grateful for your partnership.

_See the legislation I worked on[here.](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=ee973e9772&e=d9ebccf591)_

As Assistant Leader of the Senate Democratic Caucus, I helped drive our strategy to support working Hoosiers. We fought for affordable housing, lowered healthcare costs, and strong public education. While we have made progress, there is still more work to do.

I will continue fighting for the values we share. And I am committed to community-centered leadership.

In partnership,
Andrea

name: Team NDRC
subject: Proof-of-citizenship laws have consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Chip in to help stop the attacks on voting rights
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109100020/549999182/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhODc0ZTUwLWU4NDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PNzgOhyJdOhyhqveTGlhAKJIdrDxa3e58bhqdOjHIGU=&emci=f0789925-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=da874e50-e842-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, There is a full-blown voting rights emergency happening in our country right now. The SAVE Act — passed by the House and now being considered in the Senate — would throw up major obstacles to voting by enacting strict new voter identification requirements. Millions of young people, people of color, and married women could end up disenfranchised. Republicans are pushing similar measures in state legislatures nationwide. **Make no mistake — they are working every day to make it harder for people to vote.[If you want to fight back right now, chip in to fuel our efforts to defeat their attacks on voting rights and work to strengthen our democracy through fair representation.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109100021/549999185/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Citizenship_email_20250606-NDRC-Tier1-Citizenship_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250606-NDRC-Tier1-Citizenship_&utm_campaign=Citizenship&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhODc0ZTUwLWU4NDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PNzgOhyJdOhyhqveTGlhAKJIdrDxa3e58bhqdOjHIGU=)** We’ve seen this exact sort of thing play out before, and the results are undeniable: strict citizenship requirements make it harder for eligible voters to vote.
1. **In Kansas, the state legislature passed a proof-of-citizenship law in 2011,** which ended up blocking the voter registrations of more than 31,000 U.S. citizens who were otherwise eligible to vote — including 12% of all people seeking to register in Kansas for the first time. The law was ultimately struck down by federal courts.

2. **In New Hampshire, a new Republican-backed voting law ended the opportunity for voters to sign an affidavit at the polling place** if they didn’t have sufficient identification. Now, all new voters must bring proof of citizenship — including a birth certificate, passport or naturalization papers — to the polling place. During last year’s election, voters were sent home to track down passports and birth certificates — including women whose last names had changed due to marriage or divorce.

3. **In Arizona, proof of U.S. citizenship — such as a birth certificate, passport, or other approved document — is required when first registering to vote.** But this rule only applies to state elections, so there is a large group of “federal-only” voters who haven’t met the state’s registration requirements but can still vote in national elections. Analysis of this segment of voters shows that those who are unable to participate in state elections tend to be younger, nonwhite, and in lower-income neighborhoods. They are also concentrated near college campuses and on tribal lands.

This is what’s coming if we allow Republicans to continue to push stricter voting requirements through Congress and state legislatures. Along with extreme gerrymandering, it’s all part of a larger playbook of undermining fair representation to create an artificial political advantage — and together, we’re going to stop it. clean_body: Chip in to help stop the attacks on voting rights | Peter, There is a full-blown voting rights emergency happening in our country right now. The SAVE Act — passed by the House and now being considered in the Senate — would throw up major obstacles to voting by enacting strict new voter identification requirements. Millions of young people, people of color, and married women could end up disenfranchised. Republicans are pushing similar measures in state legislatures nationwide. Make no mistake — they are working every day to make it harder for people to vote.= We’ve seen this exact sort of thing play out before, and the results are undeniable: strict citizenship requirements make it harder for eligible voters to vote. 1. In Kansas, the state legislature passed a proof-of-citizenship law in 2011, which ended up blocking the voter registrations of more than 31,000 U.S. citizens who were otherwise eligible to vote — including 12% of all people seeking to register in Kansas for the first time. The law was ultimately struck down by federal courts. 2. In New Hampshire, a new Republican-backed voting law ended the opportunity for voters to sign an affidavit at the polling place if they didn’t have sufficient identification. Now, all new voters must bring proof of citizenship — including a birth certificate, passport or naturalization papers — to the polling place. During last year’s election, voters were sent home to track down passports and birth certificates — including women whose last names had changed due to marriage or divorce. 3. In Arizona, proof of U.S. citizenship — such as a birth certificate, passport, or other approved document — is required when first registering to vote. But this rule only applies to state elections, so there is a large group of “federal-only” voters who haven’t met the state’s registration requirements but can still vote in national elections. Analysis of this segment of voters shows that those who are unable to participate in state elections tend to be younger, nonwhite, and in lower-income neighborhoods. They are also concentrated near college campuses and on tribal lands. This is what’s coming if we allow Republicans to continue to push stricter voting requirements through Congress and state legislatures. Along with extreme gerrymandering, it’s all part of a larger playbook of undermining fair representation to create an artificial political advantage — and together, we’re going to stop it. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Stay tuned — we’ll keep you updated on the latest. Dear Peter, Across the country, school boards have quietly adopted radical agendas—from pushing sexually explicit books in public school libraries to allowing students to leave campus for abortions without parental knowledge. That’s why this spring, Pastor John Amanchukwu is visiting America's Wokest School Boards to expose and confront these dangerous policies head-on. In Glen Falls, New York, Pastor John spoke to the school board about students’ access to books like “Gender Queer.” As he read graphic excerpts aloud, board members demanded he stop—proving Pastor John’s point when they called it “inappropriate.”

Strong Church Podcast Recap On a recent episode of the _Strong Church Podcast_ , Lola Sheen, daughter of actor Charlie Sheen, opened up about her journey from anxiety and depression to coming to faith in Jesus. **Monthly Inspiration**
---
Psalm 85:10-11 (NKJV) _Mercy and truth have met together; righteousness and peace have kissed. Truth shall spring out of the earth, and righteousness shall look down from heaven. _ Psalm 85 offers a powerful reflection on God’s mercy, justice, and faithfulness. Charles Spurgeon describes it as a prayer of a patriot for his afflicted nation—acknowledging God’s past deliverance while seeking renewed restoration. The psalmist recalls God’s favor, forgiveness, and mercy, building confidence to pray expectantly in the present. The Psalm moves from gratitude to petition and confident hope: God’s mercy is celebrated (vv. 1–3), a plea for revival follows (vv. 4–7), and faith in God’s promise of peace and righteousness concludes the prayer (vv. 8–13). The rich imagery in verse 10— _“Mercy and truth have met together; righteousness and peace have kissed”_ —points to reconciliation found in Christ. Justice and mercy unite through Him. Truth springs from the earth, righteousness looks down from heaven, and humanity’s restoration unfolds. Just as God sends His righteousness, His people must respond in faithfulness. **Application** : This passage serves as a reminder to:
1. **Practice a lifestyle of gratitude**. Reflect on how God has been faithful in your past.
2. **Develop a rhythm of prayer**. Seek Him for personal and communal restoration.
3. **Expect God to respond**. Trust that He will bring peace and righteousness to those who call on Him.

Download the graphic below, set it as your wallpaper, and take time throughout the month to memorize and meditate on this verse. Reflect on its meaning and how it can transform your life.

Together, they called out the board’s dangerous overreach: students leaving class for secret abortions, genderless bathrooms, and explicit reading materials—all without parental consent. name: Jason Miyares
subject: Jay Jones wants your tax dollars to fund illegal immigration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
No wonder he’s the darling of the far-left, open-borders lobby.| | | Friend, Jay Jones just doesn’t get it.

As a Delegate, Jones voted to _give illegal immigrants**taxpayer-funded welfare,** protect them from deportation, and **stop our police** from cooperating with ICE._

That’s not just dangerous — **it’s disqualifying.**

Jones backed sanctuary cities that protect violent gangs like MS-13 and Tren de Aragua. He voted to let illegal immigrants pay in-state tuition, even as Virginia families struggled to afford college. He even tried to block local jails from reporting criminal aliens to ICE.

**It’s no wonder he’s the darling of the far-left fringe and the open-borders lobby...**

$6.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109100251/550000104/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,500&amount=6&refcode=jtk1959-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjEwYWQwMi1lOTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YKdilFb_Pq5CORvL52_byXvyRsklCAGZpabrxQtga8g=) – but first, I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became the first Black woman elected as New York's attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And over the last few months, attorneys general and I around the country have been fighting back against the Trump administration, and we've been WINNING! From stopping Elon from accessing our private data to restoring critical funds for health care, we are going toe to toe with this administration and the far-right lawmakers pushing their agenda.
I have made it clear that New York will not back down from protecting our fundamental freedoms and our very democracy.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. But, thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand Trump and his allies' attacks so far – but I _must_ __ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $6 today, on June 6, to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109100252/550000105/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,500&amount=6&refcode=jtk1959-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjEwYWQwMi1lOTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YKdilFb_Pq5CORvL52_byXvyRsklCAGZpabrxQtga8g=)**

**ARIZONA = FIRST "FREEDOM CAUCUS" STATE?** When we started the Network a little over three years ago, we quickly realized that creating a liberty-loving "Freedom Caucus" State is a 3-step process:1\. **Help start and support state freedom caucuses.** We've done this in 13 states so far and the plan is to get into all 50 states. 2\. **Help state freedom caucuses take over the legislature.** The Wyoming Freedom Caucus was the first in the nation to go from just 8 state house members to now controlling the WY State House. 3\. **Getting a state to have a "Freedom Caucus" governor and a State Freedom Caucus.** The pinnacle of success, the state of pure liberty nirvana, is to have both of these. We have a strong **Arizona Freedom Caucus** and HFC member, Congressman Andy Biggs, who is currently the Republican frontrunner in that state's 2026 gubernatorial race. We have an opportunity to take a purple state and turn it brick red if we can get Biggs and AZFC working together starting in 2027. Our friends at Turning Point just released a new TV ad highlighting the success that could come with a Governor Biggs at the helm. [Watch it here](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjoIvpag6gfs87Gm10ykfcgNxawlXqDhynhuq3SpYx43vsEBSAhSpG4oRZs8id28rmQ-3D-3D992A_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerYtjFVIwuXimJAte1JV-2FQLz5hZmhaVYhiDdgfGrAcTADHxmRb6tFlnrP2R7zch1PfGVCxwTG-2BePRW4YtysV2lS-2BL6tBqzlAjp-2FMKARuqOKaZAFXLfcIjqX4kLVlUrJdbnQTHXy2B5Av4NRNTnMknFVYOZLf9XuxrB2shXkRcbICIG3d-2BSKkY5WYL6tBZKEyx4yz3MV1LumAPfcx-2FmtCsHfxVzGY47c82uFf5GSRwHbcQ-3D). When we started the Network a little over three years ago, we quickly realized that creating a liberty-loving "Freedom Caucus" State is a 3-step process:1\. Help start and support state freedom caucuses. We've done this in 13 states so far and the plan is to get into all 50 states. 2\. Help state freedom caucuses take over the legislature. The Wyoming Freedom Caucus was the first in the nation to go from just 8 state house members to now controlling the WY State House. 3\. Getting a state to have a "Freedom Caucus" governor and a State Freedom Caucus. The pinnacle of success, the state of pure liberty nirvana, is to have both of these. We have a strong Arizona Freedom Caucus and HFC member, Congressman Andy Biggs, who is currently the Republican frontrunner in that state's 2026 gubernatorial race. We have an opportunity to take a purple state and turn it brick red if we can get Biggs and AZFC working together starting in 2027. Our friends at Turning Point just released a new TV ad highlighting the success that could come with a Governor Biggs at the helm. . clean_body: Every poll released for our fight to defend the Republican Senate Majority tells the same story— The battle for the Senate Majority is a toss-up! | h Fellow American, Every poll released for our fight to defend the Republican Senate Majority tells the same story— The battle for the Senate Majority is a toss-up! The minute we retook the Senate Majority from Chuck Schumer, Democrats across the country didn’t waste any time organizing and tapping into their networks of elite megadonors in California and New York. I already have an opponent here in Montana, and they’re not waiting around to rally their radical base against me. I’ll be blunt Fellow American: We can’t win this race without your help. h For America, h Steve Daines h Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. h Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

| | Peter, I've always promised to shoot straight with you. When our Party is winning, I'll be the first to tell you it's well deserved. But when we're _LOSING_ , I'm not going to sugarcoat it. And right now, federal reports just dropped that show the Democrats are badly BEATING us in one specific area. Frankly, this has never happened in recent history... **_The Democrats - the party of out-of-touch Hollywood elites, mega-donors like George Soros, and liberal special interests - are OUTRAISING us among grassroots donors!_** Look, I understand it's easy to feel the fight is over after our resounding victory last November. I wish that were so, Peter. But the truth is, this fight is far from over, and the Democrats have only doubled down. _We simply can 't afford to have YOU on the sidelines._ The Left has used lawfare and judicial activism to stall President Trump's agenda at every turn. _And their final plot?**IMPEACH AND CONVICT.**_ Make no mistake, the Democrats will use their newly acquired war chest to FLIP the President's congressional majorities. clean_body: I wish I didn’t have to tell you this, but I think you need to hear it all the same. | | | | | Peter, I've always promised to shoot straight with you. When our Party is winning, I'll be the first to tell you it's well deserved. But when we're LOSING , I'm not going to sugarcoat it. And right now, federal reports just dropped that show the Democrats are badly BEATING us in one specific area. Frankly, this has never happened in recent history... The Democrats - the party of out-of-touch Hollywood elites, mega-donors like George Soros, and liberal special interests - are OUTRAISING us among grassroots donors! Look, I understand it's easy to feel the fight is over after our resounding victory last November. I wish that were so, Peter. But the truth is, this fight is far from over, and the Democrats have only doubled down. We simply can 't afford to have YOU on the sidelines. The Left has used lawfare and judicial activism to stall President Trump's agenda at every turn. And their final plot?IMPEACH AND CONVICT. Make no mistake, the Democrats will use their newly acquired war chest to FLIP the President's congressional majorities. And at that point, there will be NOTHING left to stop them from their one and only goal: unjustly removing our President from office. But to fend off their attacks and multi-million dollar warchest, we're counting on YOU to join the fight. Remember, it 's never about the amount you give, but the sheer number of grassroots patriots standing with us. Together, thousands of grassroots donors like YOU can successfully FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' latest plot. Thank you, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | | id: 2024-08-16-13:12:08:136t |

name: Michelle Tremillo, Texas Organizing Project
subject: Thank you for sixteen unforgettable years at TOP
body:
https://organizetexas.org/ [https://organizetexas.org/]
Dear friends,
After almost sixteen unforgettable years with the Texas Organizing Project (TOP), I will be transitioning out of my role as Co-Executive Director by the end of the year.
I would not call this goodbye. It’s a moment of deep reflection, gratitude, and re-commitment to the mission that has guided me for nearly two decades: building Black and Latino power in Texas so that working-class people shape the policies that govern our lives.
When I co-founded TOP, we were a scrappy group of organizers, with no money in our bank account, fueled by a deep vision of transforming Texas. We’ve since grown into one of the largest independent grassroots organizations in the state, grounded in regeneration, solidarity, and the visionary brilliance of our people. Together, we’ve taken on injustice and won – over and over again.
We’ve pushed for enhanced library cards to be recognized as valid IDs in cities like San Antonio, Dallas, and Houston, unlocking access to public services for more than 10 million Texans. When developers and city policies threaten to displace families, we organize with residents to hold the line and protect their homes. Across the state, we’ve secured tens of millions of dollars for disaster recovery, home repair, and rent relief because housing is a human right. We also built the largest Black and in-person Latino voter engagement programs in Texas, reaching over five million voters and helping elect dozens of progressive champions, from district attorneys to mayors to members of Congress.
Following the landmark victory of coalition partners to win paid sick leave in Austin, we formed local coalitions with labor and community groups in San Antonio and Dallas, making history together by becoming the first cities in the South to win paid sick leave policies. Our paid sick leave ordinances may have been thwarted by the courts in Texas, but out of the organizing fight to win them, Texas for All was born. Texas for All is the c3 and c4 progressive alignment table that is dedicated to achieving a multi-racial democracy where all Texans have the freedom to reach their full potential.
None of these victories happened in isolation. They were won through the unshakable belief that ordinary people, organized and united, can take on power and win. These wins, of course, belong to all of us.
As my time here comes to an end, TOP is poised for its next chapter. This transition is a deliberate act of shared power and sustainability. In the coming weeks, our Board of Directors will share more about what’s ahead. What I can tell you is that our leadership team is brilliant, strategic, and deeply grounded in the values we’ve built together.
Working with the people at TOP, including our staff, members, boards, and supporters, has been one of the greatest privileges of my life. I’ve grown not only as a community organizer but also as a human being. Back in 2009, I never could have imagined the ways this work would stretch me, challenge me, and shape me. I am forever changed and forever grateful.
Our fight is far from over. I’ll be cheering TOP on every step of the way and will always be rooted in this movement. Thank you for believing in this work and in us.
Sincerely,
Michelle Tremillo
Outgoing Co-Executive Director
Texas Organizing Project

San Antonio, TX 78207

# [Loyalty oaths to Trump for federal workers? And the military? HELL NO!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2dd3ef69-061e-483b-a3b0-e9f03832808f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Wannabe dictator Donald Trump is taking a page out of the authoritarian playbook, and [demanding loyalty oaths to HIM for new civil service workers.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0297dac-f3f5-48ba-88dd-a040b99cbf1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Worse yet, there are rumors swirling that this will be expanded to include military officers in the near future. There is no way in hell we should accept this. America is not a dictatorship, and Trump is not a dictator. [**Sign on now, and demand that Trump DROP the loyalty oaths IMMEDIATELY.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T134a8b8b-6d66-4c3a-837c-77e4f4c6a966/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Peter, federal cuts are threatening our climate…
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101089/550002652/237157197?contactdata=h1oQ5zM0pgH5uFDvCxAFNMIthVb/W8RQY1cVn6sZjdlIllJPknQAvkVGmC+O/gi43dsW8Wiidx0q5U2UmRhN+yUOOq9u+Z+hXjWEvfEOrVyb5tpGG+2bVUhQihxdIQ9S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5N2EyNDE4LWViNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dsPoe0HTjzVo9OWB5arg_knOUYU_Oi4TcI-4F4jC620=&emci=df88c6a0-5742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=997a2418-eb42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, If you haven’t already heard the news, the U.S. House recently passed the Reconciliation bill, which is full of cuts to vital community and environmental programs, such as Medicaid, SNAP, and the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) climate investments. [**Can you take a moment to take action against these threatening federal cuts?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101090/550002653/237157197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5N2EyNDE4LWViNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dsPoe0HTjzVo9OWB5arg_knOUYU_Oi4TcI-4F4jC620=&emci=df88c6a0-5742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=997a2418-eb42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Take action** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101091/550002654/237157197?contactdata=h1oQ5zM0pgH5uFDvCxAFNMIthVb/W8RQY1cVn6sZjdlIllJPknQAvkVGmC+O/gi43dsW8Wiidx0q5U2UmRhN+yUOOq9u+Z+hXjWEvfEOrVyb5tpGG+2bVUhQihxdIQ9S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5N2EyNDE4LWViNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dsPoe0HTjzVo9OWB5arg_knOUYU_Oi4TcI-4F4jC620=&emci=df88c6a0-5742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=997a2418-eb42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)
---
Ultimately, this bill is a total repeal of clean energy investments. Cuts to the IRA, the largest federal investment in climate action, would gut America’s clean energy production, raise energy costs for families across the nation, and eliminate thousands of jobs. Our communities and environment can’t afford to lose IRA funding promised to them.
On top of this, cuts to lifesaving programs like Medicaid and SNAP would be detrimental to our communities. The federal government should work for us, not against us. We need to do everything in our power to stop the Reconciliation bill.
[**Please take action against these cuts by thanking our U.S. Senators for all that they’ve done to protect our climate and urge them to do everything in their power to remove the horrible climate cuts in the Reconciliation bill!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101093/550002656/237157197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5N2EyNDE4LWViNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dsPoe0HTjzVo9OWB5arg_knOUYU_Oi4TcI-4F4jC620=&emci=df88c6a0-5742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=997a2418-eb42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Take action** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101094/550002657/237157197?contactdata=h1oQ5zM0pgH5uFDvCxAFNMIthVb/W8RQY1cVn6sZjdlIllJPknQAvkVGmC+O/gi43dsW8Wiidx0q5U2UmRhN+yUOOq9u+Z+hXjWEvfEOrVyb5tpGG+2bVUhQihxdIQ9S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5N2EyNDE4LWViNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dsPoe0HTjzVo9OWB5arg_knOUYU_Oi4TcI-4F4jC620=&emci=df88c6a0-5742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=997a2418-eb42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2107230)

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, If you haven’t already heard the news, the U.S. House recently passed the Reconciliation bill, which is full of cuts to vital community and environmental programs, such as Medicaid, SNAP, and the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) climate investments. Ultimately, this bill is a total repeal of clean energy investments. Cuts to the IRA, the largest federal investment in climate action, would gut America’s clean energy production, raise energy costs for families across the nation, and eliminate thousands of jobs. Our communities and environment can’t afford to lose IRA funding promised to them. On top of this, cuts to lifesaving programs like Medicaid and SNAP would be detrimental to our communities. The federal government should work for us, not against us. We need to do everything in our power to stop the Reconciliation bill. Sincerely, Britney VanCitters (she/her) OLCV Political & Organizing Director | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Tim Walz calls ICE agents the Gestapo

body:
I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the U.S. Senate, and I believe in immigration enforcement and the deportation of criminal illegal aliens. That does not make me a Nazi. | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYCfOC4LOfYDfiOg79FA2AYEmj_qVaWCpQzS2KbOi3n30mH_HWLyjA_o71hy2T1u8zSwoRtoFxhQH6dor33sEAorl0U8XgAL_gWa7wl6vHcssXqHl-bN2ZMOS243G8ZmNQjY4dWi3RbgYJWmpcBpmhVoMfGZA33sogZmlpsCnSzgU%3D)

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYCsupmxKEGcsAqx8YqyMB6ILU49cCshPY5cP3pSmfWKCfTPPRO2N3IleVy61YDd1WwdrrgP0W67t5aJts7rictc_zGWRqIecD7iE3PHDCk8Jbvv2fYC7gHmOlJOgA1Dmk40_tPUwAFSN2xz2ccWlDfTnRaPQP84Wez57fpfLIf_o%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself.

I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork.

After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. **On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards.**

In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a **Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command.** Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions.

Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate.

**The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous.**

I'm running against **Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor** , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit _**against**_ the Minneapolis Police Department.

Governor Walz wants America to believe **Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo.** His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.”

So ask yourself: _**If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda?**_

**Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis.**

Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots.

But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.**It's common sense**. It's about **protecting Americans**.

Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then **[I’m asking you to pitch in $1, $5, or even $15 today.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYH8P4fciRCMifWkcUE_9PN_rpF7RQfgKYz2CYWX4YMzQ3Hxg3W2yik3bLgPgrd7_LmUY5xG5pCByVkRoPr09oiP3RsDATu2T6dZpxSALD-GCxDQC0xiwPVsFlNDvgB77kMStVlWPQ9rVo3PYzBadvvuWE2Zz5rZmS_5g8tcnonaI%3D)**

[**SEND ADAM TO THE SENATE**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYvUKa9lY33jCteQMI0Tu27ojddVY8ZmilTTSxDbR5vnz9ubxOA7yEeAKRenVJLsPmk4q0kxFBc4rV0wZ4Lcr71c3ux0yNaH1MWa1R4WaWD2IV-29NdXZEgbb2Ng8rMWgOB-1XhERoJwcHQ4EDSeeeQQzaPqgw33xd2ZEoayvD3w8%3D) **_
_**

**Here's What I Believe:** I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens.

I believe in a **strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law** —no exceptions, no apologies.

I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities.

**I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point.**

Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it.

While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault.

Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either.

Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: **[Could you donate $10, $25, or even $50 to help me launch this campaign the right way?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYAqIi__TqK0uQqsHEDkBknVFORpdFWGQTvPgXpkm5w4B9GRCqzE02zvVi5kgT0pVG3CLgIswuPFt_I7oDXPfGWK7eK6UzWf5Q8q8euT1hkRH2TMbH6RY7Gt6bhAVXhXdSXg12KRF38P80cfB6Pv4_UVy-Fe7vqa4w3sun_d_t3fQ%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYs4otmlsoFTLhQhQi1qg95DU-Vq67qPPjnDCEM8w2rIFq6BewkddSBt1Ct1td-0hj4ndQ8kuJWWH3qFhisFF4r4EBTlD4yLHT5DjLg9iDY9zd4HJOTzeDfXXsYYGUd5I_gHgu-Nqj0b_xSCJGb4UNAt5rBfwYAtW0trvguVSIVnI%3D)
Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet.

With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative.

**I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp.**

What I have is grit, **a record of service** , and hopefully, the support of **patriots like you** who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on...

And if you believe we deserve **leaders who've fought for this country—** Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYwKqOPdx-t6t4ZKqDvW-ldzTFAb4V47RaMyKWB8pNyzQreH3LwmeTG7nzo-6W_H-EKE0EettanVmyPePMPXhHHGseKf9u6ovkVcZNttpyMd6u2hctEHuK0UobLXf-lS5NTU4M6OgrwnNBLlIJ_eAalAjdPY9IKaE2eN85bLlnnao%3D)
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=6e8671540a1246edbf4d9f2773c783f0&_e=u4UXAeIrb_SbSyLi4kDAZ5moAxic3wUHaoW6FWxWJ2ahHTgFeIf38wT2_htOONblZTCnTuvy2z1DFfg4YnfYGxAziu4XBwv4YOgmEz8O8O3CujIe0hHLwsiKdTOz8ihqZIVs8ayH6aWMG1BECkEZ2JW-1LCIS48kCHB_4F9PUZJ_0Q7PgLUPmgEVjinxEwxiOqJbu-t1qz0XSkYN_BQm1STawDR9NhEjWPqc5caIPKhyMEtdqgDYVPOEj21_spHYknmDnpF99KHgjjKtQQsgWxi4HDsEaTXyC4s1CcfNLcldQwDxsOB9V4FAnzpowe0Eu16jpxhmxnlY7cSfFAaiXrlde6zeA8N0XBGpYe6GUiteoqVl_glmlaRB2RNnogCRh5BhW2lkAnRuKZMLRFxzRCrCuAN2x-hJ5Pvnm1eJDNQ%3D)

Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

That does not make me a Nazi. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and if this is your first time hearing from me, let me introduce myself. I was born in St. Paul, Minnesota, in 1983 and adopted by Joel and Deb Schwarze when I was six months old. I grew up in Bloomington, where hockey was more than a pastime—it was a foundation for leadership and teamwork. After the terrorist attacks on 9/11, I felt a deep calling to serve. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted as an infantryman in the United States Marine Corps. I deployed with the 1st Marine Division during Operation Iraqi Freedom, earning multiple valor and meritorious promotions awards. In 2013, I achieved my lifelong ambition by becoming a Navy SEAL Officer, serving with SEAL Team Three and later joining the elite undersea-focused enterprise of U.S. Special Operations Command. Over my 21-year military career, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, conducting combat, intelligence, and humanitarian missions. Now, I'm stepping up to serve Minnesota in a new capacity—as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate. The Stakes in This Race Are Enormous. I'm running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor , who is even more radical than he is. While Minneapolis was burning during the 2020 riots, she wasn't defending the people or supporting the police—she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department. Governor Walz wants America to believe Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents are the Gestapo. His words, not mine. And this is who they call a “moderate.” So ask yourself: If this is what their moderates sound like, what is their real agenda? Every time the left doesn't get their way, they call Republicans Nazis. Every time we demand border security or want criminal illegal aliens deported, they call us bigots. But you know better—and so do I. Enforcing immigration law is not hateful.It's common sense. It's about protecting Americans. Fellow Conservative, if you're sick of being called a Nazi because you want a secure border, then Here's What I Believe: I believe that no one is above the law—especially criminal illegal aliens who commit rape, murder, and violence against American citizens. I believe in a strong border, deporting those who break our laws, and respecting the rule of law —no exceptions, no apologies. I believe that veterans, police officers, working families, and law-abiding Americans deserve a voice in the Senate—not professional politicians who mock us and ignore our communities. I've Never Run for Office Before. That's the Point. Unlike my opponent, I wasn't groomed for politics. I joined the military on my 18th birthday—October 2001—just weeks after the attacks on our homeland. I didn't run from duty. I ran toward it. While Tim Walz was dodging deployments, I was deployed nine times. I fought to protect conservative American values—the ones that raised me, the ones that made this country great, and the ones that are now under daily assault. Tim Walz hand-picked my opponent in the U.S. Senate race to be his lieutenant governor. We can’t trust him due to his past actions in the military and the governor's mansion, so it should go without saying that we can’t trust her, either. Fellow Conservative, I'm asking you for something personal today—something I never thought I'd do: Minnesota hasn't gone Republican in a presidential race since 1976. But we're not a deep-blue state. Not yet. With Senator Tina Smith retiring, this is our moment. The seat is open. The field is fluid. And I believe—with everything in me—that if we build now, we can flip this seat, and flip the narrative. I Don't Have the Media. I Don't Have Hollywood. I Don't Have the Swamp. What I have is grit, a record of service , and hopefully, the support of patriots like you who still believe America is worth fighting for. If you're tired of watching cities like Minneapolis fall apart while liberal elites cheer it on... And if you believe we deserve leaders who've fought for this country— Then I'm humbly asking you to join my team today. Let's do this. Let's turn the tide. Let's win. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Friend,

This campaign is — and has always been — about you .

All of the work we do is to keep Jason in Congress, tackling the issues that matter most to you and your families.

Jason is focused on making sure everybody, no matter their zip code, can achieve their dreams. Your support and feedback help him do just that.

Today, we’re not asking you for money — instead, we want to hear from you.

Jason knows that Democrats need to show up, listen, and respect every person’s way of life. That’s why he asked us to reach out with our team’s official June Priorities Survey.

Will you take just a minute or two to fill out our survey? Jason wants to hear what issues are top of mind for you right now. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/june-priorities-survey-1-1]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/june-priorities-survey-1-1]

Thanks for your input,

Team Crow

name: VoteVets.org
subject: “Not a pleasant day for you”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
German Chancellor Merz praised the United States for their role in ending the dictatorship that ruled Germany and most of Europe with an iron fist.
#
Peter: 81 years ago this morning, American soldiers joined their allies and landed on the beaches of Normandy, beginning the liberation of Europe from Nazi oppression.
And in the Oval Office yesterday, German Chancellor Merz praised the United States for their role in ending the dictatorship that ruled Germany and most of Europe with an iron fist.
In response to this, Trump: “That was not a pleasant day for you.”
Again, presented with the lowest bar imaginable, Trump fails to clear it. His sympathies lie, as ever, with the brutal, genocidal dictatorship responsible for the deaths of millions.
Enough about Trump. He is already co-opting the 250th anniversary of the Army, the brave men who stormed those beaches and parachuted behind enemy lines on D-Day. We won’t let him take June 6th, too.
Our parents and grandparents sacrificed so much to meet their moment in history, when democracy was in great peril. Hundreds of thousands died in that fight, but they ushered in an era of peace, prosperity, and freedom.
We now face our own moment. Democracy is again under siege. How will we answer to future generations if we do not meet this moment with the same courage and resolve as our ancestors did?
Each of us must do whatever we can, wherever we are, whenever we can. VoteVets will not bend the knee to a dictator. We are fighting every day.
Maybe it’s not right for you to be out on the streets. Maybe you can’t make it to a a march or a rally. But something you may be able to do is make a donation of any amount you can afford to help VoteVets as we make our stand.
[**Can we count on you to make a contribution and help keep us in the fight? The amount is not as important as the donation itself. Because when you join thousands of others these donations add up fast. It turns into the kind of warchest that can face down a dictator like Trump — and win.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june25-p.Db1MkM&refcode=em250606-1-b&t=5&akid=34439%2E3013755%2EeqlmBg)

| | **[CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-june25-p.Dr3hFj&amount=5&refcode=em250606-1-b&t=6&akid=34439%2E3013755%2EeqlmBg)**

****

---
****
Thank you for your help.
It means a lot.
The team at VoteVets

I know we’ve been reaching out a lot recently, but this weekend is our last weekend to get Josh’s message out to voters across Jersey. And in the midst of Trump’s chaos, this work has never been more important.

Can you make a donation today so we can ensure our volunteers and staff have the resources they need to get out the vote this final weekend? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]

Daniel Pardee
Finance Director

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Trump’s Head of FEMA didn’t know the US had a hurricane season?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
You can’t make this stuff up.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101603/550004183/1328794144?refcode=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3YmQ5YTE1LWVjNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1mOJdcYRjisZldV3TdOaYCCvOjt3ikHFYXJq6UpkfA=&emci=522cdd05-dd42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Did you see that Trump’s Head of FEMA admitted in a meeting this week that he didn’t know the United States had a hurricane season? _**Acting FEMA Chief Told Staff He Didn’t Know About U.S. Hurricane Season**_ – _The New York Times_ Now the Trump Administration is trying to walk it back, saying it was intended as a joke. Seriously? You just can’t make this stuff up. This stunning confession comes after Trump promised to “terminate” FEMA and removed nearly a quarter of FEMA’s full-time staff, leaving people like you unprepared in your most desperate times of need. Enough is enough. It truly pains me to see what’s happening, but what makes me angry is when politicians politicize catastrophe. This administration is playing with human lives, so it is on us to turn to those closest to us for an extra boost of energy and dig a bit deeper right now. That’s why I’m personally coming to you — this incredible grassroots community that has never failed to meet the moment. We must stand together right now and show Trump and everyone paying attention — because trust me, Big Oil is watching us closely — that we will not back down. No matter how many federal programs Trump guts, no matter how many executive orders he signs, our mission does not change. We are building a firewall of fearless climate champions who will protect our people and our planet, even when Washington won’t. One leader at a time. One state at a time. One supporter at a time. **Because what I know deep in my bones is that people like you paying attention to this news, sharing it with your friends, and chipping in what you can, when you can, is how we’re going to win this fight.** **[I’ve always believed that one small act can make a _huge_ difference. So if you’re with us, can you represent your community in Cresco and chip in a few dollars today? Together, we’ll elect climate leaders who will defend our planet like our lives depend on it — because they do.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101604/550004184/2105508926?refcode=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3YmQ5YTE1LWVjNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1mOJdcYRjisZldV3TdOaYCCvOjt3ikHFYXJq6UpkfA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101605/550004185/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3YmQ5YTE1LWVjNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1mOJdcYRjisZldV3TdOaYCCvOjt3ikHFYXJq6UpkfA=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109101606/550004186/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.17bd9a15-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3YmQ5YTE1LWVjNDItZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1mOJdcYRjisZldV3TdOaYCCvOjt3ikHFYXJq6UpkfA=)

clean_body: You can’t make this stuff up. | Did you see that Trump’s Head of FEMA admitted in a meeting this week that he didn’t know the United States had a hurricane season? Acting FEMA Chief Told Staff He Didn’t Know About U.S. Hurricane Season – The New York Times Now the Trump Administration is trying to walk it back, saying it was intended as a joke. Seriously? You just can’t make this stuff up. This stunning confession comes after Trump promised to “terminate” FEMA and removed nearly a quarter of FEMA’s full-time staff, leaving people like you unprepared in your most desperate times of need. Enough is enough. It truly pains me to see what’s happening, but what makes me angry is when politicians politicize catastrophe. This administration is playing with human lives, so it is on us to turn to those closest to us for an extra boost of energy and dig a bit deeper right now. That’s why I’m personally coming to you — this incredible grassroots community that has never failed to meet the moment. We must stand together right now and show Trump and everyone paying attention — because trust me, Big Oil is watching us closely — that we will not back down. No matter how many federal programs Trump guts, no matter how many executive orders he signs, our mission does not change. We are building a firewall of fearless climate champions who will protect our people and our planet, even when Washington won’t. One leader at a time. One state at a time. One supporter at a time. Because what I know deep in my bones is that people like you paying attention to this news, sharing it with your friends, and chipping in what you can, when you can, is how we’re going to win this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Mean Girls energy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It’s the latest reminder that Republicans in DC aren’t serious about governing.
#
Trump and Musk just had their Big Beautiful Breakup — and it’s giving full Mean Girls energy.
But here’s the thing: this isn’t just petty drama.
It’s the latest reminder that Republicans in DC aren’t serious about governing. They’re too busy collapsing into their chaos to actually help people.
Let’s not forget that Marjorie Taylor Greene recently admitted she _didn’t even read_ the bill that included the largest cuts to Medicaid in American history.
**I’m in Congress to do the work: to show up, read every word, and fight for working people, and I rely on grassroots support from this team to keep it up.**
[**So if you believe in serious leaders who govern with care and competence, pitch in $5 today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250606-1?refcode=em20250606-2072&amount=5&refcode2=2072_21716_cCER33&akid=2072%2E21716%2EcCER33)
