name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Don’t let the media rewrite our founding
body:
There’s been a lot of talk lately about the separation of powers—especially as federal judges issue a wave of rulings that seem to defy the will of the people.

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/kKDYSeeo5ASy7O-KUsKSR9iCNp7DdNm-sx4593zIT5x4NgWBtzZVTvWlyDAkgZujzQfvq1_QWirSmLwvB7VxFqjNX9r65Q5uq2bgCewhRqel3CozFOHDEiN2wNL7nv5TzU1GzKbUnEusDcBmqFXHbi3tTvyZmrQhAB0IpYL_pgYLoyikN28hunmB/TN-hkzHLAifMfMUiFtxSqfPJ6klHzk0z/9)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/3SqgRxs1gCTxnihtsV94D09pZWjrwm1d8K-juzFCMDKoQu2qHUNG3F9UQHZMLLqXSIQ00frbg4sP7pRQq3QNm-yYPKEMcpcK2652VmZIEHWZszne9TSmQV5eiuk2WQ6R5o4TeBcukTa9FcJEjM8fAq2r503T165sb7au1DdsvdkU30A5bmfhJyCCNj7QqJtW5Gm_pq9_R9Lay4ZM7WCXf1jGGHZkXaDo3YGxDxy1Qs0faP4s-rFwlUl4oeb-luVxT9kEAXK5K4hXuWSJZmcdKisK7-b6uqSlLoQs5Yf3sQLG3rPlAuFkQS6YROKt2K0SNovzH2Ec7qAVRLdKuJcFI-d8DDj8Ey9tLQuPVlT0nf1uJaZbZBTw5jsKBX5JR5P8Rlex0PDGRePZxhV7MFLwWiSkEx8MWLYysDGODz9Idt3-Wg_javiGiWizAlf-ckR5mMi2Iga4_WLDeNJbA1DcH5RDp2fMuL9DqdhLMUjIygwt_uOKz8_znHQNkeWbVKZ2lu_41T33pqsZZcMbeu4t1C2IWMKDmZ2zoyY-0MG4z5NcMeRsoVADlWje6RqZI7DsPAE1ans5b9fn1W9-ePUj-9lvHdiDIbeECCe37Ycs5MRNpOn8d_aOJjs9y6PnDQBFW4GJ76HF3gdEqTkR81aks-_exRiz7CIuHNFZLRrXk8Em4Lm2hTwwmKKs4_gGx5GWUhxXM7nRxkKBO-X_l_gFVjqXsODCAmrr4F9AMAZiIMZOo_2mjpGJDEcf1_L9_4GOtjSxbEzEcQ/w03tRHWI93lzXHXiPlDa3-qaqObsRzAV/9) Dear Friend, There's been a lot of talk lately about the separation of powers--especially as federal judges issue a wave of rulings that seem to defy the will of the people.

It highlights a pattern we see every few election cycles.

When in power, the far-Left calls the Constitution "outdated" and seeks to overthrow it. When out of power, they claim to uphold it.

But how should defenders of the Constitution, like you, respond to this crisis?

Thankfully, we don't have to guess. The answer lies in _The Federalist Papers_ , written by founding fathers Alexander Hamilton, James Madison, and John Jay to explain and defend the Constitution back in the 1780s.

Thomas Jefferson called them "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written."

**[That’s why, on June 17, Hillsdale College will launch a brand-new free online course: “The Federalist.”](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/eNpRKNHcjCjs_NR6ZQ3tpQwtdJmEIyaolINf_nx3p8HUCOGNyZ5ceSzovC1f0pJKnK5yeLM4Qs0EnnM8wKVbUf1ImnRKwytQ2eL4_YYbVaeRo5aRgqCf8mO1-2G3pa3g2h19DZYZJi0gie1WKU6uqwpqhl9ihG_y4AkNDHJWtk6N-eBDREb6tAYsZQSqEjoItgiMnT3jyr02aqPy9XGAdgIoBlVItDe0AXj9Zan9qK3GRGgIqdlxCVgXCL3s4GVh8f3Dy4axP0JH78IAV4LXxdeFz06mfvu-9BWgU8h0RNAOxfR34A_M-MiF2XKCaARPBrPmRSAFXeAb3Ec_MYYMqr59Gz5ukax9lzPrdF7O6szZ1mn8yyAZAWPG7CwzhfQWHRdLQzb_c4NafMgFrM-UypiAcG4t8fKKi7nVfgaYb0NkmvH9E746USmWpWODT8w7L1GMO1FY0j2dt1MCftktWnTr79jvcPpagK--A1pRZl5KrBNs8flXCVDXlowrQLwoo2HpCCTPphF-tgF545Fct5uVZU6QHb96yosiC9rwoAKPukddD47pl33PQlJ4Dw5QNJ4yAKWXDpo1gqHGWayRHjwyL4J41fP7jYsihUn1FKKt8iVE8wXOlWpIROtdc5qSV3YOiPlK3qyVdTDDiH_C5YLjsS1641rOTHR_bLnjHWjo_6J05jo4jcz_sAIOjKPcxSHteIya1QGimyQSVG_C5PF6k_KgQ_TFu6ezmVpfdkC7XiiA1YgyCsAzjSICcriIc-SM0IaKBg/SQHE1nbp6icJhCm4d4t7GyPBWnW23U9m/9) **

Taught by Hillsdale College faculty, this course will help you understand the Constitution straight from the Founders' own words--exactly what's needed in our divided times.

We're still putting the finishing touches on this great new course, so enrollment won't open to the public until late June. However, you have the chance **to be among the first to sign up.**

Don't let the media and the radical Left rewrite the story of America's founding. Learn the truth for yourself--with **" The Federalist"** as your guide.

**Click here today to be one of the first students:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-federalist-papers-teaser**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/0e-H4Jey4TSc2kQAwLkaG6t0tfMpXyJglcL2yH_tVv33TTLedRzfHtHfJRLFnCi1WDVJlAy5EEamQlRxyF71k7E0cde2hFFjxBcNFeD6geYgtnkbHMT3JrJdPJw1NbShe_1XvUWz9hTYOQfc80NnqL9OKVPAd6OmmheFfg57J2hvEJQL5I92FJwDYsTRkUiukGbiBM6qZL6MP7T9zSsBwa3vQyzEivXOuvDbAvDBw8y1sMlmKVcF79v1c7NRcpQQsklreMzM9ZtlR6FPRskxcyvLYa0EeG-Qaxtn1_txqAiCfShGw37mg0zQAPDn_ANkD6AkFle9Xn818bSJ3Wrjoo7ZgBxKVG7mwAuard30dmiQtfwX_mYBhsDLbECuPQ472h7cU3vxqq1ZeMrK5pGayIxbg29WP3LwXbzvIUsxPeXkjUQlLRpvtWWWbEZG0Jua7wWugLOC4CYnqnJz1D9qkEDa1WAbZ89CoF11BXUKUZebAEIz-ovOsAwZZV8tNfpew0BNLZAbhcsOmL78gSUG1_1MpE5BNRHssAI4Uf9SLHj77v3CH6aCls1UN_2972I9Dqyt6z0kYPYZfM9aiAJWjIeJFx0lcafIcws-CGjFEw3Tr1vV4DwWMi8QTWBCspj8YeXb5bLGsf4HTkvVtgbjPm7soI8ynJkEbz-FEw2ZbnPC6bfLUFrdshSwTs6nL7LdhMHIbYDJnSwwdi0joh9zFHxKv5XrGuxDyO1WYSjyvJO55NRpfBJmN9vsyJVtbVDgM7gNksZdpA/B81wA1-nsUfmFUxzssnwjCVuJI0sN7fM/9)

name: Emperor Trump
subject: Unlimited Power
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dz4htkcPh7eQn_CXrx8oGMtKp_nS1yCsKP1hDQklNC45_LHeiZx-0ytsaXym4OgKk1ATJIiDLIN5DFVWX54zNXp2PFM6QXVxR0GHRhtR947FVz3OFMOfou_UzQ2Axgx3-muciB78KysEY_ukfA2wk45nyypbB6Ku2o7hdeyDVrOdtLh-WZ_xOxQm7QcLrNF4tmis5ClSlaejhIiivmF5tnnfgJe6antK_nRVYTvVv6n504pryhEIcvWL8CI5LIDOuXDAKYvWATM=&c=tz-CmmN1kz7C7K-XQOuzg01Za-63ZBaDc5VddmWUD2V_A6qrJzXnDg==&ch=ueM0WqUzv533YLtWNL62Oc9uHNoN-8U1b8i6r1L6aD18GCMuSzlfJg==)
---
| Friend,
Republicans are fighting to give Donald Trump unlimited power:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dz4htkcPh7eQn_CXrx8oGMtKp_nS1yCsKP1hDQklNC45_LHeiZx-0ytsaXym4OgKk1ATJIiDLIN5DFVWX54zNXp2PFM6QXVxR0GHRhtR947FVz3OFMOfou_UzQ2Axgx3-muciB78KysEY_ukfA2wk45nyypbB6Ku2o7hdeyDVrOdtLh-WZ_xOxQm7QcLrNF4tmis5ClSlaejhIiivmF5tnnfgJe6antK_nRVYTvVv6n504pryhEIckjH-RjvpFN68x2dW7lo7mI=&c=tz-CmmN1kz7C7K-XQOuzg01Za-63ZBaDc5VddmWUD2V_A6qrJzXnDg==&ch=ueM0WqUzv533YLtWNL62Oc9uHNoN-8U1b8i6r1L6aD18GCMuSzlfJg==)
---
Our courts are a system of local, state, and federal judges - each making decisions in their own jurisdiction. Nationwide injunctions are court orders that prevent the government from enforcing a law or policy nationwide, not just for the parties in a specific lawsuit. Republicans are trying to end nationwide injunctions and the consequence would be complete chaos - allowing Trump to commit unconstitutional actions in regions of the country with jurisdictions covered by MAGA judges. Last month, our courts saved us from a complete fascist takeover using nationwide injunctions:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dz4htkcPh7eQn_CXrx8oGMtKp_nS1yCsKP1hDQklNC45_LHeiZx-0ytsaXym4OgKk1ATJIiDLIN5DFVWX54zNXp2PFM6QXVxR0GHRhtR947FVz3OFMOfou_UzQ2Axgx3-muciB78KysEY_ukfA2wk45nyypbB6Ku2o7hdeyDVrOdtLh-WZ_xOxQm7QcLrNF4tmis5ClSlaejhIiivmF5tnnfgJe6antK_nRVYTvVv6n504pryhEIcjF8CXCXys629pDd-CpKNOw=&c=tz-CmmN1kz7C7K-XQOuzg01Za-63ZBaDc5VddmWUD2V_A6qrJzXnDg==&ch=ueM0WqUzv533YLtWNL62Oc9uHNoN-8U1b8i6r1L6aD18GCMuSzlfJg==)
---
| So Republicans snuck a provision in their new 1000 page budget bill - a single sentence that would end nationwide injunctions. That bill passed in the House and now must be approved by the Senate, and Republicans are fighting to keep that single sentence in the bill. Trump and his MAGA allies will do anything for power. That is why Trump is attacking our courts, with his eyes on Pennsylvania next. Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. Their goal is to replace these judges with puppets who will let Trump act as an emperor and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive - turning it deep red.

clean_body: | | | | | == | Friend, Republicans are fighting to give Donald Trump unlimited power: | | == Our courts are a system of local, state, and federal judges - each making decisions in their own jurisdiction. Nationwide injunctions are court orders that prevent the government from enforcing a law or policy nationwide, not just for the parties in a specific lawsuit. Republicans are trying to end nationwide injunctions and the consequence would be complete chaos - allowing Trump to commit unconstitutional actions in regions of the country with jurisdictions covered by MAGA judges. Last month, our courts saved us from a complete fascist takeover using nationwide injunctions: | | == | So Republicans snuck a provision in their new 1000 page budget bill - a single sentence that would end nationwide injunctions. That bill passed in the House and now must be approved by the Senate, and Republicans are fighting to keep that single sentence in the bill. Trump and his MAGA allies will do anything for power. That is why Trump is attacking our courts, with his eyes on Pennsylvania next. Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. Their goal is to replace these judges with puppets who will let Trump act as an emperor and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive - turning it deep red. == == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | Thank you for your support, Defend Our Courts Fighting for Justice. This is Sean Feucht with an important message-- we're just HOURS away from kicking off the 5-Year Anniversary celebration of the Let Us Worship movement! We've partnered with our friends at Fearless Church to hold a night of prayer, praise, and worship for all God's done over the past five years. Check out all the details below-- hope to see you there! You won't want to miss out on all that God's doing! Till All Hear, Sean
---

Dear Peter,
---
Five years ago, in the midst of a global pandemic, we heard the call of the Lord and stepped out in bold faith. What many thought would be a season marked by fear, isolation, and death, God turned into a season of revival and awakening. It began with a powerful march and worship gathering on the Golden Gate Bridge—and what was expected to be a one-time moment became a nationwide movement. __This Friday_ , June 6th at 7PM, we’re gathering on the rooftop of Fearless Church LA to celebrate FIVE YEARS of salvations, baptisms, bold worship, and revival across America!_ But we’re not done—far from it. We believe God is just getting started, and this next season could be the most powerful yet. That’s why we’re continuing to raise our voices and take a stand for righteousness from coast to coast. As we celebrate in Los Angeles, we are also mobilizing for the next battlefront in Denver, Colorado, where the fight for families is intensifying. _This Sunday_ , June 8th at 3PM, we’ll gather on the steps of the Colorado State Capitol to rally for families and Biblical truth. The passage of HB25-1312 is a direct attack on parental rights, enabling activist judges to override the God-given role of parents. It’s wrong, it’s dangerous, and it’s why we must take a stand. Join us in Denver as we declare that God’s design for the family will not be erased and that the next generation will be protected and empowered.
---

clean_body: | | | This is Sean Feucht with an important message-- we're just HOURS away from kicking off the 5-Year Anniversary celebration of the Let Us Worship movement! We've partnered with our friends at Fearless Church to hold a night of prayer, praise, and worship for all God's done over the past five years. Check out all the details below-- hope to see you there! You won't want to miss out on all that God's doing! Till All Hear, Sean | \-------Forwarded message------- From: Sean Feucht Date: Thursday, June 5, 2025 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: This Weekend In Los Angeles and Denver | Revival and Rally!! | | | | Dear Peter, Five years ago, in the midst of a global pandemic, we heard the call of the Lord and stepped out in bold faith. What many thought would be a season marked by fear, isolation, and death, God turned into a season of revival and awakening. It began with a powerful march and worship gathering on the Golden Gate Bridge—and what was expected to be a one-time moment became a nationwide movement. This Friday , June 6th at 7PM, we’re gathering on the rooftop of Fearless Church LA to celebrate FIVE YEARS of salvations, baptisms, bold worship, and revival across America! But we’re not done—far from it. We believe God is just getting started, and this next season could be the most powerful yet. That’s why we’re continuing to raise our voices and take a stand for righteousness from coast to coast. As we celebrate in Los Angeles, we are also mobilizing for the next battlefront in Denver, Colorado, where the fight for families is intensifying. This Sunday , June 8th at 3PM, we’ll gather on the steps of the Colorado State Capitol to rally for families and Biblical truth. The passage of HB25-1312 is a direct attack on parental rights, enabling activist judges to override the God-given role of parents. It’s wrong, it’s dangerous, and it’s why we must take a stand. Join us in Denver as we declare that God’s design for the family will not be erased and that the next generation will be protected and empowered. WATCH THE 5-YEAR CELEBRATION PROMO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ WATCH THE DENVER RALLY AND REVIVAL PROMO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | Sinister forces have hijacked June for evil purposes—but while the world celebrates Pride Month, we’re proclaiming it Life Month! body:
I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

| [****](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)
[****](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I founded OMG (O'Keefe Media Group) to do what the mainstream won't: expose the powerful with raw, unfiltered truth. We caught IRS officials on hidden cameras, bragging about their AI overreach--how they're building a surveillance net to track your every dollar. _The Post Millennial_ called it "chilling," and X users said it's "the kind of journalism we've been starving for." That's OMG: no fluff, just facts, straight from the source.

But this work comes at a cost. I've been jailed on trumped-up charges, had my home raided by the FBI over Ashley Biden's diary, and faced endless lawsuits from the left. Why?

Because I won't stop. I don't have a personal life--just a relentless drive to uncover corruption. I've built OMG from the ground up to fight for people like you, [**and now we need**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)**[**$64,600 by June**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)**[**to keep going. Will you join us?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)

**People call OMG a "wrecking ball" against the establishment. **

When we dropped the IRS tapes, it wasn't just a story--it was a warning shot.

Supporters say we're "rewriting the rules of journalism," while critics whine we're "too aggressive." Good. **The truth isn 't polite**.

But fighting the system takes resources--cameras, lawyers, guts--and we're running low. [**Your support keeps us in the game, digging into the shadows the elites want hidden.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)

I've seen what they're capable of. That FBI raid? They treated me like a terrorist, all to protect their own. The lawsuits? A flood meant to drown me. But I'm still standing because this matters--because you deserve to know how they're gaming you.

OMG's got more exposes ready to drop, [**but**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)**[**$64,600 by June**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)**[**is our lifeline. Without it, we fade, and they win.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~)

If you're sick of the lies, the cover-ups, the smug insiders laughing at us, then this is your fight too. [**Your donation today --$20, $100, whatever you can--fuels work the mainstream's too scared to touch**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rLPmk_00eHH9mxUYBtLfDw~~/AARclBA~/05W3jWOjR7KUm-dBlASBXu92y_SS1auhJEFG-ujENAvDDvA3uJD72ceQqtjoTdlM2pyQU3qAWCPyyU2VSW306JBrfHeaGctzVNEgSSoZ2l7mJXXAwlP8_xYBhwjcXMLmIxZWSjYa36tPcANcnXkKG-Zv0sEEW5rrSGaIzs_aSRpe61pOQHTVYP2RFc3Ukcl7vlqOfAQxBbs8nVCXItNHThU_KiYh5Mmr7oM9xg_o5vi0s5aNcLL_X8kiHsXqZo-QjChG9nAOKtHK0tW7IWMypH7zszdMCM--oss7nNKQLhs~).

I'm not here to play nice; I'm here to win. Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're unstoppable.**

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

## What's the issue?
I've been around long enough to remember when America's two party divide made sense.
Republicans wanted small government, less spending. Democrats pushed big government, more programs.
You could argue till the cows came home, but the lines were clear.
And on common sense things--like strong borders, defending the country, or calling out violence--everybody agreed.
I remember Obama talking tough on border security.
Pelosi and Hillary too, waving the flag for enforcement.
But now? It's a whole different ball game.
Let's break it down...

**URGENT FUND PLEA:**
My flight back has been delayed by a full day because they're [suspending flights into DCA/Raegan ](https://substack.com/redirect/fe2f557e-2f9f-4108-b796-06bb53f3add2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)for Trump's vanity project when I'm supposed to come home next Saturday.
I just received my "new itinerary" that puts me in a France for one more full day, coming back home Sunday instead of Saturday.
I'm already stretched beyond thin for this trip and I need to raise a full night's stay ASAP. I leave TODAY.
Please [click here](https://substack.com/redirect/b8bedbb3-e0db-4161-babb-f814e270d046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or use to button below to help if you can give anything at all:

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Sending MAGA a message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Team Jayapal here with an important request.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250606-5115-footer&t=1&akid=5115%2E420207%2EGaFf8R)
Hey Peter, Team Jayapal here with an important request.
After June is over we’ll have to publicly report all of our campaign’s fundraising activity for the second quarter of 2025.
And since this was the first _full_ quarter that Trump was in the White House, Pramila and our entire team are aiming to break records and prove to _everyone_ that **working people are fed up** with Trump, Elon, and their entire corrupt administration.
**We have an ambitious goal of raising $115,000 in the second quarter from emails like this one, and we won't be able to make it without your grassroots support.[If you're in a position to pitch in, will you donate $3 to Pramila's campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250606-1?refcode=em20250606-5115&amount=3&refcode2=5115_420207_GaFf8R&akid=5115%2E420207%2EGaFf8R)
Fundraising numbers, in addition to polling and calls from constituents, are one of the biggest factors that a lot of Republicans in Congress look to when they’re judging how the public feels about a given issue.
And with such a razor-thin majority in the House, all it will take is a couple Republican defectors to bring Trump’s agenda to a screeching halt. That’s why it’s _critical_ that we have a strong showing when the next FEC reports are published.
But we can't do it without you, Peter. Pramila doesn't take a cent from corporations or their PACs, and she doesn't seek out billionaires to use as ATMs.
**In fact, our average online contribution so far this year is just $29.05!**
That’s because Pramila isn’t in Congress to fight for billionaires like Elon Musk. She’s in Congress to fight for poor and working people in Seattle and across the country, and no amount of billionaire campaign donations can change that.
**[Peter, if you're with Pramila in this fight, will you pitch in $3 to help us reach our $115,000 goal and send a message that working people are fed up with the MAGA agenda?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250606-1?refcode=em20250606-5115&amount=3&refcode2=5115_420207_GaFf8R&akid=5115%2E420207%2EGaFf8R)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250606-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250606-5115&refcode2=5115_420207_GaFf8R&akid=5115%2E420207%2EGaFf8R)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250606-5115-footer&t=2&refcode2=5115_420207_GaFf8R&akid=5115%2E420207%2EGaFf8R)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5115%2E420207%2EGaFf8R)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5115%2E420207%2EGaFf8R)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team Griswold
subject: Against the clock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friend - did you see that a new opponent just launched a campaign against Jena? Read our message below, and help us reach our rapid response goal of $10,000 before the end of the day tomorrow by chipping in right now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email]
We’re over a week into June, and every dollar we raise now helps power our campaign through the end of the quarter. We’re up against the clock, and now with a new opponent in the race, every single dollar we raise makes a difference.
That’s why we must ensure we’re firing on all cylinders and leaving no stone unturned in order to reach our rapid response goal. Make a donation today to help us stand up strong against our new opponent.
Jena is no stranger to high-stakes fights. She’s gone toe-to-toe with Donald Trump and MAGA extremists—and won. But she can’t win this race for Attorney General alone.
Help us show we’re ready. Help us show we’re strong. Help us win. Chip in today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email]
—Team Griswold
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email]
Friend,
A new opponent just jumped into this race. We need to show up strong, which is why we are trying to raise $10,000 in rapid response donations over the next three days. Help us keep our momentum by rushing in a donation to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email&]
We’ve been here before, and we know what we need to do: show that we’re already running a strong, people-powered campaign.
Jena is running to stand up to Donald Trump, protect our democracy, and defend our rights. With a new opponent in the race, we have to do everything we can to spread Jena’s message far and wide. Our fundraising numbers have to be even stronger, and we need to send the message that the coalition that we’ve built is ready to win this race.
So, be a part of the team that helps us send that message by donating a $10 rapid response donation right away. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250606-email&amount=10]
Let’s do this, Peter!
— Team Jena
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Who could have seen this coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8660%2E5257348%2ElcpfsQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Elon Musk and Donald Trump’s unlikely partnership has come to an end,
Derek.

Who could have seen this coming?

But in all seriousness, the online bickering between Trump and Musk is
exposing some fundamental problems with the Trump administration.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250606_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8660%2E5257348%2ElcpfsQ ]TruthSocial Post from Trump: The easiest way to save money in our
budget, billions and billions of dollars, is to terminate Elon's
governmental subsidies and contracts.

For one thing, this shows the outrageous conflict of interest in Elon
getting massive federal contracts to begin with. If Trump is willing to
cancel the contracts because of an online spat, they clearly were awarded
because of Trump’s favoritism towards his biggest benefactor.

Elon expected special treatment for spending $100 million on last year’s
election. And for a time, he got it. But Trump can’t be bought — he can
only be rented. Now the deal is off.

And for another thing, Trump could care less about the national security
implications of giving Musk these satellite and space launch contracts —
or of canceling them — because it was never about whether these companies
were offering the best product or price.

Who knows how many other contracts or job postings have been granted to
Trump allies not based on merit but based on how willing they are to
support Trump, either through loyalty, money, or other ways of paying back
the president.

Derek, we need
to keep calling out the corruption. We can’t let it be normalized.

That’s what I’m doing in the U.S. Senate. Exposing the corruption, and
holding them accountable in every way.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250606_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8660%2E5257348%2ElcpfsQ ]Please join me in fighting back by chipping in today.

body:
These states will determine if President Trump’s majority remains intact.

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjE0NTQxMDEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTU3LTA2NGJkNDU4MmNmMzQzMzM4Nzg3MzQzYjFjNzMwM2UxIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVkLWNydXovdGhyZWUtYmF0dGxlLWdyb3VuZHMtZW1haWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9ydy0zYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kc18yMDI1MDYwNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJ3LTNiYXR0bGVncm91bmRzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/z102MuKGFl91gIf8N37E-g)

| | Fellow Conservative, I've been saying it for months... We, as Republicans, cannot merely play _defense_. **We MUST go on the _offensive_ if we're going to protect and EXPAND President Trump's Senate majority. ** ** ** The map for the midterms is as clear as day: We have _**THREE**_ major opportunities to pick up seats in the Senate (Georgia, Michigan and New Hampshire), while protecting two other key Republican-held battleground seats (North Carolina, and Maine). Look, Texas may not be on the map in 2026, but that certainly doesn't mean I'm going to stand idly by while the Democrats and their liberal mega-donors attempt to BUY the majority out from under you. **_The latest Rasmussen polling shows Democrats currently hold a razor-thin 1-POINT LEAD over Republicans._** Make no mistake, this is our warning to pick up the pace while we still can, Fellow Conservative. Plain and simple. With the race for the midterms well within the _MARGIN OF ERROR_ , there's no time to waste. Look, Texas may not be on the map in 2026, but that certainly doesn't mean I'm going to stand idly by while the Democrats and their liberal mega-donors attempt to BUY the majority out from under you. The latest Rasmussen polling shows Democrats currently hold a razor-thin 1-POINT LEAD over Republicans. Make no mistake, this is our warning to pick up the pace while we still can, Fellow Conservative. Plain and simple. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: 🚨 Future Forward’s warning just dropped
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

I hate to bother you right at the beginning of summer, but I have nowhere else to turn.
My race looks more and more competitive by the day.

House Majority PAC and the DCCC are setting fundraising records month over month and Democrats are targeting traditionally red districts like ours.

And now we’ve got something even bigger to worry about:

Future Forward PAC, the same Soros-linked super PAC that spent over $900 million trying to elect Kamala Harris just showed their cards.

They said, and I quote:

“The best way to stop Donald Trump at the federal level is to win control of the House of Representatives in 2026.”

Make no mistake, that means flipping districts like this one.

I know what you might be thinking: Dan’s district is safe. Trump won it by more than 15 points.

But here’s the truth:

✅The DCCC has already announced they’re targeting districts just like this one.
✅A poll just showed a Democrat could win Texas’ Senate seat for the 1st time in 33 years.
✅And now Future Forward is bringing its massive war chest to the battlefield.

We can’t afford to play it safe. We can’t afford to come up short. Not now. Not with this much on the line.

[Please make a contribution to help me DEFEND this Texas district and protect our Republican House majority.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=other)

I’ve said it before – if Democrats take the House, they won’t waste a second.

There will be no border security. No tax relief. No push to restore American strength.

Just impeachment hearings, partisan witch hunts, and an all-out war on President Trump’s agenda.

This is about more than defending our district, it’s about defending our Republican majority, our America First movement, and our mission.

And Peter, I need your help if we’re going to be successful mounting this defense.

[So please make a contribution to help me DEFEND this Texas district and protect our Republican House majority.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

In Service

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/future-forward/?utm_campaign=20250606&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JX2TB7A5RM7V87VMMPNWV4EV&r=01JX2ZGRZ0SZN57B4WGHMGRKQQ).
Team Crenshaw, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1, Box 211, Houston, TX 77024

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Trump and Musk have split. But don’t get distracted.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friend, I’m sure you’ve seen the news. A huge rift has opened up between Trump and Elon Musk.
Trump wants to pass his disastrous budget bill, and Elon doesn’t like it. They’ve resorted to personal insults.
**But don’t get distracted** — Elon doesn’t oppose this bill because it would cut crucial services that Americans rely on. He opposes it because it doesn’t cut services __enough.__
If passed, this budget bill would:
* Leave 14 million Americans without health insurance
* Take food stamps away from 4 million people and their families
* Revoke billions in green tax credits and kill America’s clean energy boom
* End almost 700,000 good-paying jobs in manufacturing and other sectors
* Funnel billions to Trump’s border wall and ICE crackdowns
* Give huge tax breaks to billionaires and corporations

And the list just goes on and on.
The bottom line is, if passed, **this bill would be the largest transfer of wealth from the working class to the rich in American history.**
We have to fight back.
[**Please, add your name to my petition today and help me put pressure on the Senate to stop this bill in its tracks. We only need another small handful of Senators to oppose this bill.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/budget_em_signup/?refcode=em250605-1-270&akid=5565%2E196590%2E1isfhJ)
[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/budget_em_signup/?refcode=em250605-1-270&akid=5565%2E196590%2E1isfhJ)
I’m hoping you’ll add your signature today as we do everything we can to stop this giveaway to billionaires at the expense of working Americans.
\- Mandela Barnes

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5565%2E196590%2E1isfhJ). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=5565%2E196590%2E1isfhJ)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=5565_196590_1isfhJ&akid=5565%2E196590%2E1isfhJ)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=5565%2E196590%2E1isfhJ)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
clean_body: Friend, I’m sure you’ve seen the news. A huge rift has opened up between Trump and Elon Musk. Trump wants to pass his disastrous budget bill, and Elon doesn’t like it. They’ve resorted to personal insults. But don’t get distracted — Elon doesn’t oppose this bill because it would cut crucial services that Americans rely on. He opposes it because it doesn’t cut services enough. If passed, this budget bill would: Leave 14 million Americans without health insurance Take food stamps away from 4 million people and their families Revoke billions in green tax credits and kill America’s clean energy boom End almost 700,000 good-paying jobs in manufacturing and other sectors Funnel billions to Trump’s border wall and ICE crackdowns Give huge tax breaks to billionaires and corporations And the list just goes on and on. The bottom line is, if passed, this bill would be the largest transfer of wealth from the working class to the rich in American history. We have to fight back. I’m hoping you’ll add your signature today as we do everything we can to stop this giveaway to billionaires at the expense of working Americans. \- Mandela Barnes

body:
Big wins for New Hampshire families

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,
We did it.
Yesterday, the New Hampshire House passed _Universal Education Freedom_ and our _Parental Bill of Rights_ —two of the most important victories for families and students in Granite State history.
We stood firm against the radical left, defended parental control, and expanded education freedom for _every child_ in New Hampshire—not just the wealthy or well-connected.
This didn’t happen by accident. It happened because House Republicans held the line, fought back against Democrat lies, and refused to cave.
Now we need your help to keep that momentum going.

**We cannot let them.**
If you believe parents—not bureaucrats—should make decisions about their children’s education...
If you believe every child deserves a chance to succeed...

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: There’s nothing beautiful about it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
It’s just wrong. It’s the Great Betrayal.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109107684/550023594/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGUwMGYwOS1mNTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OF_doeGEgZAq7Q3Z6VlcN6RWR7eieqrJCcwibaDnsI4=&emci=c294138a-ec42-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=08e00f09-f542-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Donald Trump is pushing forward with his so-called "big, beautiful bill," but let's be honest — there's nothing beautiful about it. In fact, it should be called the Big, Beautiful Betrayal. His billionaires-first budget scheme is a slap in the face to working Americans. Millions will lose their health care, and millions of children will go hungry — all to fund massive tax breaks for the super-rich. **That's just wrong. It's the great betrayal.** Trump promised he'd fight for America's families, but instead, he's all in for billionaires — gutting essential programs and pushing harmful tariffs that are already raising costs for hardworking people. That's not relief — that's Trumpflation. It's pushing our economy into a downturn, and the Trump Slump is looming. **I'm fighting back. ****We can't stand by and let this happen.** I'll be a loud "Hell No" when this bill comes to the Senate floor because I believe America works best when we build an economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthiest few. Let's keep showing up and speaking out — for health care, for food security, for economic fairness, and for the families who make this country strong. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party June Newsletter
body:
Lean in and get involved.

|
### **Candidate Fyke**
We want to thank our State Chair, Christian Fyke, for his leadership since the beginning the PA Forward Party. We're going to help him as much as we can as he continues to lead by example.
### **From Renewal to Responsibility: Why I’m Running for Office in New Kensington- Christian Fyke**
Seven years ago, I rediscovered New Kensington, Pennsylvania. Once the proud home of Alcoa, its industrial legacy still lined the riverbank, but the downtown had quieted to a whisper. People used to say you could roll a bowling ball down 5th Avenue any day of the week and not hit a thing. But beneath the surface, I saw something deeper—a lingering charm, and more importantly, a community that hadn’t given up. As I leaned in, I wasn’t alone. A new mayor had just taken office. A businessman from a neighboring town had launched a revitalization vision called “Old Towne Overhaul.” Longtime residents were chasing bold ideas—from a pay-what-you-can community café to a vintage shop and specialty bakery. Around that same time, I had partnered in an organic coffee roasting business that needed more space and dreamed of opening a café. New Kensington became our home. I did the build-out myself with a close friend—who, candidly, thought I was crazy and worried for my safety. But just a few weeks ago, I saw him strolling through town, taking in the progress. Since we moved in, over 30 new businesses have opened. The energy is different now. Optimism is in the air. People outside New Kensington are starting to believe again. But this revival is still fragile. It’s not finished—and it’s not guaranteed. After the recent primary, I had coffee with a friend I met here in town, someone I supported when he ran for state representative. He mentioned that no one had filed to run for City Controller or City Treasurer and asked if I’d consider stepping up. I’ve often encouraged others to run for office, but I hadn’t seen that path for myself—until that moment. The idea of serving the city while helping to raise the visibility of the Forward Party, and promoting a leadership standard rooted in FACT—Fairness, Accountability, Communication, and Transparency—stuck with me. I reached out to a diverse group of friends in the community and was met with unanimous encouragement. I visited the mayor—not someone I’d call part of my inner circle, but someone I respect—and again, found support. From there, I contacted the Board of Elections, confirmed the requirements, and began the process. To maintain transparency and avoid even the appearance of a conflict of interest, I have taken a leave of absence from my role as State Chair of the PA Forward Party. And now, I’m officially announcing my candidacy for local elected office in New Kensington, Pennsylvania.
### **Acting Chair Valimont**
At a leadership call earlier this week, Benjamin Valimont was made Vice Chair of the PA Forward Party. As such, he will be the acting State Chair during Christian's leave of absence. We ask you the join us in thanking Ben for taking on this responsibility and wish him the best of luck. [
](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=OO1xB82Dwc0SwW5xslNAt5demYUjnvMsNObg_2SsnH4C04dQQgB9BZ02TA7y9H7t-4vbxkv79HHUmZ6qj3hodUR-7alEp57O08vr8cfcTeFUloFbffPqlZP8qsSt5ozRpo-ljG0b_nmp5HGri8eilg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_june_newsletter&n=1) Join us June 16th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. You'll have things you want to talk about, We will**too!** [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u6P9-Hx0zs-QPm6VAaSuDh4Sdlc62t3OcWCnrBmB7tVtPYcz_Coz6yCZGimzIyZUcg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_june_newsletter&n=2)

name: =?utf-8?b?SmFtZXMgT+KAmUtlZWZl?=
subject: The corrupt are suing me – help me fight back

Imagine me walking down a city street, heart pounding, knowing I’m about to confront someone who’s been caught red-handed, in his own words, betraying the American people from a position of truth.

**That’s what I did with Jamie Mannina, a former FBI agent I caught in a lie**. I had his words on tape, undeniable proof of his hypocrisy. When I faced him, he didn’t explain—he exploded, yelling, “You’re an a**hole! A fraudster!”

I kept my cool, because the truth doesn’t need to shout. But now, **Mannina’s suing me for “assault” and “slander”** , trying to punish me for exposing him.

And that’s not the only fight. Project Veritas, the organization I founded, is coming after me with another lawsuit, burying me in costs. Each deposition runs **over $12,000** , and I’ve got four left.

I owe **$29,000** in legal fees already, and I need **$17,000** more for a new attorney to take on Mannina’s case. That’s **$46,000** I don’t have—[**and I’m running out of time and need your help**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8GOmzAQBuCnGW4gGBsbDhx2i1Kp1VbtXqo9rYw9EFc4ENuE5u0royhSj575Rr9_5dbZjvcO5Csgnq0JgAjsBRCvH7vz2x_3_Ws-fXt5z6_ih6vTFr886A2f-KLV3-o1frzJ888wvzVBvv_6fauePN5XeuJHaEFO2TlNZZ-Zjo2m5Bl1leQtYtPUbXbuJErSipqR86aRpq31wFo2aGNqRjSKzHZYYl2KUlSiRmyKUQrd8FLxVnOhRgReHjmFcuStVlWIu_J-WVyhF5fN3TnGNRwfOwGeAunNU6EuZJaYBOBptgP5eM-nTXmT3lM-ksnDZmPOcjfkhwJ22qL7DMvmNQHr_1OAIi0dGbs5YH26OCZauVXZ6QKsdwOgUG7ZLhFYj_VDRPLpAkvB2efuq8x3Zt3tPNsgJPByOtqlLrcO_wUAAP__xgmPZQ).

Here’s why this hits home: **I’m the last investigative reporter going undercover**.

The mainstream media gave up on it—they’d rather cozy up to power than challenge it. But me and OMG? We’re out there every day, shining a light on the dark corners no one else will touch. If these lawsuits shut me down, the corrupt win, and you lose your window into what’s really happening.

**I need $46,000 to pay attorneys as soon as possible** , or I might not make it through this.

But if you [**donate now**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8GOmzAQBuCnGW4gGBsbDhx2i1Kp1VbtXqo9rYw9EFc4ENuE5u0royhSj575Rr9_5dbZjvcO5Csgnq0JgAjsBRCvH7vz2x_3_Ws-fXt5z6_ih6vTFr886A2f-KLV3-o1frzJ888wvzVBvv_6fauePN5XeuJHaEFO2TlNZZ-Zjo2m5Bl1leQtYtPUbXbuJErSipqR86aRpq31wFo2aGNqRjSKzHZYYl2KUlSiRmyKUQrd8FLxVnOhRgReHjmFcuStVlWIu_J-WVyhF5fN3TnGNRwfOwGeAunNU6EuZJaYBOBptgP5eM-nTXmT3lM-ksnDZmPOcjfkhwJ22qL7DMvmNQHr_1OAIi0dGbs5YH26OCZauVXZ6QKsdwOgUG7ZLhFYj_VDRPLpAkvB2efuq8x3Zt3tPNsgJPByOtqlLrcO_wUAAP__xgmPZQ), you’re not just helping me—you’re claiming your stake in the truth.

You’ll feel that fire of standing up to the powerful, that patriotic surge of knowing you’re keeping our country honest. [**Your gift ensures I can keep exposing corruption**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8GOmzAQBuCnGW4gGBsbDhx2i1Kp1VbtXqo9rYw9EFc4ENuE5u0royhSj575Rr9_5dbZjvcO5Csgnq0JgAjsBRCvH7vz2x_3_Ws-fXt5z6_ih6vTFr886A2f-KLV3-o1frzJ888wvzVBvv_6fauePN5XeuJHaEFO2TlNZZ-Zjo2m5Bl1leQtYtPUbXbuJErSipqR86aRpq31wFo2aGNqRjSKzHZYYl2KUlSiRmyKUQrd8FLxVnOhRgReHjmFcuStVlWIu_J-WVyhF5fN3TnGNRwfOwGeAunNU6EuZJaYBOBptgP5eM-nTXmT3lM-ksnDZmPOcjfkhwJ22qL7DMvmNQHr_1OAIi0dGbs5YH26OCZauVXZ6QKsdwOgUG7ZLhFYj_VDRPLpAkvB2efuq8x3Zt3tPNsgJPByOtqlLrcO_wUAAP__xgmPZQ), so the elite can’t hide from you.

name: With Honor Action
subject: ACES Act Passes the Senate and the AI+ Expo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2c9fd14e0819/invitation-two-parties-two-veterans-one-conversation-rep-lalota-rep-ryan-special-session-with-president-carter-alumni-14052953?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=5aa0e83179&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | Friends,

At a time when bipartisan cooperation can be hard to come by, With Honor Action is proud to support the ACES Act—legislation aimed at reducing cancer rates among military aviators—which passed the Senate [unanimously](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=27850e1380&e=33f53a5b1a) earlier this week, just one month after clearing the U.S. House of Representatives. We commend the leadership of For Country Caucus members Representative August Pfluger, a Colonel in the U.S. Air Force reserve, and Representative Jimmy Panetta, a Navy veteran, along with With Honor Action ally Senator Mark Kelly, also a Navy veteran, for their leadership in championing this bill.
---
|
---
| Although the bill must return to the U.S. House due to Senate amendments, Representative Pfluger has emphasized that his advocacy is a personal matter. He introduced the legislation in honor of his friend and fellow fighter pilot, Colonel Andy “Pablo” Shurtleff, who testified before Congress in March to share his story and underscore the urgency of the ACES Act. You can watch his opening remarks [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=84eebd55c2&e=33f53a5b1a).

Colonel Shurtleff was diagnosed with an aggressive form of cancer as a result of his service and recently lost his life in this second battle he never anticipated having to fight. It is in honor of Colonel Shurtleff that Rep. Pfluger and others have fought, and will continue to fight, for the final passage of this legislation.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=2862a29ecb&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| At the Special Competitive Studies Project's AI+ Expo this week, the With Honor Action's message remained the same: veteran perspectives and leadership will play an integral role in everything from AI and biotechnology to supply chains and drone manufacturing. Rep. Don Davis, an Air Force veteran and Co-Chair of the For Country Caucus, emphasizes the strength of the Caucus for "be[ing] able to sit at the table together, putting country above politics and asking ourselves 'What is best for the American people?'"

You can catch a brief recap of the Expo [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=5f3fff0bcd&e=33f53a5b1a).
---
|
---
_Rep. Troy Downing, Brandon Daniels, Rep. Don Davis, Rye Barcott, and Andrew Desiderio_
|
---
---
| _With Honor CEO Rye Barcott and VP of Government Affairs, Sean McClintock, speaking on their panels_
---
|
---
_Rye Barcott speaking on the NatSec Tech podcast with Jeanne Meserve_
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=f64a36cd51&e=33f53a5b1a)

name: Powered By People
subject: Juicing it for all it’s worth

body:
[1]Powered By People

We are only a few months into Donald Trump’s second term, and it’s already
one one of the most corrupt administrations in modern history.

Trump and his allies are using the office to score big deals for
themselves while working Texans struggle to get by. Here are just a few
things they’ve done in his short time back:

Accepted a luxury Boeing 747 airplane from Qatar to use as Air Force One
shortly after his family business struck a deal to develop a luxury Qatari
golf resort.
Started a meme cryptocurrency and invited the top buyers – some of whom
spent over $10 MILLION – to a private dinner with Trump at one of his golf
courses.
Secured Vietnamese government support for a $1.5 billion Trump
Organization luxury development outside of Hanoi while the country was
also negotiating with Washington over Trump’s tariffs.

The pattern of corruption and using his office to enrich himself is
stunning. Trump will always put himself and his wallet before the American
people, without question.

We can’t afford to sit back and watch this happen again. If we want a
government that puts working families first, we need to organize,
mobilize, and vote out the politicians who are in it for themselves.

At Powered by People, we’re building a grassroots movement to turn that
vision into a reality. By registering new voters and turning out Texans in
every community, we’re building power to stop corruption and build a
government that actually works for us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250606.JjHoAR&refcode=ema20250606-240138&t=1001&akid=240138%2E444211%2E5HgKzv ]Can you chip any amount that makes sense for you to give us a hand? We
need grassroots support to take on billionaire corruption.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250606.JjHoAR&refcode=ema20250606-240138&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=240138%2E444211%2E5HgKzv ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Powered by People

Friend,
We are just _two weeks away_ from the 2025 Regional Candidate Training School — **and registration is closing soon**!
If you’ve ever considered running for office, are actively preparing for a local campaign, or are part of a campaign team — this is the moment to step up. **This is how we keep Virginia red.**

| | Hi Friend, **Eid Mubarak!** As Eid al-Adha begins, I want to take a moment to send my warmest wishes to everyone celebrating across Oakland, the East Bay, and the country. Eid al-Adha is a sacred time of reflection, generosity, and connection — a chance to gather with loved ones, care for our neighbors, and center the values of compassion and community. **In moments like these, I’m reminded of the strength and beauty of our East Bay community** — how we show up for one another, lift each other up, and live out the values of justice and solidarity every day. May this Eid bring peace, joy, and renewal to you and your loved ones. With gratitude,

clean_body: I want to take a moment to send my warmest wishes to everyone celebrating across Oakland, the East Bay, and the country | = = | | Hi Friend, Eid Mubarak! As Eid al-Adha begins, I want to take a moment to send my warmest wishes to everyone celebrating across Oakland, the East Bay, and the country. Eid al-Adha is a sacred time of reflection, generosity, and connection — a chance to gather with loved ones, care for our neighbors, and center the values of compassion and community. In moments like these, I’m reminded of the strength and beauty of our East Bay community — how we show up for one another, lift each other up, and live out the values of justice and solidarity every day. May this Eid bring peace, joy, and renewal to you and your loved ones. Peter,

Today I’m wearing orange to honor National Gun Violence Awareness Day. Each senseless act of violence leaves one more community vulnerable and is an urgent plea for us to address gun violence by advancing common-sense measures.

The passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act was a step in the right direction. But, it still isn’t enough. We need immediate, urgent action to honor the many souls lost to gun violence.

[Will you join me in honoring National Gun Violence Awareness Day by signing my petition to demand common sense legislation to ensure an end to gun violence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109109661/550030154/-1224981125?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_060625_GVA_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2OTczNS1mODQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7RBBC1BRtOR6kJtkMPxuWLFAo70svN-GcDyuA6XjmI=&emci=fdb59735-f842-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=06b69735-f842-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895) | [ADD MY NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109109663/550030155/-1224981125?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_060625_GVA_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2OTczNS1mODQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7RBBC1BRtOR6kJtkMPxuWLFAo70svN-GcDyuA6XjmI=&emci=fdb59735-f842-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=06b69735-f842-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895)

It shouldn’t be this way. **I’m fighting in Congress to stand up against Trump and MAGA Republicans who are cozying up to the gun lobby and choosing gun profits over the safety of our families and communities.**

**I’m proud to be in this fight.** I’ve helped lead the effort in Congress to reinstate the assault weapons ban and advance common-sense measures like enforcing background checks, ending the gun sale loophole, and expanding gun safety education.

I’ve signed petitions to force Republicans to vote on these measures — **because I’m not letting any of them run away from addressing this public health crisis.**

[Please, Peter, join me in fighting for a future free of gun violence by adding your name to the petition: ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109109664/550030156/-1224981125?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_060625_GVA_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2OTczNS1mODQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E7RBBC1BRtOR6kJtkMPxuWLFAo70svN-GcDyuA6XjmI=&emci=fdb59735-f842-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=06b69735-f842-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895)

Valerie Foushee

body:
$26, Derek.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109110397/550032845/906044162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FWDFellShort_250606_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTJiZTk2Mi1mYTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6Z4fsvPSaiO4NPUnDlkbJUc3JSElbzg_1onDUxhgYU=) Derek,

Before you start your weekend, I wanted to make sure you saw my team’s message below.

Look, Derek, I’m only bumping this email because we fell short of our projections last month—which means that we’re spending most of early June trying to play catch up.

When our numbers go public at the end of the month, I want to make sure we show as much strength and momentum as we possibly can, because if the GOP spot a weak FEC report, **they’ll see it as their opening to spend big in VA to defeat me and expand their majority in the Senate.**

[_**So, if you can, I hope you’ll spare one minute to read our message below, and chip in $26 or more to my reelection campaign so we can get back on track for the month.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109110398/550032846/906044162?amount=26&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FWDFellShort_250606_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTJiZTk2Mi1mYTQyLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6Z4fsvPSaiO4NPUnDlkbJUc3JSElbzg_1onDUxhgYU=)

Our fundraising goals are carefully calculated targets we need to meet to fight back against whatever dark money attacks are coming our way.
