name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Allow me to be frank
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2052m3pv63dk2l1ll6vyhie2muofc37uajqyksblpokn9avs5vuzmg7q6qd973ipnscksruabglx8pywc5c&__stmp=sxg7gn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxg7gn&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf0pot0fkhptkmrfllu94rbgbxnugx5do7apuvdoyok71yshzx4yy6agnzxqvgvx1zb4rrpur7me5wy3gbq5gvfpst588ydtrba7e5icxrm7s7lxybwo4w5v6b0mt5jjzshsef1lx6ixc5slv3t2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxg7gn&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxg7gn&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxg7gn&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxg7gn&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf0pot0fkhptkmrfllu94rbgl8pl2p3y44hf7c4lebw1hj6fpedeec5ou6b40rkyjwdsrkfpth53tankzgu1t6345pk75x2tosv2yzjojhnbd5aeayzkdvdehym7jlttlcwfx9als8yn7gwmsdjm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxg7gn&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxg7gn&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: [] Greetings Friend: It's National Donut Day, and while we can't promise sprinkles or jelly filling, we can offer you a campaign that's just as sweet: powered by the people, driven by purpose, and baked fresh daily with bold ideas! [=] Here's the twist, unlike the donuts today, democracy isn't free. It takes real support and effort to make change happen. So today, while you're grabbing your favorite donut, we're asking: Can you chip in $20, $50, or whatever you can to help us keep this campaign rolling? [=] We're not sugarcoating it, a little dough goes a long way. And if you're feeling extra sweet, forward this to a friend who believes in building a better future, one bite (or ballot) at a time. Thanks for being in this fight with us and happy Donut Day! With gratitude, Lynn Whitney, Campaign Manager #SmileyForMayor #ShelbyCounty #DonateToday #TeamSmiley #JBSmiley DONUTS FOR SMILEY [=] Paid for by the JB Smiley Jr. for Mayor. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

|

Well, that didn’t last long... After Elon Musk spent nearly $250 million to help Trump win the election, they’re now having a full fledged falling out – and we’re watching it all unravel on their social media accounts: [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109117184/550056507/-209663064?refcode=em-6.06.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDQ4NTM2ZS0wODQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpYieJeSMBrIU0nutaiiWweMEQ0Khh2-nlS1AgnE7B4=) **This would be hilarious... if it weren’t so dangerous.** Because here’s the thing: while Trump and Musk are busy hurling insults and burning down their bromance, the rest of us are still living with the consequences of their dangerous policies. Let’s be clear: this is what happens when billionaires treat our democracy like it’s just another business venture – something to buy, break, and abandon when it no longer serves them. So no, we’re not going to sit this one out. [**If you're ready to fight back against the chaos and hold people like Trump and Musk accountable – now is the time. After Elon Musk spent nearly $250 million to help Trump win the election, they’re now having a full fledged falling out – and we’re watching it all unravel on their social media accounts: = This would be hilarious... if it weren’t so dangerous. Because here’s the thing: while Trump and Musk are busy hurling insults and burning down their bromance, the rest of us are still living with the consequences of their dangerous policies. Hi Peter, it’s Wes. I’m writing to ask if you’ll make a $5

Wes

body:
Fellow patriot, my name is Ashley Moody.

I’M FLORIDA’S NEWEST U.S. SENATOR.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/square-one-amoody-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rc-squareone-moodynrsc_amoody_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250604_TW-5L.117580_t1649543-575&utm_term=lrm-active]
I was appointed when Marco Rubio was confirmed as Secretary of
State.

SINCE COMING TO THE SENATE,
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/square-one-amoody-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rc-squareone-moodynrsc_amoody_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250604_TW-5L.117580_t1649543-575&utm_term=lrm-active]
I’ve hit the ground running. I’m working to keep our border
secure, lower costs for your families, and support President Trump’s
agenda.

BUT THERE’S A HITCH:
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/square-one-amoody-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rc-squareone-moodynrsc_amoody_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250604_TW-5L.117580_t1649543-575&utm_term=lrm-active]
I have to run in a special election next year to
finish out the rest of this Senate term. _When it comes to building a
winning campaign, I’m starting at square one._

DEMOCRATS KNOW THAT, SO THEY HAVE THEIR EYES ON THIS SPECIAL ELECTION.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/square-one-amoody-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rc-squareone-moodynrsc_amoody_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250604_TW-5L.117580_t1649543-575&utm_term=lrm-active]
They see an opportunity. They think that if they raise millions now,
and catch you napping, they’ll have a chance to defeat me.

_We have a chance to slam the door shut on their plan now, but I
can’t do it without you._

SO I’M HUMBLY ASKING FOR YOUR HELP BEFORE 11:59 PM. CAN YOU READ
THIS FOR MORE?
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/square-one-amoody-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rc-squareone-moodynrsc_amoody_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250604_TW-5L.117580_t1649543-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

Thank you,

name: Katie Porter
subject: Trump’s newest attack on abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39783%2E3422442%2EU_zAnm)
Derek,
Donald Trump loves to say the Dobbs decision “returned abortion to the states.”
What a bunch of BS. **Trump’s Administration just revoked a Biden era requirement that hospitals, even in states where abortion is banned, provide emergency abortion care to women whose health and lives were in danger.**
In practice, revoking this rule creates a bunch of unanswered questions for doctors and hospitals in red states where abortion is banned or restricted. Experts say that confusion leads to serious risk for patients.
Let’s not sugarcoat it: American women are going to die because of this change. I’m sick of men like Donald Trump interfering in women’s most personal healthcare decisions, and literally killing people with these bans.
**California’s next governor needs to be ready to go toe to toe with Trump to make sure abortion is safe, legal, and accessible in California.** You can count on me to always stand up to politicians who try to take away our rights.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250606_1_ak?refcode=em20250606-39783&refcode2=39783_3422442_U_zAnm&akid=39783%2E3422442%2EU_zAnm)
Thanks for being engaged,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250606-39783&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39783_3422442_U_zAnm&akid=39783%2E3422442%2EU_zAnm)**

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

This time, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is going after **Rep. Emilia Sykes** (OH-13) — a pro-choice champion representing one of the most competitive districts in the entire country. Republicans are targeting Emilia's seat because they're seeing the same numbers we are: Ohio's 13th Congressional District had the _closest margins in the country_ for the presidential race.

The NRCC has spent the last week releasing lies about Emilia's track record in Congress. Here's the reality, Peter: Rep. Sykes has put forth a bipartisan legislative agenda with an unmatched commitment to be a champion for the families in her district. Whether it's the Mental Health Improvement Act or the Lower Your Taxes Act, Rep. Sykes has been committed to bipartisan solutions that help ALL her constituents, from her earliest days in the Ohio state Legislature. That's a huge part of why we awarded her our prestigious Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award in 2020!

Here's the other thing, Peter: _**Ohio will have redrawn district maps in place for the 2026 midterms**_ , and the impact on Sykes' district is still unclear. In 2024, Emilia won her race by a thin majority. _The Cook Political Report_ is calling this race a "toss-up."

With the GOP prioritizing flipping this seat over fighting fair, we already know we'll need our entire pro-choice community to step up and help stop the Republican opposition machine in its tracks.

clean_body: A former EMILYs List Rising Star Award winner needs our help! | = Peter, We've seen this playbook before — when a strong Democratic pro-choice woman runs for office, the far right launches a targeted disinformation campaign to discredit her. This time, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is going after Rep. Emilia Sykes (OH-13) — a pro-choice champion representing one of the most competitive districts in the entire country. Republicans are targeting Emilia's seat because they're seeing the same numbers we are: Ohio's 13th Congressional District had the closest margins in the country for the presidential race. = | = The NRCC has spent the last week releasing lies about Emilia's track record in Congress. Here's the reality, Peter: Rep. Sykes has put forth a bipartisan legislative agenda with an unmatched commitment to be a champion for the families in her district. Whether it's the Mental Health Improvement Act or the Lower Your Taxes Act, Rep. Sykes has been committed to bipartisan solutions that help ALL her constituents, from her earliest days in the Ohio state Legislature. That's a huge part of why we awarded her our prestigious Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award in 2020! Here's the other thing, Peter: Ohio will have redrawn district maps in place for the 2026 midterms , and the impact on Sykes' district is still unclear. In 2024, Emilia won her race by a thin majority. The Cook Political Report is calling this race a "toss-up." With the GOP prioritizing flipping this seat over fighting fair, we already know we'll need our entire pro-choice community to step up and help stop the Republican opposition machine in its tracks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. name: Jenna Burns
subject: My police officer husband’s trial has started
body:
The trial is going on| | |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers.And right now, my husband is facing Fani Willis in court as she’s trying to lock him up for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your urgent help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54f95092714941689d939c102310084e&_e=sDwGRTqQD-dS7XOVQwl3medZLKiWFEUUOeITPdWkavdpyDZToK3jB-i8rVoPseL9GGAuCGBGuJ7NIfs9dkmpVEbzsSaeQonR1n3LTk03T4mk8sIxNGV7eLJSeh03oCjYRsKJSULndNeOgpKYHBigqCV3RRsO7ogT3xUbE6oNRcS1EMpTrfoSL53iCUE9VD4qK9eruou-oJepM_6VY_MiVI5OSbjme9V_z_wEOWiloTPu7UKWKryB8Ac4PNBrc90OCUc0L0gTQs9h9WiOFoLloRbdzznfxkvjWQo5KXOb4Y0Xyw-vuFVvcUcz3-cPRkuB3-dKbqwqc7KhAuz1u0xRFAOX71Nyj6REjlouWmKShUxgZ4b3MB2jynfWb_XcJJo799tjkCZnzBfy_1VNYX9sgQ%3D%3D) **My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54f95092714941689d939c102310084e&_e=sDwGRTqQD-dS7XOVQwl3medZLKiWFEUUOeITPdWkavdpyDZToK3jB-i8rVoPseL9GGAuCGBGuJ7NIfs9dkmpVEbzsSaeQonR1n3LTk03T4mk8sIxNGV7eLJSeh03oCjYRsKJSULndNeOgpKYHBigqCV3RRsO7ogT3xUbE6oNRcS1EMpTrfoSL53iCUE9VD4qK9eruou-oJepM_6VY_MiVI5OSbjme9V_z_wEOWiloTP0GEIpTsxMRVFaYzG0oKME1SBUxTNcpbX8VdNUAum9CslrvY1BCIPGvjNJcDgbofLzHRGMWe8ogIMeQNOmyR4WWw8JNBR5P4bRlR6f8dBe73VheohhPnVG-_TYpVBf2dVAmBUCHRfC73KCF55TUYceMPUt88L1r5pnDJkDEHg5_A%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way in court... **life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started nine years ago, when my husband responded to a call about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate._That's when it happened._ The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So, the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why [**I'm turning to you for help.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54f95092714941689d939c102310084e&_e=sDwGRTqQD-dS7XOVQwl3medZLKiWFEUUOeITPdWkavdpyDZToK3jB-i8rVoPseL9GGAuCGBGuJ7NIfs9dkmpVEbzsSaeQonR1n3LTk03T4mk8sIxNGV7eLJSeh03oCjYRsKJSULndNeOgpKYHBigqCV3RRsO7ogT3xUbE6oNRcS1EMpTrfoSL53iCUE9VD4qK9eruou-oJepM_6VY_MiVI5OSbjme9V_z_wEOWiloTPuXhTUStqbl5nWUgGoZr-LPzgggkL6kCYgX8vKZ4ezUr44-d4xsrcctpUNF0XyIqvH98m6YlbQJAkfrFcknpZ69LKfpi_a8TTDuMF9FUUHnY_TIb_YTEChV0YamNKzSNHliz5t1G-lA_YRCW-RQ04kcUaY64Bi8pSEt4y9FyxhWg%3D%3D) James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.Fani Willis just wants to make an example out of my husband. Friend, for years we've been trapped in limbo. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult.As you can imagine after 9 years of prosecution, what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.When we ran out of money, we had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.Friend, that's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... **[Could you send an emergency gift today to help defend James while his trial is ongoing?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54f95092714941689d939c102310084e&_e=sDwGRTqQD-dS7XOVQwl3medZLKiWFEUUOeITPdWkavdpyDZToK3jB-i8rVoPseL9GGAuCGBGuJ7NIfs9dkmpVEbzsSaeQonR1n3LTk03T4mk8sIxNGV7eLJSeh03oCjYRsKJSULndNeOgpKYHBigqCV3RRsO7ogT3xUbE6oNRcS1EMpTrfoSL53iCUE9VD4qK9eruou-oJepM_6VY_MiVI5OSbjme9V_z_wEOWiloTNPQzFILRYT2frIEJtfcFBVV4s7SNW62wNvnTL4HyjATZqxi3Vak7Nhd4gMR_4p5nYEbGVFppXptgtTN6f0oO2F75iZYn0iKBKkrHNwuxS5oWeYgZeJKHfJTrYJoQPtNWMr6za2v5q4pnR1x-m8SKZDSr95KUDP6dfI9lI5duh4Gg%3D%3D)** His legal team is working day and night as they fight Fani Willis’ team in the courtroom and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. We have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as the trial can conclude any day now and we’re quickly running out of time. **[So, if you're able, can you send your emergency tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF today to defend James before it’s too late?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54f95092714941689d939c102310084e&_e=sDwGRTqQD-dS7XOVQwl3medZLKiWFEUUOeITPdWkavdpyDZToK3jB-i8rVoPseL9GGAuCGBGuJ7NIfs9dkmpVEbzsSaeQonR1n3LTk03T4mk8sIxNGV7eLJSeh03oCjYRsKJSULndNeOgpKYHBigqCV3RRsO7ogT3xUbE6oNRcS1EMpTrfoSL53iCUE9VD4qK9eruou-oJepM_6VY_MiVI5OSbjme9V_z_wEOWiloTOGDEjNlQ51DIjzLX-MTLyVb3J0E5wyg5rEgPS7a4t_72ZyB2gZE27bybgRuuwhWtg1pNQ-bcjuDKQq0fshSOIjiV_zV8-1jzBLgiQaVwedskakOAJK76gyOjYRHF3cl-knvFYuJ0T1g32f7VQcBsrERYwqC35dBUsI6ejvs_gP0Q%3D%3D)** It's [**your emergency gift of $35**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=54f95092714941689d939c102310084e&_e=sDwGRTqQD-dS7XOVQwl3medZLKiWFEUUOeITPdWkavdpyDZToK3jB-i8rVoPseL9GGAuCGBGuJ7NIfs9dkmpVEbzsSaeQonR1n3LTk03T4mk8sIxNGV7eLJSeh03oCjYRsKJSULndNeOgpKYHBigqCV3RRsO7ogT3xUbE6oNRcS1EMpTrfoSL53iCUE9VD4qK9eruou-oJepM_6VY_MiVI5OSbjme9V_z_wEOWiloTNw8OV-frH2Sx--5gTyIue_-6elGUdHf_JAnhGRDaVsedst4xF2eVE_-xL9MW6iOfBRvfoso-p6HDt86yJMBcqZYSpSYdjzgtln2dX5-nWYWYIXEhkvk04rI6nJ3gisTLzSik3LjnhXWWL6hkjcfvkBNH5owrhp8dXGfrLmuZwpEA%3D%3D) that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison.Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way in court. Please help James before it's too late! His trial is currently ongoing. clean_body: The trial is going on| | | Dear Fellow Patriot,If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers.And right now, my husband is facing Fani Willis in court as she’s trying to lock him up for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way in court... life in prison could be his reward.Our nightmare started nine years ago, when my husband responded to a call about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So, the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.Fani Willis just wants to make an example out of my husband. Friend, for years we've been trapped in limbo. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult.As you can imagine after 9 years of prosecution, what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.When we ran out of money, we had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.Friend, that's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team is working day and night as they fight Fani Willis’ team in the courtroom and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. We have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as the trial can conclude any day now and we’re quickly running out of time. It's that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison.Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way in court. Please help James before it's too late! His trial is currently ongoing. Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109118918/550062363/2109746102?refcode=250606_MFC_Johnson_FraudstersWalkFree&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRkNDk3Zi0wYzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwChavS59HGBw8oEHkj4uurztpFj9LnhVXiZlWgAzOM=) Friend, Donald Trump just pardoned reality TV stars Todd and Julie Chrisley — a couple convicted of millions in bank fraud and tax evasion. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109118919/550062364/2036686014?refcode=250606_MFC_Johnson_FraudstersWalkFree&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRkNDk3Zi0wYzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwChavS59HGBw8oEHkj4uurztpFj9LnhVXiZlWgAzOM=) If that sounds familiar, it should: Trump himself was found guilty on 34 felony counts for falsifying business records to cover up hush money payments. Fraud is practically part of his political brand. Now he’s using the powers of the presidency to wipe clean the records of others convicted of the same crimes he was just found guilty of. This isn’t just about one pardon. It’s about a broken system where the powerful protect each other, and accountability is optional if you’re famous or rich enough. Americans who’ve played by the rules their whole lives don’t get that kind of favor. I believe we need leaders who follow the law — not exploit it. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. [**If you’re sick of a justice system that bends for the elite and breaks the rest of us, chip in $10 right now -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us defeat this brand of corruption.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109118920/550062365/2036686014?refcode=250606_MFC_Johnson_FraudstersWalkFree&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRkNDk3Zi0wYzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwChavS59HGBw8oEHkj4uurztpFj9LnhVXiZlWgAzOM=) Justice shouldn’t be reserved for the well-connected. Let’s fight to make it equal for everyone. Thanks,
Lee Johnson
Democratic candidate for the U.S. Senate

name: Laura Friedman
subject: My effort to protect Rim of the Valley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109119437/550064013/-319689629?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcxNThjYWItMGY0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EMDYUd_ybXV2ntgtVlQpWmgWAiLw6lo7fD0YWYCVrw4=) Friend, The Rim of the Valley includes some of Los Angeles’ most iconic natural treasures. And with those resources, comes the responsibility to protect them. **That’s why I’m proud to have introduced legislation with Senator Adam Schiff to protect our parkland, and improve access for local communities.** Not only will this legislation provide local communities with better ways to enjoy our beautiful public lands, but it ensures that we protect the natural resources and wildlife that call the Rim of the Valley home. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109119440/550064016/-541961926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcxNThjYWItMGY0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EMDYUd_ybXV2ntgtVlQpWmgWAiLw6lo7fD0YWYCVrw4=&emci=36a56076-0f43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=27158cab-0f43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8447100) | ****[Read More](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109119442/550064019/-541961926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcxNThjYWItMGY0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EMDYUd_ybXV2ntgtVlQpWmgWAiLw6lo7fD0YWYCVrw4=&emci=36a56076-0f43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=27158cab-0f43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8447100)****
---
I will fight to keep the Rim of the Valley thriving for years to come. But as encouraged as I am by this, it is just one important step among many that we must continue to take for the environmental health of our region.
As your Assemblymember, I drafted first-in-the-nation, comprehensive legislation to address our climate. And I’m continuing that fight every day in Washington to drag my colleagues in Congress to that same standard.
More soon,
Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, The Rim of the Valley includes some of Los Angeles’ most iconic natural treasures. And with those resources, comes the responsibility to protect them. That’s why I’m proud to have introduced legislation with Senator Adam Schiff to protect our parkland, and improve access for local communities. Not only will this legislation provide local communities with better ways to enjoy our beautiful public lands, but it ensures that we protect the natural resources and wildlife that call the Rim of the Valley home. | ** I will fight to keep the Rim of the Valley thriving for years to come. But as encouraged as I am by this, it is just one important step among many that we must continue to take for the environmental health of our region. As your Assemblymember, I drafted first-in-the-nation, comprehensive legislation to address our climate. And I’m continuing that fight every day in Washington to drag my colleagues in Congress to that same standard. More soon, Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Oregon GOP
subject: Honoring the Heroes of D-Day.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
81 years later, we remember their courage, their sacrifice, and their legacy.

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend, On this day, 81 years ago, thousands of brave American soldiers stormed the beaches of Normandy in the most daring and pivotal operation of World War II. D-Day wasn’t just a military maneuver; it was a turning point in the fight for freedom, a moment when ordinary young men became the vanguard for liberty for the world. Because of their courage, tyranny was pushed back. The arc of history bent toward freedom. And the world saw what American resolve truly meant. Today, we honor their bravery.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/j8dkhE8wdPCv/SEYzZzgzYS92WGtweHB0d2I3U051dVU2ZDZhNy8rSGduMkJnUU9FR01td014V08ybldSKzZSeDdZa3NQKy9ZSHFHV2p4M2VGOS9xdndFeGhnRXNaTm5ONkJLSFhKZy9CUmdNRytMOGhETGc9S0/)
---
| | We remember the 160,000 Allied troops, including over 73,000 Americans, who risked everything. We honor more than 4,000 who gave their lives that day for the sake of something bigger than themselves. And we reaffirm our gratitude to each generation of Americans who have worn the uniform in defense of liberty. As Oregonians, as Americans, and as beneficiaries of their sacrifice, we say thank you. Let us never forget the price they paid for our freedom. In remembrance, Oregon Republican Party
---
---
---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I’m not ashamed of my “F” rating from the NRA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
It’s time to keep guns out of dangerous hands and weapons of war off of our streets.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2439%2E400544%2EnlVx0w)
Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day, so I wanted to take a minute to tell you why I’m dedicated to the fight against gun violence, and why I’m determined to enact gun safety laws in New Mexico that have the power to save lives.
I believe with all my heart that children shouldn’t have to worry about an active shooter at school, workers shouldn’t need to fear being shot in the workplace, and families deserve to feel safe in their neighborhoods. But right now, that’s not the case in our state.
**Here in New Mexico, we are suffering from a gun death rate higher than the national average.** It’s an issue anyone seeking to lead our state must be ready to address head-on. From the recent mass shooting in Las Cruces to the fatal shooting of a Bloomfield police officer earlier this week, our neighborhoods become less safe when dangerous weapons fall into the wrong hands.
We must take action at the state level to keep guns out of the hands of people who should never have a gun. We need 100% background checks. We must close loopholes. And we need major funding for behavioral health programs that are accessible to everyone. I know not every person will agree with me, but I refuse to shy away from the solutions that have the power to save lives.
**The NRA gave me an “F” rating both times I ran for Congress, and you can be sure the gun lobby will be ready to spend massive sums of money to defeat our grassroots campaign for governor.**
**[Will you make a $5 contribution to our campaign today? The best way we can overcome their inevitable smears and attack ads is to fully fund our campaign so we can spread our message to as many New Mexicans as possible.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250606_1_gvad?amount=5&refcode=em20250606-2439&refcode2=2439_400544_nlVx0w&akid=2439%2E400544%2EnlVx0w)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250606_1_gvad?amount=5&refcode=em20250606-2439&refcode2=2439_400544_nlVx0w&akid=2439%2E400544%2EnlVx0w)**
Look, as someone raised in a military family, I understand the importance of preserving our Second Amendment rights. But I believe that is still possible while enacting commonsense gun safety measures that keep weapons of war off of our streets.
While I served in Congress, I voted for the Enhanced Background Checks Act, Bipartisan Background Checks Act, and I proudly cosponsored the Violence Against Women Reauthorization Act. As governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce fighter for smart policies that keep the people and communities we love safe and free from the threat of gun violence.
**[If you’re with me, please make a $5 contribution to our campaign so we can spread our message to voters across New Mexico, win this competitive race, and build a safer future for our state.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250606_1_gvad?amount=5&refcode=em20250606-2439&refcode2=2439_400544_nlVx0w&akid=2439%2E400544%2EnlVx0w)**
Together, we can end the epidemic of gun violence.
Yours,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250606-1&t=2&refcode2=2439_400544_nlVx0w&akid=2439%2E400544%2EnlVx0w)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2439%2E400544%2EnlVx0w)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2439%2E400544%2EnlVx0w)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Trustee Appointments and Statewide Engagement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Trustee Appointments and Statewide Engagement**_
---
Friends, On Monday, Governor Braun made several new appointments and reappointments to various state boards and commissions, including the Indiana University Board of Trustees. Governor Braun appointed Sage Steele, James Bopp Jr., Brian Eagle, and W. Quinn Buckner to the Indiana University Board of Trustees. These appointments will not only keep our state's flagship university fiscally sound, but help to ensure antisemitism, censorship, and radical leftwing ideologies will no longer dictate university policy. In addition to his Board of Trustees appointments, Governor Braun appointed members to the following boards: All Payers Claims Data Base Advisory Board, Board of Accountancy, Board of Proprietary Education, Coroners Training Board, Indiana Board of Licensure for Professional Geologists, the Indiana Election Commission, and the Ball State Board of Trustees. This week, Governor Braun traveled across the state, emphasizing his commitment to civic involvement, innovation, and economic growth. On Monday, he spoke at the Scouting America Southern Indiana Distinguished Citizen Award Luncheon in Borden, then welcomed international guests to Indianapolis for the Global Entrepreneurship Congress, where he moderated the opening panel. On Thursday, he participated in a fireside chat at the Innovation Showcase in Indianapolis, followed by a ceremonial signing of SEA 520 in Fort Wayne with Rep. Martin Carbaugh and Sen. Justin Busch. He ended the day with another fireside chat at the Greater Fort Wayne Inc. Annual Meeting. As Senator, Mike Braun made annual visits to every corner of our state, all 92 counties, and I am proud to join him in carrying on that tradition! I have already had the opportunity to meet with grassroots leaders and everyday Hoosiers from 42 of our incredible counties, and to see so much of our great state along the way! As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _**Governor Braun Hosts Global Entrepreneurship Network Congress**_

Governor Braun welcomed Global Entrepreneurship Congress attendees from around the world to Indiana’s capital city, where he moderated a panel featuring leaders from some of the state’s most entrepreneurial companies. _**Governor Braun Supports Scouting America**_

"As an Eagle Scout, I always enjoy meeting the next generation of leaders." \- Governor Braun via [X.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/sMnC_yP35amQCj3x44MzYm3ouSM0s_Dam8fSUoshVSQPCxPxsuaBnp4_I5SjLFeCdJK3m2ML9Nn0Z2YZuWhZDMo8Uj7ZrDi-jAEhu402KVDWKn3IqxQf2SLl5nvotPOgooXEfwQlhBLuN5jn7C0oYGXTlR8dnZTU_Xk3hT2rDVNQ5faRiEfoFjMlE2vZOMb86OQwS3sr-_S6fnTlWQQ7wdlR_-h7KhlRFDN3j5mgb1Q8CiOSPtSDfJAkRRz417ZQ7xZPO6jV93tiT9bmAiRghlWxmIDKK70znBJfAi-KatSQbbgec04ii-YYQJEXBtko0ciPLP23sJqpcXjuPxwP8dg6yw7YhPc1VdzdfFMDzEVVtLtMVCprGYydp1qAEBw56yKdG21dIBS_dx6OWbtv-FF2q3UaXQ5TWlrH-v23iA/rP-6ZNUp1_8jiMVN2aGcF6Qovmbnk7JL/9)[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/GRazv-gzGsQAs5esrs2Qr9x8_coz-XjNUQRr7LRNSUr5zh-Xtxk8bqo84kzwHRTJNcV91-WMK2yQeci0R0h1DAvkih4jzIjqAx5Og-fYU7k7yYCpBsNI1SKbSApLXSWHjcqoTBE7-tkWmzsy-xzo-Dpi0v5dUCKKAxSXltQVhI_lVA3c2idaaVdA8RHyaksE1KNQcTPcdeYbZ6AeQ0f-_CpZNeZje8e7XHzO-8ePhDYULJNfHPftEtxqGCrpWH-u-lhqVFZ59wCgRkh2-KJWrNMcSyu2MBBeU35OSovHKaAajQP7rmE0K481qBlRvqar1PJbJFQ4Ok3P2q_TVzs9smInHohJmUjQl8QoQ5iJTGoFWWXCUrH5vl4lKdHFSZoSoVYn19k7bqpq3CiP_nihI-0C1E9lM2ibY9Xrny1K-A/QCQoRP8fU32RW2AroErLTSVMfRmAG_w-/9)[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/K8pzVIoTicqtwNzGDQn7gzio5O21MbukG7kiW76ZkBQPoOO_SigCve1eqHnPD1qJ_023Ain8wgE_wHVaeCXA2BaLrJGl7fqjv-ZIf1oQ078AiBg5-hdpbqa2kH2RxOr7eTgzk-_4nPaeSOl9Ve3425-tmNg7dGjUykEpwQ48wquctQYFnChGXNv9VTrlIPQbWoPD2dP6qhoF5HoVO2amHxCdTNiG_Lc1v5US_Xm1JpkFgdnBA3yOPvzzwYRD5w1Cb2x8LcYh4Y_VzN066d1k2oz4b1bhmLx_rXk2pf4EW3AQbJhn7XG9Kfv1E49i9YHPcDZ1UjXHaaIToO2L7oecviNVUotz7pNCkPO0MMWZpfTjUiCU0HVYBUsuxZ7uwl12AWB9agsKFQDGgsRpKgSKt-9PjxOyvFYO2k8xU21zpw/0-TlxlJ_hLX-K3NyP85F8yagfhGCyvRT/9)

_**Governor Braun Appoints IU Trustees**_
---
---
Governor Braun recently appointed Sage Steele, James Bopp Jr., Brian Eagle, and W. Quinn Buckner to serve on the Indiana University Board of Trustees. Sage Steel is a former ESPN host and commentator. James Bopp Jr. is a conservative lawyer formerly part of Indiana Attorney General Todd Rokita's team. Brian Eagle is an attorney, wealth consultant, and partner at his firm Eagle and Fein, as well as a current member of the Central Indiana Community Foundation’s Cornerstone Advisory Council. clean_body: | | | | | | | Trustee Appointments and Statewide Engagement Friends, On Monday, Governor Braun made several new appointments and reappointments to various state boards and commissions, including the Indiana University Board of Trustees. Governor Braun appointed Sage Steele, James Bopp Jr., Brian Eagle, and W. Quinn Buckner to the Indiana University Board of Trustees. These appointments will not only keep our state's flagship university fiscally sound, but help to ensure antisemitism, censorship, and radical leftwing ideologies will no longer dictate university policy. In addition to his Board of Trustees appointments, Governor Braun appointed members to the following boards: All Payers Claims Data Base Advisory Board, Board of Accountancy, Board of Proprietary Education, Coroners Training Board, Indiana Board of Licensure for Professional Geologists, the Indiana Election Commission, and the Ball State Board of Trustees. This week, Governor Braun traveled across the state, emphasizing his commitment to civic involvement, innovation, and economic growth. On Monday, he spoke at the Scouting America Southern Indiana Distinguished Citizen Award Luncheon in Borden, then welcomed international guests to Indianapolis for the Global Entrepreneurship Congress, where he moderated the opening panel. On Thursday, he participated in a fireside chat at the Innovation Showcase in Indianapolis, followed by a ceremonial signing of SEA 520 in Fort Wayne with Rep. Martin Carbaugh and Sen. Justin Busch. He ended the day with another fireside chat at the Greater Fort Wayne Inc. Annual Meeting. As Senator, Mike Braun made annual visits to every corner of our state, all 92 counties, and I am proud to join him in carrying on that tradition! I have already had the opportunity to meet with grassroots leaders and everyday Hoosiers from 42 of our incredible counties, and to see so much of our great state along the way! As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Hosts Global Entrepreneurship Network Congress Governor Braun welcomed Global Entrepreneurship Congress attendees from around the world to Indiana’s capital city, where he moderated a panel featuring leaders from some of the state’s most entrepreneurial companies. "Companies like these are reinvesting in Indiana to create a lasting impact on entrepreneurship, innovation, workforce and quality of life here in the Hoosier state." \- Governor Braun via Governor Braun Supports Scouting America Governor Braun attended and spoke at the Scouting America Lincoln Heritage Council Southern Indiana Distinguished Citizen Award Luncheon. The mission of the Scouts has always been to give young people the skills, discipline, and inclination to be active and responsible citizens, and that mission is as alive and important as it has ever been. "As an Eagle Scout, I always enjoy meeting the next generation of leaders." \- Governor Braun via Governor Braun Appoints IU Trustees Governor Braun recently appointed Sage Steele, James Bopp Jr., Brian Eagle, and W. Quinn Buckner to serve on the Indiana University Board of Trustees. Sage Steel is a former ESPN host and commentator. James Bopp Jr. is a conservative lawyer formerly part of Indiana Attorney General Todd Rokita's team. Brian Eagle is an attorney, wealth consultant, and partner at his firm Eagle and Fein, as well as a current member of the Central Indiana Community Foundation’s Cornerstone Advisory Council. "I am confident that these appointees, who are all Indiana University alumni, will serve in the best interest of the university and will help guide IU in the right direction as a premier flagship university in our state." \- Governor Braun via | LaPorte County Lincoln Day Dinner Indianapolis GOP Club Wayne County GOP Henry County GOP Chairwoman's County Visits: 42 Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Summer and Fall Internship Program! ✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning ✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections ✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana Apply Today! Spots are limited! 🔗 | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Mike Braun Sage Steele, James Bopp Jr., Brian Eagle, and W. Quinn Buckner to serve on the IU Board of Trustees. He also the Lincoln Heritage Council luncheon and moderated the operating panel at the Global Entrepreneurship Congress. Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith his town hall tour, which is part of an ongoing effort to engage with Hoosiers on state policies and community concerns. Beckwith emphasized the importance of transparency and civic engagement, stating that open dialogue between government and the public is essential for effective governance. Secretary Diego Morales the opening remarks for a 2025 National Election Conference, welcoming national election leaders and emphasizing the importance of collaboration and shared learning. Treasurer Daniel Elliott out following the recent terrorist attack in Boulder, Colorado, saying, "I am heartbroken over the terrorist attack against peacefully assembled Jews and supporters of Israel in Boulder. There can be no place for antisemitism in America or in the world. The individual who did this attack should face justice for his heinous act." Comptroller Elise Nieshalla her efforts to modernize the state office name and officeholder's title, stating, "Today, Senate Enrolled Act (SEA) 221 reached Gov. Mike Braun’s desk, marking the culmination of a multiyear initiative to clarify the office’s name and responsibilities for Indiana taxpayers." Attorney General Todd Rokita a legal victory for Hoosiers, permanently banning robocall scammer John Spiller from the telecom industry and ordering him to pay over $600,000 for violating his 2023 court order. Spiller’s companies were behind billions of illegal robocalls, including to numbers on the Do Not Call Registry. Rokita called the ruling “a significant victory” in protecting Hoosiers from deceptive and disruptive robocalls. Senator Todd Young , alongside Senator Ted Cruz, a resolution to designate June as “Life Month,” commemorating the anniversary of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade. The resolution honors the dignity of human life, supports pro-life advocates, and urges continued resources to help women and families choose life. Senator Young highlighted Indiana’s strong pro-life leadership and praised those providing care to pregnant mothers and families in need. Senator Jim Banks the Visa Overstay Penalties Act to make visa overstays a criminal offense like illegal border crossings. The bill proposes jail time of up to six months for first offenses and up to two years for repeat violations, along with significantly higher fines to address this national security threat. Congressman Rudy Yakym a resolution supporting June 2-8, 2025, as “National Trailer Safety Week.” Yakym emphasized the importance of trailer safety, noting that northern Indiana manufacturers produce a wide range of trailers. The resolution aims to promote safe towing practices to help keep roads safer nationwide. Congressman Marlin Stutzman a letter urging the Department of Defense to add 40 space vehicles with Hypersonic and Ballistic Tracking Space Sensor payloads to President Trump’s Golden Dome initiative. They requested $750 million in FY25 funding to accelerate the launch schedule, emphasizing the need to strengthen homeland defense against evolving threats. Rep. Stutzman highlighted Indiana’s commitment to supporting innovation and national security. Congressman Jim Baird the NSF and USDA Interagency Research Act to boost collaboration between the National Science Foundation and the Department of Agriculture. The bill supports innovative research and technology to improve agricultural sustainability. Baird highlighted the importance of advanced tools like AI to enhance farming, weather forecasting, and crop yields. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz other Hoosier leaders in meeting with VA Secretary Doug Collins to discuss strengthening the VA system and ensuring our veterans receive the care and support they deserve. Congressman Jefferson Shreve the Indiana Chamber Board of Directors, saying afterwords, "It was a wide-ranging, balanced convo with a room full of engaged business leaders from across our state!" Congressman Mark Messmer Chairwomen Lisa McClain and the House Republicans to discuss the One Big Beautiful Big. The conversation centered around investments in rural communities and the end of waste, fraud, and abuse in SNAP. Congresswoman Erin Houchin an op-ed, "The Truth About the One Big Beautiful Bill—and What Democrats Don't Want You to Know." name: James Carville
subject: A bellwether for the entire country
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120096/550065978/-246804040?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzg0ZmFmOS0xMDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e76divnifGNxoaJsyaQ6vINZX51PCEXMTWcz0O70pZE=)
---
Peter,

I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: **this one is as important as it gets.**

The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.

[_**So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a contribution to Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120097/550065979/-246804040?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzg0ZmFmOS0xMDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e76divnifGNxoaJsyaQ6vINZX51PCEXMTWcz0O70pZE=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120099/550065980/-246804040?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzg0ZmFmOS0xMDQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e76divnifGNxoaJsyaQ6vINZX51PCEXMTWcz0O70pZE=)
---
Here’s what’s got me terrified:

The experts have called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.

If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen.

Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.

That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.

clean_body: This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead. | = Peter, I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead. = | = Here’s what’s got me terrified: The experts have called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen. Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, James Carville * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. **[BIG NEWS:](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Sh25XGjOzIZtdQhtLxQM4fVJ8Zsp_8RqtsdUGimPfq4lIoqAjr20YMVRwEf49ue7Yp5l1-OgNE11R8RB1b6ajZxZh1NoFLWcDb_DP2_N53ceZpsfW22OjXGl3RvrwAU5iK5FY4FxrAiDfVZ2bfOzyT2t6hMZ1sE7uN_PO4mZ3Xa7nVmRC0iP6VxblaQNQ4GgCZNGttY08SKImyfy2oPcBNsp8fo4vcAfPTkVPEL8KArNfB-aF43-RLv9-Ou8ZieGSLn6UEYoxdB4DBRREEDe15BLlfVlyt_9cXyL5pdFtcijb0NolDHsY_ym63Jq4aQjK0O3ctZdVTxcUj_U_SOeFSmRBfgm1KauWtfIofRaGz5otcLGBBA1-jjttooRkGMQdWRipJoj3N6D2p2UT9yZ6XvJ3KsDWN7SmFsrUw9995ZN-0hUvOe1gmrNQFFRz6Go-MaqmPDr1CqithDI6BzdcKIXnBJys-jFEmnmBDdp1e-TMGOJ1Z6rTlmX_oYTPRldCKc9vxYkrp4ciihwWOryhQAeQVYmBvgmcHrt6Z1ZFOVNvmTmy4dtOgMbFVw-8JE9hSU-oBwY178p2vR4J5BkoUQBPzqpF7b8UFnC-5vgWlEyEQNeBrKD-AM_w7AfEUfiCj7-39JN9Pj18o1L_9m8T2BHsu7MF-GnmbX4RTEHZpKei8PfUPOA6S5DSXlokHWk2IF8wDeEu5baOQGo-0imp2hKqPdcm70Zl_jaLS2uSIfqc9Jo7Yc3yk1SSjucFXkO3OeH6BfKx8C7c6ZyM7GK8zS_Fqsvhm4j5giahU4WB5Olq2urQP2A7z1l-FK0f3metZB4tl_Rh2ScEINXDAWmE0Qp3K9ENtScUgBRXvw5xDTKEVW2hVJsAW4FEW45cz2WgRCGhM7YxInH57FPAn3x2qLx6fvXspec0wM4pBetYpT4YNsIjMzYoF5pOrtpcscQoYT0wct7LB_FTw7pA9umhp57sBH2bjPRP4hYAwDMQ3aCsb3TGf9e9tbjpfWLi1RG1ZPNgiZNByNWH1ATcBMDHoKhHYVHd3SJouINMoDVUILqC_D0ko6z/OyMHbNLOd2KTwjVupt__rGEPHge60y32/9) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

# Friday, June 6, 2025

**Good Afternoon!** Kids are an endless source of hilarious one-liners—but [in this story](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb8GukFeY7ymcJHmdZs2JTJ4bCYYjMZ-i_j7iOQT0l9dnXN-fU1fjhId8afb0YYYphrydOBVEtaKPM1vjsgbHTGy8xv54rEsTPMkhRxAaBB68o7SPanW24AosW_RfnyqUSoxmL5dbW9wcDjKwQg9igWH4N28GJTSzKPSuiX7vAkttBRi7E1nBrUM0isXFtTB-UYJ9FQzd78zHXXFkO78jdwteW-TXWs9S9P_aOSrka_rurr3eWWu6_0MGvkqld0RkYEdFSzwYcQGITP884NHEHA_U74RwYWKDCvClXkrUFYKFUqllIAOeEK8XaV8QETHLVt_XpQSFf3ZKBF3R-kvV_3voN9W_gkAAP__wjGP-Q), one mom’s innocent DIY filming turned into a kindergarten tale for the ages. Read more below. Do you have your own "did-my-kid-just-really-say-that?" moment? We’d love to hear it! Reply to this email and let us know. Enjoy _The Feel Good Flyover_ and have a great weekend! Today’s sponsor is [The Pour Over](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7EoYMcZGFpF2ZK1I8J-D_waMBbgRPn7Khlade58ro6uzufZnC0FWvzFRtTOO1NdMgveS8BaMZtxyx7zlRbvs4UrQQEsU6bRCC66He93vDdgKTyMakA7RIGyQf22VweheDfIZtayU4iDm9yIfFSHveTCjmgVwDBip0RD-mnjPe8F5wc5tEOnpk6Asm7C3llgiiNQTbn9SrTUGV14pBvmdkqxCXqudS1MvjNxYuJUyC_bOmPGts64pi2_pin7J5enrUZT0pYnZPL462Kit3Fl8uPJIwJtkcnj5afFHz7ZuFryC5NHhxh8SuAygX00WcN6pxCo9HumuI-Wwutm_XffmxbfAQAA___QHZVc), a free newsletter that helps you stay informed without feeling overwhelmed—rooted in faith, not outrage.

## Burger King Grad Gets Big Break
Mykale Baker, a Georgia teen, became an online sensation after [rushing to his Burger King job](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb8GukFeY7ymcJHmdZs2JTJ4bCYYjMZ-i_j7iOQT0l9dnXN-fU1fjhId8afb0YYYphrydOBVEtaKPM1vjsgbHTGy8xv54rEsTPMkhRxAaBB68o7SPanW24AosW_RfnyqUSoxmL5dbW9wcDjKwQg9igWH4N28GJTSzKPSuiX7vAkttBRi7E1nBrUM0isXFtTB-UYJ9FQzd78zHXXFkO78jdwteW-TXWs9S9P_aOSrka_rurr3eWWu6_0MGvkqld0RkYEdFSzwYcQGITP884NHEHA_U74RwYWKDCvClXkrUFYKFUqllIAOeEK8XaV8QETHLVt_XpQSFf3ZKBF3R-kvV_3voN9W_gkAAP__wjGP-Q) just hours after graduating high school—still wearing his cap, stole, and medals. The moment, [captured on social media](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMV3Q2B4MKVwkukqXW612S8vgMczGgcg4QXn7FfsK254jfcX_dXVXz4nn8b-_k41jdCUubqZtTVQKZdc_80j5xvM4Zh9uHNZA65C5dwpUcwBzAOOC5_R2WAUbiRTpiqxs8agQmk5XkyXZRo-N7w3GqDSS7BAxSOkDtFHKiu2ugQGjAI66q7sGh0YF9HEgE30QCBS4LLn-XnguE8X0Xl6U62G5V8lOpTxWoU9CXYS6bNtWv5dnefa0__viyzAJfXkJ_e8Mn_GDD9CdT1W24bFxSryaViCMd8_plyx_bvGy6icAAP__FDBz4Q) by customer Maria Mendoza, quickly went viral and sparked a wave of generosity. It turns out, Baker wasn’t even scheduled to work that night. He noticed the late-night rush and jumped behind the counter to help his team. Moved by his dedication, Mendoza launched a [GoFundMe that has now topped $190,000](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFywyAQRL9G6tBgDmG5oEjjzmlTMljcYWIEmhO2x3-fUfIJKbbb2Z33vi7u4lNOJX76BS1Fco2qK_jaMraG7K4Pjsj3VGJkH-4pbAG3mdPVKalGIY2QxgWf8tvpPlhCVAg92sNRn5SW4wT9zQKM4I8wgwla-isYOGkgGoHwQHqCPtl9TRpplJQnmIZp1POogvY0oyEfOi0xpFZ5-K6ptBtSftcn8jDXpc_21tq6dfDRqXOnzqvnVpCHWOlRwoJ7qVNn2sN1EX9MYocSrYq55owRhReB0S8927C-Us5pM8dOy7j4lH9_2r8FPa36CQAA__9ZjnzB). The Burger King Foundation also awarded him a $10,000 scholarship, recognizing his work ethic. Baker had been considering delaying college due to financial hardship, but the outpouring of support has [opened new doors](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0bGuozAQBdCvMd1Ejg0OKSi2oXvbbokMHtuzGAbZzov4-xXZT3jNNFe60pn752v6spRoD7_thoMPfqqepx3fJWGtmKf5lQPmlfYQsnUrueKwLJnmSUnVgTQgzeQspXNqGzd4RIW6weH-aJ-qlV2vmzh4nJVt_aOTTuu7NEp7vfj5oZ-9M6bXDQ1XmzTSKCmfur_1Xbt0yrXWL2i8daKV6Khyvv1l2mtEn07-xnxbeGvSEGs9itC_hBqFGvfz4FKvSKjxKhZqlOY6rVDjq8DlE2r8b4MLB7gdiU9E2M7VJoTZrpjhHRnyq0R0UBnenFcokXwF6ytmCMg5kIVIIUJZInOC600vW4l3COQrOrjL9RMmm0ukA3zmDbwtFTyzg0B2r0KNTR7c8aaUqJiHaGXYLKWPr_54mO9B_QsAAP__51unJQ).
## Kids Say the Wildest Things
When Aurora McCausland’s kindergartner told his teacher, _“Mommy makes videos in her bedroom but only when I’m not home,”_ [the social media influencer mom was mortified](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u2zAMRp_G3hgokvw3eOiS7XbtaPBalMVGtgKKiZu3L9JX6Px9ODg4v76WL-TMx_YTd5rjFheNZTnorJlUSZbvp2wkdz62TTDcOdRAdRX-XqyxHZgeTL8E5PxefBvmSGTJtTRfBz9Zb7rRtWkOwzQ4NH4dVod97FwYr4jGT-TXKTrX8vyhmd701pjJjZex82tng8e4Uh8xNN5QYC1y-V340EQxv8uL5LKWvc1zUn3Uxv1o7K2xt_M8L8_HWUTT-3No7G0vO3CFvYhyZAqAUUkgkcCdj0CyoehBAko5V9BEoITrZz8TKtREEApViEUAIfOLjw3oz7WVOTxOzplrPzTebDty_mel_53zNdu_AQAA__-ntY8Z). The innocent mix-up, later clarified as her DIY content filming, struck a nerve with parents everywhere who’ve endured their own similarly awkward moments. The story tapped into a goldmine of parenting humor: the wild, [unfiltered things kids say](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb7YoxhgPDF28pWtHhP0e-DXYREBiJV9fpb_Q_XQn3ffFXhxFOsKX29H44G31yR54loi1YrbLPQfMVzpCyA6uBAWwrJkWK7gYWq5ariw4ik8rGzAeUWDfoPkY5SQkH3TfbIZPo3bTqgBHobkDQOUmpyROEqXWQ0PmbeOKK8H51OtOD3IdBEjnV1TeAZMcgWrK3U-io27o4zM9MHdr2ptotlpvhfWfTMxMzOd5dsv99fKI8AaYmHe6YrmlLTMxbxRdpnQvbd3oCKWtCSBiLu2CkfCBTTZwOylGKmpkkofdUfwr1X8vehjxGwAA__9fZH8k). Like the child who told a teacher they lived in a “crack house” (it was chipped drywall), the one who claimed mom drinks beer on the way to school (it was a Red Bull), or the kid who confidently announced Grandpa “kills people” for a living (he’s a hospice chaplain). A reminder of the delight and chaos of raising curious little humans.
## Cat Survives Canyon Fall, Finds New Home
A 12-year-old tabby cat named Mirage has [found a new lease on life](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO2yAURp8Gb1g3F8xvDwyVKm_pUlUdLQwX5zbEWEAc5e2r9BU6f9Knc87v63J1nHjffrgH2bjFpcW87PSqiVqjsqzPslG5875txYU7hxqo-sLrgoCDBCPBLMFxei-6CzYSIamO7OVLT6hhGFV3s-OKK4wm0KRGGi7aq2j8pJ1b9eCCgo7t5w0MGASY1NiPg_YDBu2iJxNdEBoocMul_5N5bzeK6Z1PKr3Pjy7ZW2tHFeqbwFng7Fb_Mei3_JkFzr9-Cpy9a7I-y8knBakBZMy5yehSki7ko1GQhap_kjw45SZwri2Xt1AzB6G-XxCV1gjQFRuOF6fE1XwJDdvDcfrH0f474GnxbwAAAP__66OF7A) after surviving a 380-foot fall at Bryce Canyon National Park. During a search-and-rescue mission for a couple who had fallen from a cliff edge over a railing, crews discovered a dirt-covered pet carrier. Inside was Mirage, remarkably still alive despite the sheer drop. [She was taken in](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQAL8GOpCxjSGFi9fQ5bVXWgavnb0YHK03RPn70-UXrptqRpqvq7t6zHik_34HG1N0HIs74FUzMAO59UkJ6I5HSuTDHUMNUDfC1Ukhx06YThgXPOa3022wEUCCasEOk75ILcZZtTcrJ6-NDNMaxDhMo_bD4LWelZ6NUmbQLdpfmzDCSCEuau7nUW-jDNrHDUz0odECAnKh_rvgwTeI-V1OoH4re5vtjflRG_WvkUsjlxUqR0I4Qu0LpUYulQsh1EYuETw_6YM7kt8ydHdkfnf1SSeeULvoc-62jDG2ZMPjhTljNVOjRdo95k-R_7zqtPInAAD__wC0gI8) by Best Friends Animal Society in Salt Lake City, where she was treated for multiple injuries, including fractured ribs and fluid in her heart. Against the odds, Mirage made a full recovery. Among the rescuers that day was Utah Department of Public Safety pilot Chelsea Tugaw, who never forgot the brave cat she helped recover. With the blessing of Mirage’s late owners’ family, Tugaw recently adopted the feline, pledging to give her a peaceful retirement filled with love and comfort. [See a video of the kitty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O2zAQxfHTUJ2MEb9VqEhgKEWwSbotCYoc0pOlJIOiV_DtA-cK2__w8PB_f3Nvngpt-ZdfcUo5uZZ2t-F5FGwNq1seNWP9oC3n6uMHxSPiESotjgNXPegetIueytPJLk4JkaPocBqMHLkEZUV3m-yivBXGxrQI0FIJM3hINsgEEAcUHU2vNdCgOcAo7MUqGRSP0qeAOvnIJGCkttfL3522dsNUnvsn1kvY165Mt9buBxPfGJ8Zn8_zvNB2NJ-rX1-C8bkiFsbn688_4493-K1MeFkxP9rqjv1RAzJxpexwXTAyrv16Z-I7ZVcpMnEVSZlohe0XocdeGpt6L0bT68F48KCsD7arU7yfVAod2jAJefVU_h9sXy77OfF_AQAA__8WMIqk).

clean_body: Mykale Baker, a Georgia teen, became an online sensation after just hours after graduating high school—still wearing his cap, stole, and medals. | | | | | | Friday, June 6, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Kids are an endless source of hilarious one-liners—but , one mom’s innocent DIY filming turned into a kindergarten tale for the ages. Read more below. Do you have your own "did-my-kid-just-really-say-that?" moment? We’d love to hear it! Reply to this email and let us know. Enjoy The Feel Good Flyover and have a great weekend! Today’s sponsor is , a free newsletter that helps you stay informed without feeling overwhelmed—rooted in faith, not outrage. | Burger King Grad Gets Big Break Mykale Baker, a Georgia teen, became an online sensation after just hours after graduating high school—still wearing his cap, stole, and medals. The moment, by customer Maria Mendoza, quickly went viral and sparked a wave of generosity. It turns out, Baker wasn’t even scheduled to work that night. He noticed the late-night rush and jumped behind the counter to help his team. Moved by his dedication, Mendoza launched a . The Burger King Foundation also awarded him a $10,000 scholarship, recognizing his work ethic. Baker had been considering delaying college due to financial hardship, but the outpouring of support has . Kids Say the Wildest Things When Aurora McCausland’s kindergartner told his teacher, “Mommy makes videos in her bedroom but only when I’m not home,” . The innocent mix-up, later clarified as her DIY content filming, struck a nerve with parents everywhere who’ve endured their own similarly awkward moments. The story tapped into a goldmine of parenting humor: the wild, . Like the child who told a teacher they lived in a “crack house” (it was chipped drywall), the one who claimed mom drinks beer on the way to school (it was a Red Bull), or the kid who confidently announced Grandpa “kills people” for a living (he’s a hospice chaplain). A reminder of the delight and chaos of raising curious little humans. Cat Survives Canyon Fall, Finds New Home A 12-year-old tabby cat named Mirage has after surviving a 380-foot fall at Bryce Canyon National Park. During a search-and-rescue mission for a couple who had fallen from a cliff edge over a railing, crews discovered a dirt-covered pet carrier. Inside was Mirage, remarkably still alive despite the sheer drop. by Best Friends Animal Society in Salt Lake City, where she was treated for multiple injuries, including fractured ribs and fluid in her heart. Against the odds, Mirage made a full recovery. Among the rescuers that day was Utah Department of Public Safety pilot Chelsea Tugaw, who never forgot the brave cat she helped recover. With the blessing of Mirage’s late owners’ family, Tugaw recently adopted the feline, pledging to give her a peaceful retirement filled with love and comfort. . | Flying together with our sponsor Tariffs, elections, global tension... It’s a lot. Staying informed matters—but let’s be honest, it can also be overwhelming, divisive, and exhausting. That’s why so many people are turning to . Instead of fueling division, the news becomes a tool to strengthen your faith and spark loving action in response. Join over 1.2 million readers getting Christ-first, anger-free (and even kinda funny) news—three times a week. . | ➤ A 102-year-old woman in China survived a third-floor fall after accidentally mistaking a window for a door. A dramatic rescue video shows dozens of passersby catching her with a turf mat. () ➤ Four-year-old Louis Hood, born with a condition that left him with only half of a functioning heart, celebrated his fourth successful surgery by singing Elton John’s I’m Still Standing shortly after the operation. () ➤ Kayakers in Mexico rescued a dog headed toward the deadly Tomata 2 waterfall after it survived a 60-foot plunge over Tomata 1. The group paused their descent to save it just in time. The two will tee off at Oakmont next Thursday. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: [sign] Fight Trump’s Muslim and African ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We must fight this travel ban and protect our communities from racist attacks. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWe9jw0yBWNGWV_lOhZt2gQzeJrtLUwLRbwtEZ0r4An6Z7dsmyvLgGCAyvGztPKs3l2EZ_FLuB6YD8Nklqbly7xEqPy-TZ2oW7aTl0hHEEvHeQfZKNKe9ug-egZxWpMEfty3Hy8G4VoW-RjPM_HlJulxhLKK4e1mAgIDnnNQm9Fily018lFjiajlqeGWI67tMv/4h4/5Di3lJmJRleY5eeW29iyVw/h0/h001.gn-9-IsXuh6yxe9YXLS-PRazvvoQsVv2JzluX-gUVuo)
---
Friend, Trump just issued an unconstitutional and racist travel ban—attacking countries with Black, brown, and Muslim populations. This is a shameful expansion of his first term’s Muslim and African ban, now targeting people from 19 countries. Rooted in white nationalism, this policy will separate families and put people’s lives in danger. We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. All humans have equal rights and worth, and we will keep pushing back against the ongoing dehumanization of our communities. We defeated this ban before, and we can come together to defeat it again. One way we can fight back is by passing the **_NO BAN Act_** in Congress. I’m co-leading this legislation that would **strengthen anti-discrimination protections** and **limit presidents’ ability to issue travel bans**. ****[**Can you sign on today to oppose this racist travel ban and demand Congress pass the _NO BAN Act_?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSilK5yTh8qgZ8nufMLOCCwmtrsdsVlg6oKDU_a0jI0jNLeh3Y2ptv7MK41wf3Qk3DV5A8Au9qohDCaUFqGhQSypbGXGv32idsH6_X4QgKXgfkzraI4yl9o8AZwkYyeuoJRcQwWVizQHqHvjaQc4WJG2gqW7jKuxHC-JepKYdEnknqGEsrWBxb06ZvlgnI0LwkdOOYFuHjjx_o5UuhYHhQDEylZ6t9hWITvEC764cDB_otRv5Gh0QakP_1SAwb53cw/4h4/5Di3lJmJRleY5eeW29iyVw/h1/h001.eao0ERWrfxh0fBclufStFjscSKIzFO3jCGznW3oErfU)**** **** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSYF9tS43GuSuBzLoxF6oQ3NNlIPaFEBUOqyTsD7BFz63EIDbs7Vy99m6pdLY6e-_b4BDueNjxpT041mrV-HI-U7_cWi3fFJbVLMfsUy-MuNsJYZHU8iqh-wZ-M5cxu3oAZkrFPvnD-qIr-YzULEc78_AXd8-v50d0ZwqglmNtp67coALo2DwAiVz1AbSkHS8TDgk7f1eMARI4QKhdS7FO4rQ6RDPG-lFusRNAmIYaywDrclKknov3XiVgBG9CAOmD/4h4/5Di3lJmJRleY5eeW29iyVw/h2/h001.9Yc8So-ZkNilqhFrD8IPQTS18ocP6NoWFRzL71nYdys)
---
****
This new expanded travel ban overwhelmingly targets Black and brown people from countries in Africa, the Middle East, and the Caribbean.
It targets people fleeing the violence of U.S. bombs, sanctions, and interventions in countries like Yemen, Haiti, Venezuela, Cuba, Libya, and Iran. It would also prevent Americans from seeing their loved ones.
If you want to read more details about the travel ban, check out the National Immigration Law Center’s analysis below.1
In response to this expanded ban, the National Immigration Law Center wrote: _“The impact of this new ban will be deeply racialized, as it will effectively bar hundreds of millions of Black and Brown people from entering the United States.”_
**I’ve been fighting Trump’s Muslim ban since before I served in Congress.** When he came to speak in Detroit as a candidate in 2016, I interrupted the event by standing up and loudly demanding he read the Constitution—calling out his plans for a travel ban.
****[**Will you fight back against Trump’s new travel ban and urge Congress to pass the _NO BAN Act_?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ptAFwUIvdIUuYIYDICyAYiEu-wdVdNOb9soibMyJ_VsmcPIl7WFrbX2qoTg4zTin2Cpdn-x-_cC0CmkTphPoivhy83Od7UIBCm8vhd1jmiK1cRplfVj0P6l6eT6xsKPSLLuXYvYYw2JVjSgiPtS1UdUSZcyXNsxWwby046fNq3oZz-xs2I4jykitx0IS-H5gl51XVdy2mDZAQk5JJNoAtmKiZvGKAAdLwZ10MmW5f0C7PpXMpVaNs9cGN_se4MD7tJ_V-6j2uK6wvJqkQsPEUYOPRVFUJQpVF8Is9ze-R1A-8cy4Ruu0vhKaDtg7PIkdRRPZHQuTYASRdRi5IM4NUl4r7-Hr_rn7gD2Hbxlq-wkr_eZMvQoXKwSzlsKJR-sr/4h4/5Di3lJmJRleY5eeW29iyVw/h3/h001.0HesrKZMQ24R8bQvL4qujSFz_NZxyGdJ4mHPCzVOiTw)****
Thank you. Together, we’re standing up for our shared humanity and pushing back against attacks on all of our communities.
With you in the fight,
Rashida

clean_body: = In Congress, Janelle has made it her priority to elevate the needs and voices of Oregon’s 5th District and always show up for them in Washington. She’s worked to advance bipartisan bills to support small businesses, fought to bring legislation to the House floor that would address the high cost of living, and engaged with people across OR-05 at her town halls. And she’s just getting started. = | | = While Janelle has spent her time in Congress fighting for the people, Republicans have spent their time dodging their constituents, renaming the Gulf of Mexico, and voting to strip millions of Americans of their healthcare coverage.
