Friend, I’m excited for my mom, Jessica Swartz! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120947/550068985/-543775671?source=RFX_JS_EM_FR_20250606_Zoe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFmNWJhYjktMTM0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAd9WL2miCoskDFCjgyAFCkAv6BjK5OMIq61DFHI2y4=) She’s running for Congress to flip Michigan’s 4th Congressional district from red to blue. MI-04 is one of the best pick-up opportunities for Democrats in the country, and crucial to flipping the House. Here’s why she’s the right person for the job: My mom Jessica is always reaching out to hear from people all over our district. Her opponent, Rep. Bill Huizenga, disconnected his office voicemail to keep his constituents from contacting him, and only makes himself available to millionaire megadonors. The Trump agenda is not working. **Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid are at risk for major cuts, and Huizenga has failed to bring jobs into our district.** You gotta be kitten me! Mom has received endorsements from small business owners to state representatives, and unions like Teamsters Local 406. She’s building a winning coalition of hardworking people across Michigan’s 4th. She’s for the people, not MAGA millionaires, so are you with her? Flipping the house from red to blue won’t be easy, but anything is paw-sible when we work together. That’s why I’m asking you, friend: [can you start a recurring donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120948/550068986/-543775671?recurring=true&source=RFX_JS_EM_FR_20250606_Zoe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFmNWJhYjktMTM0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAd9WL2miCoskDFCjgyAFCkAv6BjK5OMIq61DFHI2y4=) | [MAKE A RECURRING DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120949/550068987/-543775671?recurring=true&source=RFX_JS_EM_FR_20250606_Zoe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFmNWJhYjktMTM0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rAd9WL2miCoskDFCjgyAFCkAv6BjK5OMIq61DFHI2y4=)

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Make Childbirth Affordable Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Having a child shouldn’t come with a steep medical bill. For many Americans, raising a family is rewarding — but even with insurance, it’s becoming less and less affordable. That’s why I’ve made it my mission to pass a **bipartisan bill** — the _Supporting Healthy Moms and Babies Act_ — that requires insurers to cover all childbirth-related care. [**_This is long overdue, so I need as much support as possible: Will you sign your name next to mine if you agree that childbirth should be affordable for everyone?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120994/550069123/1875939415?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.06_KEG-Childbirth-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVhZGJlNS0xMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jHfxddDbSWtF9LnkkCiFdPnBbw_H-JUwyWC5OGgMlZ4=&emci=8323392d-d542-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6c5adbe5-1343-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029) | | [SIGN NOW ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120995/550069124/1875939415?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.06_KEG-Childbirth-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVhZGJlNS0xMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jHfxddDbSWtF9LnkkCiFdPnBbw_H-JUwyWC5OGgMlZ4=&emci=8323392d-d542-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6c5adbe5-1343-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)
---
My bipartisan bill requires private insurers to cover all childbirth-related care — from ultrasounds to delivery to postpartum mental health support — _with no co-pays or deductibles._
Simply put: It would be groundbreaking.
Raising a family is already tough, even under the best of circumstances. It shouldn’t be made impossible because of high childcare costs.
This common-sense approach is how we’ve built a coalition across the aisle.
At a time when Democrats and Republicans are far apart on so many issues, this is an issue we can come together on.
**Let’s make our voices heard and call for affordable childbirth for every family:**
[_**_kirsten4ny.us/affordable-childbirth_**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120996/550069125/1875939415?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.06_KEG-Childbirth-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVhZGJlNS0xMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jHfxddDbSWtF9LnkkCiFdPnBbw_H-JUwyWC5OGgMlZ4=&emci=8323392d-d542-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6c5adbe5-1343-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand
* * *
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120997/550069126/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.06_KEG-Childbirth-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVhZGJlNS0xMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jHfxddDbSWtF9LnkkCiFdPnBbw_H-JUwyWC5OGgMlZ4=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. [**Please, donate today to make sure my team and I can continue securing crucial progress on the issues that matter the most and help flip the Senate blue in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109120998/550069127/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.06_KEG-Childbirth-Bill_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVhZGJlNS0xMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jHfxddDbSWtF9LnkkCiFdPnBbw_H-JUwyWC5OGgMlZ4=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: David Hogg
subject: Gun violence is more than a political issue for me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
It’s Gun Violence Awareness Month. Here’s what we’re fighting for:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250606-1&t=1&akid=2228%2E587540%2ESk2BiW)
Peter, gun violence is more than a political issue to me (and countless others).
**I was 17 when I survived one of the deadliest school shootings in U.S. history.**
It’s been more than seven years since the massacre at my high school in Parkland, Florida. And not a day goes by that I don’t think about the friends I lost — or the generations before and after me who’ve lived through the trauma of gun violence.
**June is Gun Violence Awareness Month.** But for me and for too many others who have experienced it firsthand, every month is a reminder of what happens when politicians choose catering to the gun lobby over taking action and saving lives.
That’s why I helped launch **Leaders We Deserve** — to elect a new wave of young, bold progressives who are part of the school shooting generation and understand that “thoughts and prayers” don’t save any lives from gun violence. **_Policy does._**
We are building a movement to elect candidates who:
* Grew up practicing active shooter drills.
* Know what it’s like to fear for their safety in classrooms and public spaces.
* Are done waiting on a broken political system to act.

**These are the people who will pass universal background checks, ban assault weapons, and finally treat gun violence like the public health crisis it truly is.**
**But they can’t do it alone.** Electing these bold candidates takes real resources.
**[Will you donate $5 to Leaders We Deserve this Gun Violence Awareness Month to help us elect more young leaders who will fight to end gun violence?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250606_1_gvam?refcode=em20250606-2228&amount=5&refcode2=2228_587540_Sk2BiW&akid=2228%2E587540%2ESk2BiW)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250606_1_gvam?amount=5&refcode=em20250606-2228&refcode2=2228_587540_Sk2BiW&akid=2228%2E587540%2ESk2BiW)**
This movement isn’t just about one issue or one moment. It’s about building power — _real, lasting political power_ — in the hands of a generation that’s ready to act.
Thank you for being in this fight with us.
— David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250606-1&t=2&refcode2=2228_587540_Sk2BiW&akid=2228%2E587540%2ESk2BiW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2228%2E587540%2ESk2BiW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2228%2E587540%2ESk2BiW)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003

PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Meagan Hatcher-Mays, United for Democracy
subject: Re: Our democracy is on a knife’s edge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions on some of the biggest cases of our times. We’re coordinating the rapid response. | |
---
Peter, Did you see Stasha’s email? The Supreme Court will be dropping its decisions on extremely important cases throughout the month of June. **Yesterday’s decisions have already had chilling implications for anti-discrimination law, gun manufacturer liability, the separation of church and state, and more. But the biggest cases are yet to come.** [**We’re making sure every American hears about the MAGA Supreme Court’s destructive decisions throughout the month of June. Can you rush a donation in support of our efforts to organize the rapid response to each and every SCOTUS decision this month?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6o_FRbC6loEbkcvv4B5Fjh5ZagGMhPiUFcQD-tFpOadnp-_ME-BuZA3BvcEABMSEy2uYl3tkLEH1qmWRKl8vy6NDfZbWyIgMEMj5epJv5ty6TICCJfzq3-hg-NNIr3VcFzExGDaNu8NYe073tEi_NmDU6C8g0o9WNzVvBP6Tulgns625uPUxSKiKc0aJfPmGM5N8s33Y8JsUAQdQ_4GtHLmMgHbUUyJ_C2kNh2Mt48ooUJR3wT7hB0xHGCc46-1fZllW-G0mueJZTB65WcXU7mI0mVLMcJBURZA51Nr0XdRrG19tEu7yCIMZ4JnN6R5xAxamlafFC6iyeTzk9QNoFQg/4h4/F515CdkPRxS4YzvQ-surHA/h0/h001.gpLzd9fsseam-25KfcIcmkSmwKnFlAl2ok58JlaftI4) Thank you for raising your voice, Meagan Hatcher-Mays
United for Democracy **\-- STASHA'S EMAIL --** Peter, The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions for this term today. If the usual pattern holds, they’ll start with the least controversial cases, with major decisions coming in a flurry at the end of the month. **It can be hard to keep up with the background, legal terms, and implications of each of the Court’s decisions. That’s why United for Democracy is here.** We’re watching the Court so you don’t have to. And we’re coordinating the messaging for thousands of allies across the country. **Every Monday and Thursday this month, we’re shifting into high gear and producing videos, press releases, talking points, blast emails, and rapid response social media to keep the American people informed on exactly what the Supreme Court is up to.** Many of the cases the MAGA Court rules on this month will have an impact on our communities for decades to come. We can’t allow their most destructive decisions to be met with silence and resignation. **Instead, we’re rallying our allies to stand up for our democracy and our rights—from the smallest threats to the most existential ones.** [**We’re building the tidal wave response to the MAGA Supreme Court’s every decision in June. We won’t allow elite forces to strip our democracy for parts without a fight. Chip in today to grow our rapid response operation. Every dollar helps us reach more Americans and create a louder pro-democracy movement.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6o_FRbC6loEbkcvv4B5Fjh5ZagGMhPiUFcQD-tFpOadk0N423VRwNplVS6WZTr4yV6wI94Rkbo3Q_2L8jHe8nmdywX3LVUWOlQNyTnH4vwA4mVXiiw8Vo2y7rhx5g_MgCx1--1Sg_010b4KmIEnWLEDgfdiBTZyepYJInA9RaQyFHVF6Rpzp4gudRJzI3WKpobxpjY1dlq8dkoguay-HCtV2t-oLWr-EBc04fMYueNmbAYyMMkApzuUZlAxzVROQl3odolAfJkRGC_jXWwGG5Q7F0Eq7XOAdlEBg-wRM0_aIJuYGkSF20egGq73NH_x-IWL2WkMdqWgHI9cuY5Jaodg/4h4/F515CdkPRxS4YzvQ-surHA/h1/h001.CUMwRmXONpxtCtNIsnI4RWxWPL___z0je59oLMMRBBE) [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6o_FRbC6loEbkcvv4B5Fjh5ZagGMhPiUFcQD-tFpOadnxgSyx5M3xjSLWl8EEKNb6E6lUA4GabDjawO6z_eabyx9AvjRNaV_7ACQf6q3BZ9vBtJliBudidU6f_tkebJOPXsq4uTzTPBAAyE6rUq8rdyP_IQsdkBEAZC4R7qLpwVAw0xaRmbDFNw42hO6oTDXVd4k9wFERlK_r5ySu5TXeifNsDKmM0Q1fkXI6x6Ggj2RBK5CWg-mxiYqU7O43Vnoj8ff3YrCZ4103s3UDxl8_tb9eSDk7X8ePjaWErZBs7x3498r1hMoJ4C0j-nLSnRICymViisRfpnB2O5hm0-OFmw/4h4/F515CdkPRxS4YzvQ-surHA/h2/h001.hV8SZpCKbcs7NYecBIqogOxVj8lm_mTSGkYRzO2wmIs) Several of the cases the Supreme Court will rule on this term have potentially extreme consequences for our most vulnerable community members:
* **_Trump v. CASA_****** will determine whether Trump is allowed to strip Americans of the right to birthright citizenship.
* **_U.S. v. Skrmetti_** will determine how deeply states are allowed to legislate against the rights of transgender Americans.
* **_Mahmoud v. Taylor_** will determine if parents can pull students out of class during educational exercises they don’t like.
* **_Medina v. Planned Parenthood of South Atlantic_** will determine whether states can stop Medicaid coverage of life-saving reproductive care from Planned Parenthood.
* **_Braidwood v. Kennedy_** will determine whether the government can end Affordable Care Act coverage for preventive care like cancer screenings and diabetes tests.
* **_FCC v. Consumers’ Research_** will determine how much power the government can claw back from the vitally important Federal Communications Commission—and its decision would have financial implications for Leonard Leo, a friend of Justices Thomas and Alito, who refused to recuse themselves.
* **_Louisiana v. Phillip Callais_** will determine whether the redistricting map in Louisiana was redrawn to discriminate against Black voters, and whether future maps are allowed to discriminate as well.

**That’s a hell of a lot of ways the MAGA Supreme Court could chip away at our rights—and it’s not even the full list of cases they’ll decide.** Our team is in Court-watching mode—scanning blogs, tweets, reports, and analyses for the latest updates on what the Supreme Court may decide. And we’ll turn everything we find out into short, easy-to-digest messaging you and our huge coalition can really use. **Remember: The constitution belongs to us, not Leonard Leo, not his network of billionaires, not Donald Trump, and not MAGA extremist justices. We the People can keep our democracy alive, but only if we fight for it.** [**Will you chip in $5 to help us drive the rapid response to the MAGA Supreme Court’s decisions all month long?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6o_FRbC6loEbkcvv4B5Fjh5ZagGMhPiUFcQD-tFpOadkqE31HbGYxblFT-M60Pml7HGEUi2WW58Pk9ZlySOLlWK9fkAgMEAxCFPG3P3Ap3E-L3bgEgeUCmhT_8kGENyI20U7-RGUuFof0fY4gMU5P5N69ECtHJXxaBVs1kTq62uVYHsnnK8DkxJ6JuUmoaVvz3A2SUl9DjipmvMOy8DHErOmZuJ4wp27NHlKbB5Q4Q7g-OsmeNbrch0LJCIjB82WvqBocaTkxMDvNV6wROWE1JmRS4JcwExEW57uIKqPSJqV4jmC9y9jJwBZ2BTByM8vIUG85a_a_GnhAGox16nbMTA/4h4/F515CdkPRxS4YzvQ-surHA/h3/h001.VqxeS0qvyo5znh7YFgLBYqk_SRiVvoXC4u_LheQZiRA) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6o_FRbC6loEbkcvv4B5Fjh0UDS5NtGKiYICwnVGQEY31Ypxvv_CjpGZtz2wHrOxSbS-DctfPMCvg3JzplwtEoYM7x2M2TIzgio988uZc7j-CCa2x3sHolleHqcdrH7DwxlauTM9axlZEIIzPfm-tS9MtzPdVZGsdOX2HmD1J9aBBTCsiazUB7mhP6PbMYNDWtRFT2faSXCmhXmqfbnLbad9tJ_lBTqsgN55EiFH5JWDW9Q1l9JOxxP_BzF-lHfIKwJFbxRZDRMM7yjml54eiJdugXJQTEcqwOItpBhZYkzPUIulqPIEAnF6ri4bMpRw_GWHXfqhmnbMYH1uPZTXSJyYJiqU6IN6NJ5kncwbebO3Y9L29edqpPPWup3N86WIHq/4h4/F515CdkPRxS4YzvQ-surHA/h4/h001.OOZ-ET20qV35qJZ0zs8p-h6IulVbXBkypUXucPQg0Wc)

clean_body: The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions on some of the biggest cases of our times. We’re coordinating the rapid response. | | Peter, Did you see Stasha’s email? The Supreme Court will be dropping its decisions on extremely important cases throughout the month of June. Yesterday’s decisions have already had chilling implications for anti-discrimination law, gun manufacturer liability, the separation of church and state, and more. But the biggest cases are yet to come. Thank you for raising your voice, Meagan Hatcher-Mays United for Democracy \-- STASHA'S EMAIL -- Peter, The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions for this term today. If the usual pattern holds, they’ll start with the least controversial cases, with major decisions coming in a flurry at the end of the month. It can be hard to keep up with the background, legal terms, and implications of each of the Court’s decisions. That’s why United for Democracy is here. We’re watching the Court so you don’t have to. And we’re coordinating the messaging for thousands of allies across the country. Every Monday and Thursday this month, we’re shifting into high gear and producing videos, press releases, talking points, blast emails, and rapid response social media to keep the American people informed on exactly what the Supreme Court is up to. Many of the cases the MAGA Court rules on this month will have an impact on our communities for decades to come. We can’t allow their most destructive decisions to be met with silence and resignation. Instead, we’re rallying our allies to stand up for our democracy and our rights—from the smallest threats to the most existential ones. Several of the cases the Supreme Court will rule on this term have potentially extreme consequences for our most vulnerable community members: Trump v. CASA**** will determine whether Trump is allowed to strip Americans of the right to birthright citizenship. U.S. v. Skrmetti will determine how deeply states are allowed to legislate against the rights of transgender Americans. Mahmoud v. Taylor will determine if parents can pull students out of class during educational exercises they don’t like. Medina v. Planned Parenthood of South Atlantic will determine whether states can stop Medicaid coverage of life-saving reproductive care from Planned Parenthood. Braidwood v. Louisiana v. Phillip Callais will determine whether the redistricting map in Louisiana was redrawn to discriminate against Black voters, and whether future maps are allowed to discriminate as well. That’s a hell of a lot of ways the MAGA Supreme Court could chip away at our rights—and it’s not even the full list of cases they’ll decide. Our team is in Court-watching mode—scanning blogs, tweets, reports, and analyses for the latest updates on what the Supreme Court may decide. name: Team Kelly
subject: Save your local PBS and NPR stations
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Trump just sent a request to Congress to immediately zero out funding for the Corporation for Public Broadcasting.
#

Trump just sent a request to Congress to immediately zero out funding for the Corporation for Public Broadcasting. That means PBS and NPR lose out on hundreds of millions of dollars in funding that they are counting on and have already budgeted for.
If the GOP follows along and passes these cuts into law it will be devastating. We’ll see kids lose out on some of the most beloved and effective educational programming in the entire country. Local radio stations will be forced to make cuts and could close. More essential pillars of our country will be lost to Trump.
This is not about efficiency or cutting costs. It’s about silencing media they don’t like in the most cruel way possible.
Mark Kelly is working hard against the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” passed by the House, and stopping Trump’s proposed cuts from becoming law. And if he’s going to do all that and save your local PBS and NPR stations, he’s going to need your help.
If you’re with me, please:
[**Please, add your name and sign on with Mark Kelly to defend funding for NPR and PBS. Generations of people, young and old, are with you.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-june25-cbp/?source=em250606-1-f&akid=6086%2E6688874%2EKbLYJW)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-june25-cbp/?source=em250606-1-f&akid=6086%2E6688874%2EKbLYJW)**
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6086%2E6688874%2EKbLYJW).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Trump wants to sell off our national parks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
We must preserve our public lands and our history. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109121386/550070412/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTEyY2IyNi0xNTQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rZI4KRyOiAFv6uQXW9iuVt4QHDM5lzMoUb0x-pMHsr4=&emci=5012cb26-1543-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5912cb26-1543-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=252045)
---
Team, The Trump administration is trying to quietly hand over hundreds of national parks to states and local governments — without even being honest about which ones. They’re slashing funds, gutting staff, and hoping the public doesn’t notice until it’s too late. This isn’t about conservation or bettering our environment, it’s about control. And I’m prepared to fight this every step of the way. That’s why I’ve demanded immediate answers from the Department of the Interior and pushed for amendments to block this public land sell-off. These parks don’t just protect our beautiful natural landscapes and rich cultural heritage. They create jobs, support local economies, and tell the story of America. And we will not let them be sold off, neglected, or forgotten. clean_body: We must preserve our public lands and our history. Team, The Trump administration is trying to quietly hand over hundreds of national parks to states and local governments — without even being honest about which ones. They’re slashing funds, gutting staff, and hoping the public doesn’t notice until it’s too late. This isn’t about conservation or bettering our environment, it’s about control. And I’m prepared to fight this every step of the way. That’s why I’ve demanded immediate answers from the Department of the Interior and pushed for amendments to block this public land sell-off. These parks don’t just protect our beautiful natural landscapes and rich cultural heritage. They create jobs, support local economies, and tell the story of America. And we will not let them be sold off, neglected, or forgotten. If you care about protecting public lands, clean energy, and a future we can be proud of, I’m going to need more folks to stand with me in this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We need to preserve our national parks and public lands and ensure that generations to come can enjoy them, too. Thanks for standing up to help me protect them. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: New heights to Trump’s corruption
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250606-1378-foote&t=1001&akid=1378%2E342411%2E4nhirZ ]Squad Victory Fund

Donald Trump’s corruption has reached new heights – literally.

He just accepted a massive jet from Qatar to use as Air Force One. He
claims it's going to the Department of Defense, but this news came right
after his business struck a deal for a golf resort in Qatar. How could
that be just a coincidence?

Even worse, Trump has repeatedly said he plans to transfer the plane to
his presidential library after he leaves office, ensuring it stays in his
hands. This is some of the most blatant corruption we’ve witnessed yet.

But this isn’t one isolated incident. It’s part of a pattern for this
administration. From foreign deals to cryptocurrency scams: Donald Trump
doesn't care about ethics. He uses his power to enrich himself, his
family, and his corporate backers – all while selling out working-class
Americans.

That’s the same reason they are pushing his disastrous budget plan. This
legislation cuts lifesaving services so many rely on – like Medicaid and
SNAP – so they can give huge tax giveaways to the wealthiest Americans.

Trump’s corruption is out in the open,
Peter. But the good news is we
have the Squad in Congress to call him out.

They are fighting to stop this harmful budget and ensure this
administration cannot sell off our government for parts to make themselves
even richer. But to take on fights this big, they need a powerful,
grassroots movement behind them.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250606-movement.LMbwg-&refcode=em20250606-1378&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1378%2E342411%2E4nhirZ ]Can you chip in $3 or any amount that makes sense to you
to keep the Squad in Congress fighting Trump’s corruption? Building a
government that works for the people instead of the ultrarich takes all of
us.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250606-movement.LMbwg-&refcode=em20250606-1378&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1378%2E342411%2E4nhirZ ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1378%2E342411%2E4nhirZ

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

YOU DID THIS! Without our movement, Musk and Trump would never have been reduced to selling cars on the White House lawn, Musk would still be in DC, and Elon and Trump wouldn't be flinging feces at each other in public.
Whether it's theater or not, public pressure created this situation and we're not going to let up until Musk is no longer a threat to our democracy.****[**We’ve got FIVE events this Saturday!**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=2a84d17e6b&e=10cc7d1928)

Remember Trump’s attacks on Kim Jong Un before they started writing each other “love letters?” Elon and Trump also exchanged mean tweets before they teamed up to plunder America. **Trump's own VP once compared him to Hitler! Don't believe this is a permanent split.**
**This movement is on the cusp of becoming one of the most impactful in US history. But we have to finish the job**. Our coalition’s protests continue with THIRTEEN Tesla protests every week in the Seattle area.
Join us to celebrate our wins and continue the fight!

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: The Big, Beautiful Breakup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
By now, you’ve probably seen Elon Musk and President Trump’s very messy and very public breakup. While the reaction online has been funny, I want to take a minute and remind you of the very real and very serious damage that DOGE has caused.
With 44,000 federal employees and two to three times that in contractors in Maryland’s Third District alone, we’ve seen firsthand how Elon Musk’s DOGE has decimated the civil service. These are our neighbors, our family members, and our friends who have dedicated their lives to public service. That’s why I introduced the first bipartisan, anti-DOGE bill, the Protect Our Probationary Employees Act, to make sure our government respects the time and work that civil servants have put in.
There’s a lot of work ahead to undo the damage of DOGE. I’m committed to doing it. Are you with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-06-06]

We launched our **Substack show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."** _To celebrate,**you get full access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week!**_
**G** _**et exclusive news/truth corporate media ignores** --from a former Biden ad writer & Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know where the bodies are buried_

[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.zwFqjJ29dv2BuDsiryOTSJQNh-HR6hfVhdTWOMraOAo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163660937)
### **Of Course Musk and Trump Imploded --They're the Same Narcissistic Nightmare**
Well folks, here we are. The Great MAGA-Tech Billionaire Love Affair of 2023-25 has officially transmogrified into a cluster bomb--like a Cybertruck, or Trump Taj Mahal. And you didn't need to stare directly into the sun during an eclipse to see this coming.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4255d2f6-2421-4b6a-a1a7-6c92670882ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Elon Musk and Donald Trump were always destined to end up in freeform public fisticuffs. Not because they had different worldviews...but actually **because they 're functionally the same guy**. Both are obscenely rich--and got that way by inheriting daddy's segregated-housing or apartheid-mining money.
They both have crepey skin (yes, that's what _really-thin skin_ is called, isn't it perfect?!), future-Bezos-wife plastic surgery, are Wall Street and Silicon Valley media-myths, which transformed two _Step Brothers_ Stupids into "geniuses," and they're both addicted to attention like it's a synthetic drug cooked up in a Silicon Valley lab.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/39c9035c-8620-4a91-b74c-eead7cfbadd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Which reminds me, they're also both allegedly addicted to drugs (crushed Adderall and Ketamine, respectfully...is it me or does that sound like a cocktail?).
These men were never allies. They were rival cult leaders doing cosplay bromance til one dared question the other's throne publicly. Or, exactly what happened when Elon turned on Trump's bloated, corrupt tax-&-spending package--his "Big Beautiful Bill." Musk got something right for once--of course, for _mostly wrong reasons_. But I digress.
The Elon betrayal alone would've lit some MAGA hairpieces on fire. But Elon wasn't done. Because the two numb nuts' also share the uber-annoying trait of having no off button, as in no ability to stop their gums from flapping. Whether it's to inhale a human-sized cake or blithely insult another human. So Musk publicly called for the bill's defeat. Trump responded, saying Elon was "wearing thin" (crepey!) and "crazy" (Trump also _got something right for the wrong reasons_). So they had to can him. Uh-huh.
_**You know, just the President of the United States and richest man in the world calling each other petty names in front of ...the whole world! Yay, America, we created these two, our political and economic systems are clearly working just great!**_
But I digress, again. For in a final flourish, Musk, in true Twitter fashion, lobbed a grenade claiming Trump's name appears in the sealed Epstein files. Yeah, _That_ Epstein. Ruh-roh.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4bce2a7c-2a98-4da0-926e-e4e8c14fe187?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Cue the reticence from right-wing, brain-stemmed ding dongs. Suddenly, those who scream about pedophiles in pizza-shop basements with no basements, were mum on a guy who literally rode on Epstein's plane like he was Slim Pickens in Dr. Strangelove.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f4f2592a-9e2a-406a-90e3-f30ce000663c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Well, except the few who decided they were Elon partisans because, in their estimation, he'd win this war of reputation-destruction attrition.
Trump, naturally, didn't take all this very well. After years of Elon's pouring cash into Trump's campaign, and even fake serving as a fake senior appointee in Trump's fake Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE--because they were always clearly adults), Trump did what he always does: He blew his GD shpadoinkle.
He threatened Musk's government contracts, claimed Elon begged to be involved, and accused him of having--you guessed it--"Trump Derangement Syndrome." Which is hilarious coming from a guy who melts down on Truth Social just because it happens to be Memorial Day (bone-spurs of the brain, I'm guessing)
Musk, meanwhile, made his break with the Trump Campaign official, quitting DOGE and offering the political equivalent of a "you smelt it you dealt it" response. He still wants to save America from inefficiency--not by cancelling his ridiculous no-bid contracts, mind you, just by taking food out of the mouths of starving kids--he says, just not under a president who governs like a mob boss with a social media addiction.
LOL. Dude, I get the aversion to mirrors, as you're..well, you. But you really oughta try one when it comes to Trump insults. You may see..you're the same guy! And that there's still time for you to get psychological help--like, lots of it, please--and to decide, Darth-Vader style, not to keep heading towards Evil Emperor territory.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/57dfcfc4-c292-458c-9566-9a49431f1b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I know you won't do this, though. Darth Vader didn't have easy Ketamine access, and The Emperor and Darth weren't controlled by the even more-man-boobed, more fucked Evil Emperor of the Kremlin. (How are those planes doing, btw, Vlad? A 40K Zelenskyy operation caused you $7 billion in damage, wrecked 41 heavy bombers and disabled 34% of your cruise missile bombers!? Damn, son, that's embarrassing!).
Trump & Elon, these well-done loin steaks, aren't leaders. They're brands with daddy issues and birth control challenges. They don't care about democracy, truth or you. They care about control. They always have. **The only thing surprising about this falling-out is how long it took**. Because, again, they're the same guy!
The grift was strong with these ones, but the Sysyphean boulder of insecurity resting squarely where one would have a soul? _Even stronger._
So let's enjoy the show. But also remember: These men did real damage--hollowed out institutions, radicalized millions and turned public service into a meme war. While it's much better for democracy they're no longer allies, and punching it out like Rocky & Drago--or just Drago and Drago--this also presents dangers, because they're wholly irrational actors with access to funds, thugs and weapons.
If their breakup is ugly, it's because the relationship was rotten. They're as awful people as this world's ever produced, and our system let them thrive. Which should focus us on our failing corporate media, the propaganda and disinformation we allow to flow undeterred lack of independent-media infrastructure/messaging on our side.
All, if functional, would've taken them down before both became threats. In the meantime: Good riddance to both of these assholes.
* * *
### **THIS WEEK ON AMPED UP:**
### **She took on the NRA with a Facebook post --and built a movement that changed everything.**
This week on _Amped Up_ , Cliff Schecter is joined by Shannon Watts--founder of Moms Demand Action and author of the new book _Fired Up_. She shares how the heartbreak of Sandy Hook transformed her from a suburban mom into one of the NRA's fiercest opponents. From confronting gun lobby shills like Dana Loesch to building a grassroots army in red states, Watts pulls back the curtain on what real activism looks like--and how women are reshaping American politics.

### _**... Yo, Check This Out!**_
_**Here, we give you a Trump/Musk slap-fight timeline:**_
* 🏛️ **Musk Departs DOGE Amid Controversy**
Elon Musk officially ended his 130-day role as a *special* (Read: not real) government employee in the Trump administration, leaving the White House while vowing continued support for the Dept of Government Efficiency (DOGE). Musk expressed disappointment with certain aspects of Trump's policies, notably the "One Big Beautiful Bill," but maintained optimism about achieving DOGE's goal of saving $1 trillion through reductions in government waste and fraud.
* 🧠 **Trump Says Elon Has 'Trump Derangement Syndrome'**
Never one to back down, Trump hit back from the Oval Office, accusing Musk of having "Trump Derangement Syndrome," and claiming Elon was once a "huge fan" who begged to be involved--before "going off the rails."

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d98731b-8248-4b08-a5f7-078dd8c2f15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* 💣 **Musk Alleges Trump's Name in Epstein Files**
In a dramatic escalation, Musk claimed on his platform X that Trump is named in the unreleased Jeffrey Epstein investigation files, suggesting this as the reason for their nondisclosure. This accusation has sparked renewed calls from Democratic leaders for transparency regarding the Epstein investigation.
* 🚨 **Musk Calls for Trump's Impeachment**
Elon Musk publicly called for President Trump's impeachment after criticizing the "Big Beautiful Bill." Musk's opposition intensified when Trump threatened to cancel billions in government contracts with Musk's companies.
* 🍺 **Musk/Trump Have Godzilla-King Kong Battle** leading to mutual destruction & the accidental elimination of Viktor Orban, Tesla, meme coins, the return of the mullet, Fox and the Kardashians..Ok, not true. _But can 't a man dream?_

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jdn?refcode=X_060625_neguse_spl_jdn_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jdn?refcode=X_060625_neguse_spl_jdn_act]
Friend,
For the past six and a half years, as I’ve served the people of Northern and Western Colorado, I’ve been honored to partner with my friend and colleague Senator Michael Bennet every step of the way.
Now, Michael is running for Governor of Colorado to build a brighter future for families in every corner of our state—and my wife Andrea and I couldn’t be more excited to endorse his campaign!
Colorado deserves a Governor who is kind and thoughtful—a visionary leader who can truly bring people together while never compromising our core values. That leader is Michael Bennet.
Will you join me in supporting his campaign by making a split donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jdn?refcode=X_060625_neguse_spl_jdn_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jdn?refcode=X_060625_neguse_spl_jdn_act]
Friend, I have personally seen Michael’s leadership and commitment to service up close over the last six years.
When communities in my district—from Granby to Larimer County—were in need as we grappled with the largest wildfires and floods in Colorado history, Michael was there.
When out-of-state corporations tried to run five oil trains per day through our mountain ecosystems in Garfield and Eagle Counties, threatening the health of the Colorado River, Michael and I fought them together, day and night.
And when our forests and national parks were under threat, Michael and I worked to protect treasured public lands across Colorado—from protecting hundreds of thousands of acres of public lands in the White River National Forest and Thompson Divide, to the designation of Camp Hale as a national monument and establishing the Amache National Historic Site.
Michael Bennet has always delivered results for our great state. He is one of the most effective public servants I’ve ever had the privilege of working with, and will be a tremendous Governor, whom the people of Colorado can count on through thick and thin.
Put simply, there is no person we trust more to lead our state into the future than Senator Michael Bennet. And while Colorado faces its share of serious challenges, I know firsthand that Michael is up to the task. Please, split a donation today to support Michael’s grassroots campaign and help him gather the resources it will take to win next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfg_email-25q2_spl_jdn?refcode=X_060625_neguse_spl_jdn_act]

clean_body: [] Friend, For the past six and a half years, as I’ve served the people of Northern and Western Colorado, I’ve been honored to partner with my friend and colleague Senator Michael Bennet every step of the way. Now, Michael is running for Governor of Colorado to build a brighter future for families in every corner of our state—and my wife Andrea and I couldn’t be more excited to endorse his campaign! Colorado deserves a Governor who is kind and thoughtful—a visionary leader who can truly bring people together while never compromising our core values. That leader is Michael Bennet. Will you join me in supporting his campaign by making a split donation today? [] DONATE [] Friend, I have personally seen Michael’s leadership and commitment to service up close over the last six years. When communities in my district—from Granby to Larimer County—were in need as we grappled with the largest wildfires and floods in Colorado history, Michael was there. When out-of-state corporations tried to run five oil trains per day through our mountain ecosystems in Garfield and Eagle Counties, threatening the health of the Colorado River, Michael and I fought them together, day and night. And when our forests and national parks were under threat, Michael and I worked to protect treasured public lands across Colorado—from protecting hundreds of thousands of acres of public lands in the White River National Forest and Thompson Divide, to the designation of Camp Hale as a national monument and establishing the Amache National Historic Site. Michael Bennet has always delivered results for our great state. He is one of the most effective public servants I’ve ever had the privilege of working with, and will be a tremendous Governor, whom the people of Colorado can count on through thick and thin. Put simply, there is no person we trust more to lead our state into the future than Senator Michael Bennet. And while Colorado faces its share of serious challenges, I know firsthand that Michael is up to the task. Please, split a donation today to support Michael’s grassroots campaign and help him gather the resources it will take to win next year. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] MORE [] Thank you, Joe [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: a beacon of hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — I want to win big. Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms.

| Peter,

On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — _**I want to win big.**_

Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms.

People in Virginia and across the country are looking at our race as a bellwether for Democrats. In every zip code and every community, Democrats are understandably frightened and angry about the chaos coming out of Washington. And to them, our race is a beacon of hope. It’s an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation’s history.

And can I be honest for a minute? That’s a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I’m ready to seize the moment and win big. I feel honored that people have put so much hope into our campaign, and it’s a big reason why I’ve worked to stay above the fray and focus on what matters: **winning big and delivering real, meaningful change when we do.**

And I hope that as you read this email, you’ll buy into that vision too. Because there is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going. So let’s win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond.

[_**But we can’t do it without you! name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/6/2025
body:
Pro-2A advocates plan strategy events in response to Colorado gun laws
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s5u6bc6c7e5)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/savbc49985a)**
| | Happy Friday,
**No plans next weekend? Join Us in Eagle County!** Mark your calendar for the 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner hosted by the Eagle County Republicans—featuring Heidi Ganahl as a guest speaker! [Get your tickets and details here.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2l6cbe2d4b) Don’t miss this evening of patriotic celebration and grassroots momentum.
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4g3b0658b2), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0m62ff9665) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s1k0436151d)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado is facing mounting tensions over education, gun rights, and local control. Parents in Jefferson County blasted the union and district for ignoring a [growing sexual abuse crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2j7c80e4e9), while federal officials opened a Title IX probe. [New concealed carry rules](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfs3fb4d587) take effect July 1, prompting [2A groups to organize response events](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3u08f6e26c). Meanwhile, [restaurants celebrated a win](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9m14c2bf0d) as the state opted to leave wage hikes up to local governments, easing pressure on small businesses.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Trump issued a [visa ban on 19 countries](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s1q0d454f6d) over terror and overstay concerns, while the DOJ revealed a Columbia protester had [direct Hamas ties](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2s444e14b5).
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** C. J. Garbo shares a [heartfelt defense of biblical love](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfga20ce96d), explaining how Christians can hold firm to truth while showing compassion to the LGBTQIA+ community. Meanwhile, Colleen Enos warns that the fight over HB25-1312 is just the beginning, as state leaders [escalate attacks on parental rights](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3g222d341c), religious freedom, and free speech.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, June 6, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Pro-2A advocates plan strategy events in response to Colorado gun laws](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0tfe807429)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/said2d41015)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8g2046de87)
Next week, on June 10 and 11, Colorado gun owners and Second Amendment advocates will gather for two Legislative Round Up events in Lakewood and Fort Morgan, organized by the NRA-ILA (National Rifle Association Institute for Legislative Action) and Rocky Mountain Voice. The event is organized with coordination by Amanda Hardin of Lipstick Tactical, a Denver-based firearms training organization.
The events work to build advocacy efforts in light of multiple anti-gun laws the 2025 Colorado General Assembly passed and Governor Jared Polis signed into law.
The gatherings will provide a platform to discuss these laws and strategize legal and grassroots responses. “We’re running the exact same event in two geographically different locations to reach a larger audience,” explained Hardin. “If neither location is convenient, please reach out to me at [amanda@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:amanda@rockymountainvoice.com). We’re happy to bring this program to your community.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9r7af801c1)**
|
---
**DON'T MISS OUT ON THE MOUNTAIN MAJESTY GALA —LIMITED TICKETS AVAILABLE 🎟️ **
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8rfcc6591c)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4u5f0c4b35)
|
---
**[“Not one mention of sexual abuse”: Parents slam Jeffco union as Title IX storm builds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9s40e187ff)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3kcb181e38)
* The Jefferson County Education Association issued a vote of no confidence in Superintendent Tracy Dorland, criticizing her leadership amid high turnover and cultural policy changes—just as the district was hit with a federal Title IX investigation over a controversial school trip involving transgender student accommodations.
* Parent advocates, including Lindsay Datko, accused the union of ignoring ongoing sexual abuse concerns within the district, pointing to at least 26 reported cases since 2022 and arguing that revised sex ed policies had been necessary to protect children.
* Despite mounting tension, the school board announced Dorland would remain in her role, while vowing to work through the challenges with her—prompting sharp backlash from both union leaders and concerned parents.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4lb97ef6c7)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scv09e63364)
|
---
**[Garbo: A Christian conservative’s honest, loving perspective on LGBTQIA+ and sin](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3u7a29ae26)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0t74e66703)
_I’m a Christian. I’m a Conservative. I believe the Bible is the Word of God, not a suggestion, not a cultural relic, but the truth. And, though it is admittedly very difficult to do at times, I also believe deeply in loving my neighbor – all of them – unconditionally. That includes the LGBTQIA+ community._
_Let’s be honest: Pride Month brings up tension, especially for those of us who don’t support the ideology or the prurient displays often celebrated in public forums._
_But disagreement is not hate. Conviction is not fear. And rejecting a behavior doesn’t mean rejecting a person._ __**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0s471545bd)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[A crisis of cradle and classroom: How Colorado’s baby bust is closing schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8vd149608a)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/seh7152ea11)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | JUNE 6** _Colorado’s classrooms are getting quieter – not because kids are learning, but because there are fewer of them. Across the state, dropping birth rates and shrinking enrollment are forcing schools to close, merge – or sit half-empty. And the trend isn’t slowing down._
__
**[Hunter: Dear Common Sense on using your voice without becoming part of the chaos](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbub9b35850)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s5pdff6e9af)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JUNE 6** _“Dear Common Sense” is a no-nonsense advice column for those who still believe truth matters, leadership is earned, and common sense isn’t so common anymore._
__
**[COvid Chronicles May 24–31, 2020: When ‘peaceful protests’ overruled pandemic policy—and unleashed chaos](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sajcd346563)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8n22553740)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | JUNE 4** _The sixth installment of RMV’s COvid Chronicles covers the week Colorado dropped the mask—just not in the way you’d hope. Restrictions vanished for rioters, but stayed in place for students and small businesses. It wasn’t science guiding policy. It was politics. No, it’s not short. Neither was the fallout._

**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** **Here’s a fun fact about D-Day in honor of the 81st anniversary today:** the term “D-Day” doesn’t just refer to June 6, 1944. It was actually a general military term used by the Allies to mark the launch day of any major operation. The famous Normandy invasion was originally set for June 5 but was delayed by a day due to bad weather. And before the real thing, Allied forces ran a full-scale rehearsal called “Exercise Tiger.”
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Truth carries with it confrontation. Truth demands confrontation; loving confrontation, but confrontation nevertheless." – Francis Schaeffer

clean_body: Pro-2A advocates plan strategy events in response to Colorado gun laws | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Happy Friday, No plans next weekend? Join Us in Eagle County! Mark your calendar for the 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner hosted by the Eagle County Republicans—featuring Heidi Ganahl as a guest speaker! Don’t miss this evening of patriotic celebration and grassroots momentum. Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast , or watch on or ! Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Colorado is facing mounting tensions over education, gun rights, and local control. Parents in Jefferson County blasted the union and district for ignoring a , while federal officials opened a Title IX probe. take effect July 1, prompting . Meanwhile, as the state opted to leave wage hikes up to local governments, easing pressure on small businesses. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... Trump issued a over terror and overstay concerns, while the DOJ revealed a Columbia protester had . 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... C. J. Garbo shares a , explaining how Christians can hold firm to truth while showing compassion to the LGBTQIA+ community. Meanwhile, Colleen Enos warns that the fight over HB25-1312 is just the beginning, as state leaders , religious freedom, and free speech. This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, June 6, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES Next week, on June 10 and 11, Colorado gun owners and Second Amendment advocates will gather for two Legislative Round Up events in Lakewood and Fort Morgan, organized by the NRA-ILA (National Rifle Association Institute for Legislative Action) and Rocky Mountain Voice. The event is organized with coordination by Amanda Hardin of Lipstick Tactical, a Denver-based firearms training organization. The events work to build advocacy efforts in light of multiple anti-gun laws the 2025 Colorado General Assembly passed and Governor Jared Polis signed into law. The gatherings will provide a platform to discuss these laws and strategize legal and grassroots responses. “We’re running the exact same event in two geographically different locations to reach a larger audience,” explained Hardin. “If neither location is convenient, please reach out to me at mailto:amanda@rockymountainvoice.com. We’re happy to bring this program to your community.” | DON'T MISS OUT ON THE MOUNTAIN MAJESTY GALA —LIMITED TICKETS AVAILABLE 🎟️ | The Jefferson County Education Association issued a vote of no confidence in Superintendent Tracy Dorland, criticizing her leadership amid high turnover and cultural policy changes—just as the district was hit with a federal Title IX investigation over a controversial school trip involving transgender student accommodations. Parent advocates, including Lindsay Datko, accused the union of ignoring ongoing sexual abuse concerns within the district, pointing to at least 26 reported cases since 2022 and arguing that revised sex ed policies had been necessary to protect children. Despite mounting tension, the school board announced Dorland would remain in her role, while vowing to work through the challenges with her—prompting sharp backlash from both union leaders and concerned parents. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. I believe the Bible is the Word of God, not a suggestion, not a cultural relic, but the truth. And, though it is admittedly very difficult to do at times, I also believe deeply in loving my neighbor – all of them – unconditionally. That includes the LGBTQIA+ community. Let’s be honest: Pride Month brings up tension, especially for those of us who don’t support the ideology or the prurient displays often celebrated in public forums. But disagreement is not hate. Conviction is not fear. And rejecting a behavior doesn’t mean rejecting a person. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ JEN SCHUMANN| STATE | JUNE 6 Colorado’s classrooms are getting quieter – not because kids are learning, but because there are fewer of them. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123267/550076587/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=&emci=63a9b897-1843-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=59faea2a-1b43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123268/550076588/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=) ****
_ONE WEEK: Former U.S. Senator and Ambassador Joe Donnelly to Keynote Hoosier Hospitality Dinner_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123269/550076589/1279789283?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=)** As of today, we are just **ONE WEEK** from our **[Annual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123270/550076590/705158362?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=)** We are excited to have **former U.S. Senator for Indiana and Ambassador to the Holy See Joe Donnelly as the keynote for our annual dinner!** We’re excited to invite you to join us for a night of celebration, connection, and classic Hoosier hospitality on **Friday, June 13, 2025, at The Indiana Roof Ballroom** , a historic landmark in downtown Indianapolis. Don’t miss hearing from Joe and Hoosier Democrats across the state! **[Secure your seat today before tickets sell out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123271/550076591/1279789283?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=) **Last year, we welcomed an incredible crowd of Democrats from every corner of Indiana – this year promises to be just as great! We can’t wait to see you there! **📅Event Details**
Date: Friday, June 13, 2025
Location: The Indiana Roof Ballroom
140 W Washington St, Indianapolis, IN 46204

**Evening Schedule**
VIP Reception: 5:30 PM
General Admission: 6:30 PM

**🎟️Ticket Options🎟️**
VIP Ticket (Reception + Dinner) – $500
General Admission (Dinner only) – $150 ****_Governor Braun Breaks Promise, Fires Elected IU Trustees, Replaces Them With Conversatives_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123272/550076592/194121898?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=&emci=63a9b897-1843-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=59faea2a-1b43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123273/550076593/194121898?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=&emci=63a9b897-1843-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=59faea2a-1b43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) At the end of the legislative session, Republican legislators and Mike Braun snuck a provision into the state budget bill to allow the Governor to appoint all the members of the Indiana University Board of Trustees, taking the power away from thousands of IU alumni. When it passed, Braun said he would likely allow the elected trustees to serve out their terms. However, this week, he removed three of the members and replaced them with conservatives, including anti-abortion lawyer Jim Bopp. This is a power grab to take voting ability away from IU alumni and give it to those who will be friendly to the governor and Republican legislators. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123274/550076594/-556996587?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=&emci=63a9b897-1843-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=59faea2a-1b43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)**
[Share Rep. André Carson](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123275/550076595/-556996587?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=&emci=63a9b897-1843-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=59faea2a-1b43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535) While Republican representatives across Indiana refuse to hold town halls or meet with Hoosiers, Democratic Rep. Frank J. Mrvan is making sure Northwest Indiana residents know they have an accessible Congressman who fights for them. Frank held a number of community conservations across the district last week, including stops in Michigan City, Valparaiso, and Gary. He will continue to fight for Hoosiers to have good jobs and access to the healthcare they need. _**People’s Town Hall Series**_ We have more upcoming People’s Town Hall events! Sign up for our event in Fort Wayne in Early July! FORT WAYNE – Tuesday, July 8, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET
Allen County Public Library Theater, 900 Library Plz, Fort Wayne, IN 46802 **[SIGN UP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123276/550076596/521585169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZhZWEyYS0xYjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jax_aCClfLhn7W1DCD5vwVl-ZmXMo1rWeklJs--PwG8=&emci=63a9b897-1843-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=59faea2a-1b43-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4925535)** clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** ONE WEEK: Former U.S. Senator and Ambassador Joe Donnelly to Keynote Hoosier Hospitality Dinner = As of today, we are just ONE WEEK from our = We are excited to have former U.S. Senator for Indiana and Ambassador to the Holy See Joe Donnelly as the keynote for our annual dinner! We’re excited to invite you to join us for a night of celebration, connection, and classic Hoosier hospitality on Friday, June 13, 2025, at The Indiana Roof Ballroom , a historic landmark in downtown Indianapolis. Don’t miss hearing from Joe and Hoosier Democrats across the state! = Last year, we welcomed an incredible crowd of Democrats from every corner of Indiana – this year promises to be just as great! We can’t wait to see you there! 📅Event Details Date: Friday, June 13, 2025 Location: The Indiana Roof Ballroom 140 W Washington St, Indianapolis, IN 46204 Evening Schedule VIP Reception: 5:30 PM General Admission: 6:30 PM 🎟️Ticket Options🎟️ VIP Ticket (Reception + Dinner) – $500 General Admission (Dinner only) – $150 Governor Braun Breaks Promise, Fires Elected IU Trustees, Replaces Them With Conversatives At the end of the legislative session, Republican legislators and Mike Braun snuck a provision into the state budget bill to allow the Governor to appoint all the members of the Indiana University Board of Trustees, taking the power away from thousands of IU alumni. When it passed, Braun said he would likely allow the elected trustees to serve out their terms. However, this week, he removed three of the members and replaced them with conservatives, including anti-abortion lawyer Jim Bopp. This is a power grab to take voting ability away from IU alumni and give it to those who will be friendly to the governor and Republican legislators. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. While Republican representatives across Indiana refuse to hold town halls or meet with Hoosiers, Democratic Rep. Frank J. Mrvan is making sure Northwest Indiana residents know they have an accessible Congressman who fights for them. Frank held a number of community conservations across the district last week, including stops in Michigan City, Valparaiso, and Gary. He will continue to fight for Hoosiers to have good jobs and access to the healthcare they need. People’s Town Hall Series We have more upcoming People’s Town Hall events! Sign up for our event in Fort Wayne in Early July! FORT WAYNE – Tuesday, July 8, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Allen County Public Library Theater, 900 Library Plz, Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDIANAPOLIS PUBLIC SCHOOLS – IPS is taking comments about the recent legislative session, and the creation of the Indianapolis Local Education Alliance by lawmakers. IN DEPT OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT — IDEM is seeking public comment on current environment regulations. This is to implement Braun’s executive order this spring to weaken regulations. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Wednesday, June 11th from 6-7 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Introduction to Social Media for Your Political Campaign. body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123297/550076619/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-06_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThmYWVhMmEtMWI0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hSn3WIhwDgRKSa2MPDsweUFhnwrZWBsjBCSgGMO0R58=)

| Peter, when I see a problem, I don't pass the buck. _I step up, and I get to work._

In 2018, I ran for Congress in part because Donald Trump and my Republican representative attempted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which would've eliminated protections for Virginians with pre-existing conditions and healthcare coverage for hundreds of thousands of Virginians. Now, Glenn Youngkin is blessing Republicans' budget bill that puts Medicaid on the chopping block.

_I couldn't sit on the sidelines then, and I won't today._

Not when my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears is silent on Trump's attack on affordable healthcare. Not when she praises the tariffs that have sent Virginians' costs skyrocketing. And not when she threatens the right of Virginians to marry who they love and decide when they're ready to start a family.

**My promise to you in this campaign is the same promise I've always made: to put Virginians first.**

That's what I'm doing as I travel the Commonwealth and hear from people on these issues. But we all know the best way to tackle problems is not alone — it's as a team.

[_**Peter, I'm asking you to contribute to our campaign today. In a close race, a race that could become the most expensive in Virginia's history, every dollar is appreciated.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123298/550076620/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-06_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThmYWVhMmEtMWI0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hSn3WIhwDgRKSa2MPDsweUFhnwrZWBsjBCSgGMO0R58=)

clean_body: Peter, when I see a problem, I don't pass the buck. I step up, and I get to work. | = | Peter, when I see a problem, I don't pass the buck. I step up, and I get to work. In 2018, I ran for Congress in part because Donald Trump and my Republican representative attempted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which would've eliminated protections for Virginians with pre-existing conditions and healthcare coverage for hundreds of thousands of Virginians. Now, Glenn Youngkin is blessing Republicans' budget bill that puts Medicaid on the chopping block. I couldn't sit on the sidelines then, and I won't today. Not when my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears is silent on Trump's attack on affordable healthcare. Not when she praises the tariffs that have sent Virginians' costs skyrocketing. And not when she threatens the right of Virginians to marry who they love and decide when they're ready to start a family. My promise to you in this campaign is the same promise I've always made: to put Virginians first. That's what I'm doing as I travel the Commonwealth and hear from people on these issues. But we all know the best way to tackle problems is not alone — it's as a team. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Tobias Read
subject: BREAKING: GOP-backed ballot initiative aims to end Oregon’s vote-by-mail system
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250606em-vbm [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250606em-vbm]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
The attacks on our democracy are relentless — and they're closer than ever to succeeding. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250520em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250606em-vbm [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250606em-vbm]
Here’s my promise to you: I will do everything in my power to defend vote-by-mail, make our elections safe and secure, and protect Oregon’s democracy.
But these election deniers are persistent, powerful, and well-funded. And they are willing to spread lies and half-truths to make it harder for Oregonians to cast their ballots.
They won’t give up without a fight.
That’s why I’m asking you personally to join me in defense of Oregon’s elections by contributing to my campaign. We need to stand firm in support of our democracy, or else we risk losing it to the lies and conspiracy theories of the far right. We need a network of candidates around Oregon who will stand up and defend Vote-By-Mail. Can I count on your support when it matters most? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250606em-vbm]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250606em-vbm]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

|
#
Friend, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123704/550077976/1512477418?refcode=em-6.6.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjkyMmI1NjEtMWQ0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dBVHrw_EMQjwzTKtM9-c55aClkyxBLH8mNgV8dZ-VcI=)** , but first let me explain why your support is so important. The Central Valley is often overlooked – but it’s the beating heart of democracy. This is where César Chávez and the UFW organized and won dignity for working people. It’s where families rise before dawn to work the fields that feed the country. And it’s where Democrats _have a 5 point registration advantage_ , but Republicans managed to capture this seat. **We can’t let that stand.** Fighting back against Trump and the billionaire class can’t just happen in safe blue districts. It has to happen in places like this – and it has to be led by the people with the most at stake. This campaign is about those people – and it’s powered by supporters like you. [**If you believe in bold, people-first politics – I hope you’ll chip in $3 today to help us flip CA-22.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123706/550077977/701031030?refcode=em-6.6.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjkyMmI1NjEtMWQ0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dBVHrw_EMQjwzTKtM9-c55aClkyxBLH8mNgV8dZ-VcI=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109123708/550077979/701031030?refcode=em-6.6.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjkyMmI1NjEtMWQ0My1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dBVHrw_EMQjwzTKtM9-c55aClkyxBLH8mNgV8dZ-VcI=)
