Sen. Josh Hawley **[grilled University of Pennsylvania law professor Kate Shaw](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbb69f8-3c25-4ede-99a7-f6b13963fbad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for "hating the president" and providing extremely biased witness testimony about nationwide injunctions during an explosive senate hearing.
**[Watch Hawley call her out in front of the entire country:](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbb69f8-3c25-4ede-99a7-f6b13963fbad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
_" I understand you hate the President!!" _
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbb69f8-3c25-4ede-99a7-f6b13963fbad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbb69f8-3c25-4ede-99a7-f6b13963fbad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hawley pressed Shaw on her sudden support for nationwide injunctions when they are against President Donald Trump's executive actions, after strongly opposing them in the past when they effected President Joe Biden's administration.
"You said, and I quote, 'This injunction is a travesty for principals of democracy, notions of judicial impartiality and the rule of law,'" Hawley threw her own words in her face. **["Ah, so when issued by a republican judge, then it's bad?!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbb69f8-3c25-4ede-99a7-f6b13963fbad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"No senator!" she answered, going on to defend the nuances of her position.
"What's the difference, I understand you hate the president,... what's the principal that divides when a nationwide injunction is okay and when it's not?!!" Hawley exploded.
Watch the heated exchange here:
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bcbb69f8-3c25-4ede-99a7-f6b13963fbad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Ivey League university refuses to punish anti-Israel protesters for verbally attacking jews
Princeton University refused to discipline **[anti-Israel protesters who disrupted a campus event](https://substack.com/redirect/0450a327-4a68-454b-8905-3e1f4f42e0f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** featuring the former Israeli Prime Minister with antisemitic slurs, sparking outrage from Jewish groups and free speech advocates alike.
* **Hate Breaks Out at Princeton:** On April 7, 2025, a speech by former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett at Princeton University was interrupted by about 200 masked Anti-Israel protesters, who shouted expletives and pulled a fire alarm, forcing the event to end early.
* **Antisemitic Slurs Reported** : After the disruption, attendees reported being targeted with antisemitic remarks, including being called "inbred swine" and being told to "go back to Europe."
* **University Response** : Princeton President Christopher L. Eisgruber released a statement that "the University is investigating and will pursue disciplinary measures as appropriate, to the extent any members of the Princeton University community are implicated," but then said it could not identify the perpetrators due to darkness and masks, and therefore would not pursue disciplinary action against them.
* **Criticism and Calls for Action** : Jewish students and advocacy groups criticized the university's response - or lack thereof - urging for stricter policies, including a ban on face coverings at protests, to prevent future incidents.

* * *
# Brandon Gill STUMPS far-Left CEO with her own words: "Are you a racist?!!"
Rep. Brandon Gill turned the tables on the CEO of the National Council of Nonprofits, Diane Yental, during a fiery DOGE Committee hearing, Wednesday.
**["I am utterly dumbfounded!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa6293f-0f25-4014-b65c-89616a6337c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa6293f-0f25-4014-b65c-89616a6337c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa6293f-0f25-4014-b65c-89616a6337c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The hearing is apart the Trump Administration's greater effort to expose and eliminate waste, fraud and abuse in the federal government.
Gill questioned the Democrat witness on whether or not she supported her committee's work, including funding sex-changes for children and other radical agendas. He ask her if she stood by a statement she made regarding denial of racism.
"According to one of your affiliate charities under your nonprofit umbrella, 'denial of racism constitutes covert white supremacy.'" Gill stated, which bolstered his question: **["Are you a racist?"](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa6293f-0f25-4014-b65c-89616a6337c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"I'm here to talk about the essential work that nonprofits do," she said, refusing to answer his question.
Gill pressed a second time, asking Yental if she was a racist to see if she would deny it, but she again refused to answer the simple question.
"I'm giving you the chance to tell the world that you are not a covert white supremacist. Will you do that?!" Gill pushed.
"I'll pass on your chance. Thank you, sir," Yental said.
Frustrated by her lack of response Gill fired back, "That is really astounding. You're a radical, far-left activist and you are masquerading as somebody promoting nonprofit, nonpartisan institutions, and **[you will not even tell this committee that you are not a covert white supremacist." ](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa6293f-0f25-4014-b65c-89616a6337c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch Gill completely trap Yental with her own words:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa6293f-0f25-4014-b65c-89616a6337c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Ivey League university refuses to punish anti-Israel protesters for verbally attacking jews Princeton University refused to discipline featuring the former Israeli Prime Minister with antisemitic slurs, sparking outrage from Jewish groups and free speech advocates alike. Hate Breaks Out at Princeton: On April 7, 2025, a speech by former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett at Princeton University was interrupted by about 200 masked Anti-Israel protesters, who shouted expletives and pulled a fire alarm, forcing the event to end early. Antisemitic Slurs Reported : After the disruption, attendees reported being targeted with antisemitic remarks, including being called "inbred swine" and being told to "go back to Europe." University Response : Princeton President Christopher L. Eisgruber released a statement that "the University is investigating and will pursue disciplinary measures as appropriate, to the extent any members of the Princeton University community are implicated," but then said it could not identify the perpetrators due to darkness and masks, and therefore would not pursue disciplinary action against them. Criticism and Calls for Action : Jewish students and advocacy groups criticized the university's response - or lack thereof - urging for stricter policies, including a ban on face coverings at protests, to prevent future incidents. Brandon Gill STUMPS far-Left CEO with her own words: "Are you a racist?!!" Rep. Brandon Gill turned the tables on the CEO of the National Council of Nonprofits, Diane Yental, during a fiery DOGE Committee hearing, Wednesday. The hearing is apart the Trump Administration's greater effort to expose and eliminate waste, fraud and abuse in the federal government. Gill questioned the Democrat witness on whether or not she supported her committee's work, including funding sex-changes for children and other radical agendas. He ask her if she stood by a statement she made regarding denial of racism. "According to one of your affiliate charities under your nonprofit umbrella, 'denial of racism constitutes covert white supremacy.'" Gill stated, which bolstered his question: "I'm here to talk about the essential work that nonprofits do," she said, refusing to answer his question. Gill pressed a second time, asking Yental if she was a racist to see if she would deny it, but she again refused to answer the simple question. "I'm giving you the chance to tell the world that you are not a covert white supremacist. Will you do that?!" Gill pushed. "I'll pass on your chance. Thank you, sir," Yental said. Frustrated by her lack of response Gill fired back, "That is really astounding. You're a radical, far-left activist and you are masquerading as somebody promoting nonprofit, nonpartisan institutions, and Watch Gill completely trap Yental with her own words: | | POLL Do you think President Trump and Elon Musk will reconcile their differences and work together again in the future? | ? ? ? ? * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. name: Cori Bush
subject: My home.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Hi Peter,
I wanted to personally forward you this note from our team at Politivist.
It’s been three weeks since the devastating tornado tore through St. Louis—my home. The place I was raised. And the place that’s seen far too many challenges, far too much pain.
Our community is still reeling. Entire blocks have been devastated. Thousands of families are facing the terrifying reality of losing their homes and everything along with it. And still— still —our people rise.
In the middle of the wreckage, I’ve seen our people come together, showing up with love, care, and urgency.
That’s what Movement 4 Freedom is all about. It’s about meeting our people where they are, fighting for what they need, and building something better—together.
My team and I are on the ground, and we could use your support. Can we count on you to donate to our tornado fund today so we can continue our relief efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stltornadorelief?refcode=x_250606_followup_act]
With deep love for my city,
Cori
*Politivist Action PAC is proud to support community efforts like those of Politivist Power, a 501(c)(4) organization working on social change. To learn more or support their work, visit Movement4Freedom.com [http://movement4freedom.com/] . Contributions to Politivist Power are not affiliated with Politivist Action PAC and are not political donations.*
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Politivist Action PAC <info@politivistaction.com>
Date: Wed, May 21, 2025 at 6:09 PM
Subject: St. Louis is hurting. We’re on the ground. Join us.
Hi Peter!
We know it’s been a while since you’ve heard from the Cori Bush team here at Politivist. We’ve missed you.
Instead of filling up your inbox, we’ve been doing what we do best: organizing, listening, and standing with our people.
In fact, we just launched Politivist Power , a new 501(c)(4) organization uniting grassroots organizing with political strategy to fight oppression. Our first campaign, Movement 4 Freedom , [https://www.movement4freedom.com/] is a call to radically transform the implementation of justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. And right now, St. Louis needs us more than ever.
On Friday, our city was hit by a catastrophic tornado—the deadliest since 1959. Entire neighborhoods were torn apart. A reported seven lives lost. Dozens injured. And tens of thousands of homes and businesses damaged or without power.
This is a crisis. Still , through the devastation, we’ve seen our community step up.
The Politivist team is on the ground, providing supplies, checking on families, and showing up for those who’ve been left behind.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stltornadorelief?refcode=x_250606_followup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stltornadorelief?refcode=x_250606_followup_act]
This isn’t just about disaster relief—it's about rallying around our neighbors, ensuring no one feels alone, and supporting the kind of leadership rooted in care, compassion, and community. That’s what Politivist Power through Movement 4 Freedom is building and why this work matters.
If you believe in that work, if you believe in us, chip in today. Your contribution fuels everything that we’re doing—right now and in the fights ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stltornadorelief?refcode=x_250606_followup_act]
DONATE TO POLITIVIST POWER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stltornadorelief?refcode=x_250606_followup_act]
If you’d like to give solely to the relief fund, click here to donate directly to community aid efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/action-st-louis?refcode=x_250606_followup_act]
We’ve got a big mission ahead: to elect progressives who lead with love, act with urgency, and fight for every single one of us. And we’re ready to get back to it—with you by our side.
In solidarity,
Politivist Power Inc/Movement 4 Freedom
* Politivist Action PAC is proud to support community efforts like those of Politivist Power, a 501(c)(4) organization working on social change. To learn more or support their work, visit Movement4Freedom.com [http://movement4freedom.com/] . Contributions to Politivist Power are not affiliated with Politivist Action PAC and are not political donations.*
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
If you want to support our efforts, consider chipping in today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250606_followup_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250606_followup_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_email-25q2?refcode=x_250606_followup_act&recurring=1]

Washington, DC 20033
United States

[] We’ve got a big mission ahead: to elect progressives who lead with love, act with urgency, and fight for every single one of us. And we’re ready to get back to it—with you by our side. In solidarity, Politivist Power Inc/Movement 4 Freedom Politivist Action PAC is proud to support community efforts like those of Politivist Power, a 501(c)(4) organization working on social change. To learn more or support their work, visit Movement4Freedom.com [] . Contributions to Politivist Power are not affiliated with Politivist Action PAC and are not political donations. [] Politivist Action PAC is committed to driving social change by electing leaders who stand for peace, justice, and human rights. We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all. If you want to support our efforts, consider chipping in today >> [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC Politivist Action PAC PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: In This Together PAC
subject: Frankly, it shouldn't be this hard to be decent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
We're not letting this slide.
Peter,

We know we sound like a broken record, but it has to be said again:

**Elected leaders should work in the best interest of the people they represent. Not for themselves, not for special interests, and not to appease other members of their party.**

_So why did GOP members of Congress from Kentucky just vote for a bill that would slash SNAP benefits — cutting off food assistance for thousands of Kentucky families?_ Make no mistake: This is beyond cruel...it's downright evil, and it goes against everything we stand for.

This isn’t policy. It’s political theater at the expense of real people; the stated purpose for the cuts is to reduce spending, but the bill adds trillions of dollars to the debt. Congress is increasing our nation’s debt while taking food away from hungry Americans.

In Kentucky, hunger is on the rise, and food banks are struggling to meet demand. But, instead of responding with compassion and support, so-called "leaders" in the GOP are choosing party loyalty over human need and decency. This goes against everything we stand for here at In This Together PAC, _which is why we’re fighting back._

In Kentucky and across the country, we’re working to elect leaders who care — leaders who won’t let kids go to bed hungry just to appease their political base. But we can’t do it without you. [**Chip in $5, or anything you can, to help Andy and the rest of our team hold extremists accountable and elect real, for-the-people leaders at every level. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m about to take the stage
body:
|
#
Hi there, I’m about to take the stage with Sen. Slotkin at the People’s Town Hall here in Lansing – but before we do, I want you to know exactly why we’re here. Last month, House Republicans just forced through their shameful budget bill while most Americans were sleeping. This legislation slashes Medicaid and SNAP – programs that millions of Michiganders rely on to access health care and put food on the table – all to fund tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans. **Now, 300,000 Michiganders could lose their Medicaid coverage. And $900 million will be cut from SNAP benefits for struggling Michigan families – making it even harder for folks to get by.** These are not just numbers – they are lives that will be upended if this radical budget is passed. When we speak up, organize, and stand together, we can stop harmful policies like this and protect the programs our communities depend on. [**Want to help? name: New Dems
subject: Social Security is in crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
We need to fight back now >>

| **When Trump was running for office, he vowed to not touch Social Security.**

**Since elected, Trump’s administration has:**

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce
\- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors
\- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits

**This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security.**

_We need to fight back now_ – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: This is why we must overturn Citizens United
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, by now
you’ve probably seen or heard about the massive fallout between Donald
Trump and Elon Musk...

The two billionaires are brawling over social media, arguing about how
much money to rip away from poor and working-class people in the GOP
spending bill.

In one of his tweets attacking Trump, Musk took credit for getting him
elected and helping Republicans win the Senate — openly admitting the
influence his nearly $300 million worth of campaign contributions had in
the 2024 elections and suggesting Trump would have lost without him. The
richest man in the world was, in fact, the top individual donor to
Republicans last cycle.

Moments like this prove exactly why we need to overturn Citizens United
and get dark money out of our political system: billionaires like Elon
Musk shouldn't be calling the shots and using their wealth to pass
policies that will make themselves richer at the expense of the working
class.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250606?refcode=em20250606-36739&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36739_1203867_q4yreV&akid=36739%2E1203867%2Eq4yreV ]Screenshot of a post on X by Robert Reich (@RBReich), reading: 'Look
beyond Trump and Musk's public blowout to the bigger problem: the
infiltration of Big Money in our politics. It has corrupted our democracy
— creating a vicious cycle that funnels more wealth and power to those at
the top while drowning out the needs of regular Americans.'

The Democratic Party should go all-in on rejecting money from super PACs
and ending Citizens United once and for all, but we know too many are
unwilling to give up the campaign checks from billionaires and corporate
interests.

That’s why we desperately need more progressive, working-class
representation in Congress — people like Summer Lee, Ilhan Omar, and the
rest of the Squad, who all reject corporate PAC money.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250606?refcode=em20250606-36739&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36739_1203867_q4yreV&akid=36739%2E1203867%2Eq4yreV ]Help us achieve that in 2026 by pitching in $5 or more
today: your donation will directly fuel our work to recruit and elect bold
leaders with working-class backgrounds to take on Trump, Musk, and the
billionaire class.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250606?refcode=em20250606-36739&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36739_1203867_q4yreV&akid=36739%2E1203867%2Eq4yreV ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250606-36739-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36739_1203867_q4yreV&akid=36739%2E1203867%2Eq4yreV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36739%2E1203867%2Eq4yreV

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Did you see Joni Ernst’s bizarre and insulting comments?
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109125917/550084361/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ3ZWJhZi0yMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZIVWRZgB9-G7ipUCr8snr84neN155lLRmVbCH-VUQQ=&emci=d1b168de-d742-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d847ebaf-2343-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | How are Senate Republicans approaching the task of taking up the House GOP's budget bill – which would represent the biggest cut to healthcare in American history? **By mocking and belittling people fearful about their livelihoods if Medicaid is slashed.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109125918/550084362/-2044921950?refcode=2025-06-06-je&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d847ebaf-2343-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ3ZWJhZi0yMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZIVWRZgB9-G7ipUCr8snr84neN155lLRmVbCH-VUQQ=)** You might have seen the news last Friday about Iowa Senator Joni Ernst's remarks. **When pressed at a town hall about people dying if Medicaid is cut, she said, "Well, we all are going to die."** Since then, she has doubled down. In what I can only describe as a mock apology – _filmed at a cemetery_ – she bizarrely brought up the tooth fairy and concluded by telling viewers: **"****For those that would like to see eternal and everlasting life, I encourage you to embrace my Lord and savior Jesus Christ.****"** This isn't some isolated gaffe. This is a major Senate Republican defending horrible policies by essentially saying: _if you can't afford health care, we don't care whether you live or die._ Ultimately, **Republicans can't come up with a better defense of their Medicaid cuts.** They realize people are catching on to what they're trying to pull – and they're cracking when confronted by voters. _We need to keep the pressure on and continue turning the tide of public opinion against the GOP budget bill._ It's going to take all of us standing together, and any bit of grassroots support goes a long way. [**So will you please chip in $19 (or more) to help my ongoing efforts to expose the truth about the Republicans' plans to gut health care? We need to move fast – because the next few weeks will be decisive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109125919/550084363/-2044921950?refcode=2025-06-06-je&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d847ebaf-2343-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ3ZWJhZi0yMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZIVWRZgB9-G7ipUCr8snr84neN155lLRmVbCH-VUQQ=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109125920/550084364/-2044921950?refcode=2025-06-06-je&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d847ebaf-2343-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ3ZWJhZi0yMzQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZIVWRZgB9-G7ipUCr8snr84neN155lLRmVbCH-VUQQ=) More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Did We Get It WRONG About Trump?!?
body:
By now, you have probably seen the WILD accusations flung against President Trump from Elon Musk. I want to reassure you that it is TOTAL nonsense.
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11738.1.83636930a8b8adc2c81cdea8084b29d9) |
---
By now, you have probably seen the **WILD accusations** flung against **President Trump** from **Elon Musk**. I want to reassure you that it is **TOTAL nonsense**.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11739.1.fa0b3424cfc33634b22e9d872d9ff5a3)
---
Great things are happening in our country and even across the Globe because of the **Trump Administration** and _the Devil is not happy_.
I want to ask you to pray for **President Trump** and his team.
America is on the _comeback_ and even more importantly, **FAITH is back in America**.
The numbers are _amazing_. Young men are returning to church and there are record Bible sales among first time Bible buyers.
Spiritual warfare is **REAL**.
Let the Church in America rise up and fight back through our most powerful weapon... **PRAYER**.
God Bless America
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
## The Reviews Are In!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11740.1.9d6eb58c4623cb119059c7b914a63cc0)
---
My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11741.1.abd4e44cefa8f7b1f349d0ab225542a6) is out! **I have been blown away by the response!** If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** plus the **downloadable eBook** for tablets and phones as well as **theme song** as a bundled package here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11742.1.f687fb0c0c0493c7307fe8ead5dc2897)_ I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11743.1.bc3c486c5d79aeddc98e34d787f2fa3b) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11744.1.edd640ef4099832313c3ad4636a120ea)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11745.1.63938d9c052104dc7e94b2e7ce8d2f62) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22004523.11746.1.3d7c669f0f320d5380fb70070a936ff7) Thank you,

Can I get your input in our House Republican DOGE Survey

| | | Peter,

There's a reason the Radical Left is up in arms about DOGE.

They can't stand the fact that someone is finally holding the bloated bureaucracy accountable and making the government work for the people of our country once again.

They'd rather spend **YOUR** tax dollars on transgender comic books in Peru, forcing unsuspecting Serbians into feminist sensitivity training, or on a drag rendition of Hamlet in Columbia.

name: John James
subject: This is why I’m such a threat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | [](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=c15b3f60c6c647d18c53a2434e9af8d1&_e=iqQsU-piwIwQ4ETzTdWIkhNwrK_fytLZNlxGIThYGa-KYITn31TZwu30Q_LAcN0o52dMltO1-rITYF4g5yiNY1z_m0fvq6nO9AZgVIoVQdqx0WCPJj72yxM3AfIFm6GJ1o9fRecAPn0Y7OttoP96MMa6VUv0fN17rNu6fMoMo5AqXM6cyVcxgIBEpbp4vZKMQ1nLjO_VhNG90qsJ6BtHigTNznNcLuS0KIogz2mnFbNs-pJ5W8db9RvnYK-BHeOTnY9rOHDBZLejm4ycr2VPqA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Let me be blunt: **_I’m hated by the socialists because I’m a Black conservative, a combat veteran, a Christian, and an unapologetic America First Republican._** That makes me everything the Left fears – and they know if we win this race, it changes the game forever. **That’s why they’ve already labeled me a TOP TARGET.** That’s why Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and Gretchen Whitmer’s donors are flooding Michigan with cash. **That’s why the smear campaigns have started early.** But I didn’t fight in combat just to come home and fold when it gets hard. This was a 10 point loss for Republicans in 2022. Right now, the polling has me tied against the TOP socialist in the race.
---
[ **STAND WITH ME** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=c15b3f60c6c647d18c53a2434e9af8d1&_e=iqQsU-piwIwQ4ETzTdWIkhNwrK_fytLZNlxGIThYGa-KYITn31TZwu30Q_LAcN0o52dMltO1-rITYF4g5yiNY7hoUNuoAY3ZbfClbsthgneGLyWuPASLh3vb_yPQqWfTntuvGSoP6uIgn78M5nAK4aSqMCvyQI1HF2S_CP1FD6VrqlUCSykMSpowRY77UpPQq6Fl9UPCMLScUPzpJx1Rr4J2wxR7xS38pkxTJiP0k7xNSt8lO4gSlnovnhFSY1JR1RLT8SEAuIr3wN_7EiBy2Q%3D%3D)
---
**I’m fighting back and it’s working. If you stand with me, we win.** It’s that simple. **_[That’s why I must ask: Can I count on you?](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=c15b3f60c6c647d18c53a2434e9af8d1&_e=iqQsU-piwIwQ4ETzTdWIkhNwrK_fytLZNlxGIThYGa-KYITn31TZwu30Q_LAcN0o52dMltO1-rITYF4g5yiNY5h3hqfAwxnw6x2JfTxzDSu-svFZhsE-nOM30rZtNWGGBwWQeffPOJoOcOB9bWTC1ZAT9qm3T6JVvs1e6vtc52g-I0_uSpMtNXyAHFAN99ZOTACDsluzcuJy_R3yaEgHEjKoblDNkr4L9r_wet0kAzXvydkzvhavHtmajAz8QG4W8dee2tZSXlJkzGREC6mPMA%3D%3D) _**
---
[ **FIGHT BACK HERE** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=c15b3f60c6c647d18c53a2434e9af8d1&_e=iqQsU-piwIwQ4ETzTdWIkhNwrK_fytLZNlxGIThYGa-KYITn31TZwu30Q_LAcN0o52dMltO1-rITYF4g5yiNY0rjrjeJAsOG-0ODJgTPvE8C4XmiAmNIlwwT2HF-G3vRpufipPdk8nrUmQn65hu8Erf_cIw55HkNHf3KmVOwMjiE5gAmUIwZhL813CI7lqOSeVV6gp0_XKav7DtqfutA5QIqvcJeyA5uggYqioZzQWo8O_MaWDVMje624XFNRlR1PWltBQHAL1WZ5jkk8acAJg%3D%3D)

Sen. Katie Britt questioned Education Secretary Linda McMahon during a Tuesday Senate hearing on how her department will work to expand educational opportunities.

During a Senate Appropriations Labor, Health and Human Services, Education and Related Agencies Subcommittee hearing, Britt asked McMahon what steps her department is taking to improve educational opportunities at historically Black colleges and universities.

Earlier this week, two Chinese nationals were charged with smuggling a toxic fungus into the United States capable of destroying crops and poisoning humans and livestock.

During an appearance on Wednesday's broadcast of Fox Business Network's "Kudlow," Sen. Katie Britt reacted to the report, calling it "COVID 2.0."

Alabama's junior U.S. Senator said the news underscored the threat from the Communist Chinese and credited President Donald Trump's efforts to combat the threat.

In a recent Senate Appropriations Committee hearing, Katie Britt spoke with U.S. Department of Energy Secretary Chris Wright about China’s expanding nuclear capabilities, specifically its growing number of nuclear reactors.

Britt reminded Wright that the Asian country has 28 such facilities currently under construction, which amounts to approximately half the nuclear reactors being built in the world today.

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | Sen. Britt questions Linda McMahon on HBCUs, charter schools, literacy rates Sen. Katie Britt questioned Education Secretary Linda McMahon during a Tuesday Senate hearing on how her department will work to expand educational opportunities. During a Senate Appropriations Labor, Health and Human Services, Education and Related Agencies Subcommittee hearing, Britt asked McMahon what steps her department is taking to improve educational opportunities at historically Black colleges and universities. | | 'COVID 2.0': Britt warns of dangers of CCP after Chinese nationals caught in possession of toxic crop-killing pathogen Earlier this week, two Chinese nationals were charged with smuggling a toxic fungus into the United States capable of destroying crops and poisoning humans and livestock. Alabama's junior U.S. Senator said the news underscored the threat from the Communist Chinese and credited President Donald Trump's efforts to combat the threat. | | Britt presses Energy Secretary on China’s nuclear surge and strength of U.S. response In a recent Senate Appropriations Committee hearing, Katie Britt spoke with U.S. Department of Energy Secretary Chris Wright about China’s expanding nuclear capabilities, specifically its growing number of nuclear reactors. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The dustbin of history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8661%2E5257348%2EYx476M ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, over the
weekend, I attended the California Democratic Party Convention. My first
as a U.S. Senator:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8661%2E5257348%2EYx476M ]Adam speaking on a podium

Here’s what I shared at the convention:

Americans know it is not Republicans in Congress who will save us.

It is you, my fellow Democrats.

It is ordinary Americans, one by one.

It is the student at Fresno City College who will not stand by as their
fellow classmates are divided from their families and deported.

It is the Justice Department lawyer who quits rather than opens an
investigation without evidence.

It is the federal employee who will not be bullied out of their job.

The labor union that stands up to the powerful corporation and fights for
better wages.

It is us, all of us.

We are the party of FDR and JFK, of Pat Brown and the incomparable Nancy
Pelosi.

We do not capitulate. We do not concede.

California does not cower — not now, not ever.

We say to bullies, “You can go F yourself.”

Derek, together,
we are going to stop this President's dangerous agenda.

We're going to fight like hell to win the midterms.

And in 2028, banish Trumpism to the dustbin of history.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250606_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8661%2E5257348%2EYx476M ]Join me in the fight — pitch in to my work to defeat Trump and the MAGA
movement once and for all.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

subject: They have overweight Black women on live TV saying this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
What is going on? | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ee9807c55cc146e8ab3cc0a6c3db4aae&_e=JguKC2e5qvw5SICrY38q4IZZkeHISXKpuK2l5ggCllqqvR20vDsai-nggZz3t7xl7_sxgx8OeiQLHsky0OpE5NZYe6xV2USrkyWP3hky7YNit5quKACQVO7c1fag0Ssye10lgkN6LaN32VFSiy48IdGczlb4FnJt3Je8V5DXJOIbgQzjp8WdkUvpX-isXNnFOKqWtNmDFkprqwa4kUp9veVwmowdYIVtBx5F1u1XQ3_XxSO92pUKyd6ZuCHqxw51l5KBs3m-a2m-aaIWPynqvOTVCP_dbZieaw2JlcreVCequWKfWBjlhWII19wHeXCv2Fynente57Cu8nz5RKtlsg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

_Greatest tell in American politics... The attack on RFK, Jr. The shilling for big pharma and the food industry is unreal. I never thought I’d live to see the day when so many Democrats defended the measurable corruption of both industries. They have 0 integrity!_

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ee9807c55cc146e8ab3cc0a6c3db4aae&_e=JguKC2e5qvw5SICrY38q4IZZkeHISXKpuK2l5ggCllqqvR20vDsai-nggZz3t7xl7_sxgx8OeiQLHsky0OpE5NZYe6xV2USrkyWP3hky7YNit5quKACQVO7c1fag0Ssye10lgkN6LaN32VFSiy48IdGczlb4FnJt3Je8V5DXJOIbgQzjp8WdkUvpX-isXNnFbg7fscmjTSZkeVHeQf4_prOYLwVTf7z9AdCo4PG-KoO5MKk25WVAOh2mFIxxx_MRCLw2dQQCDDHbrCt8VfufhLj_ajz86liJZ1o11caLffF9oJLIZhhwSiYGOuhXCXRdcjMPTwWq7mqyrx-uu6y7rw%3D%3D)
_It’s gotten so bad that they have overweight Black women, on live television, saying processed food being bad is an unfounded conspiracy theory. Every doctor I’ve ever seen tells me to stay away from processed food. What is going on?_

**I’ll tell you what’s going on – the Radical Left and the Industrial Media Complex are conspiring together to push Big Pharma’s Agenda. All because Big Pharma keeps the lights on for these crooks.**

**It’s also part of the reason they work so hard to make me fail.** You may call me a conspiracy theorist for saying that, but I’ve seen it firsthand. I ran for Congress against Ilhan Omar, then I ran against Amy Klobuchar for Senate. In both cases, the Industrial Media Complex, Radical Left, and Neocons all worked together to spread lies and hateful imagery of me.

**They do this because I scare them.** They do this because they know I’m ready to throw a cog in their corrupt wheel. And they think they can just get away with it.

**Now, I’m running for Senate again.** I’m too determined to win for them to be successful once again. But I need your help.

[**Can you chip in $15 before midnight?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ee9807c55cc146e8ab3cc0a6c3db4aae&_e=JguKC2e5qvw5SICrY38q4IZZkeHISXKpuK2l5ggCllqqvR20vDsai-nggZz3t7xl7_sxgx8OeiQLHsky0OpE5NZYe6xV2USrkyWP3hky7YNit5quKACQVO7c1fag0Ssye10lgkN6LaN32VFSiy48IdGczlb4FnJt3Je8V5DXJOIbgQzjp8WdkUvpX-isXNnFFwMuutco6MidiBnlEbySxSEwD8BGKVhJyS-SgJLiGj1036jHRyFnomrB4OmDI-tZ1b-dRXcVA6TSM1KTMDW93-8fF9w0lZhiocxX4xwLhUNT-aSCKK4uG1L2kQOEncmLqwR6OsycXDyXheqAbW6enw%3D%3D)

_**I’m running to be the first Black Senator in Minnesota’s history. But I’m not just a Black man – I’m a free-thinking Republican on a mission to put America first, work with RFK Jr. to defeat Big Pharma, and expose the lies and corruptness from Washington, D.C.**_

| [ **JOIN ROYCE’S TEAM** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ee9807c55cc146e8ab3cc0a6c3db4aae&_e=JguKC2e5qvw5SICrY38q4IZZkeHISXKpuK2l5ggCllqqvR20vDsai-nggZz3t7xl7_sxgx8OeiQLHsky0OpE5NZYe6xV2USrkyWP3hky7YNit5quKACQVO7c1fag0Ssye10lgkN6LaN32VFSiy48IcGcdbsNVQ2HEtMOCEL4AKdlUV7X760sn6Q6jR9jZXU_UhIGiI8IhNesmgMCw8ZMHdFaY28TIf0xvfbRLS7l6uCFYjO7y8iUDcwzqQXnFcNI7hV3opWf5Tbc1m0eAyDCvO_hE7dWpH7Zu-q5X3B8-pW_1HiM4HkTZOKVa2TurJwB6rxi5fVPNyUcY-BSWtNfFw%3D%3D)
---

Thank you,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ee9807c55cc146e8ab3cc0a6c3db4aae&_e=JguKC2e5qvw5SICrY38q4IZZkeHISXKpuK2l5ggCllqqvR20vDsai-nggZz3t7xl7_sxgx8OeiQLHsky0OpE5NZYe6xV2USrkyWP3hky7YNit5quKACQVO7c1fag0Ssye10lgkN6LaN32VFSiy48IdGczlb4FnJt3Je8V5DXJOIbgQzjp8WdkUvpX-isXNnFKV93fWQj7ur6NunWPKF2xgNXP5XLSylSf6GUftW_URrbfWIQ8GKqqYnGurD5RjdBsOZ2olxQKZtThwDt9QTDKOli-U2wOnWbjy-FPbEjSm2xY1kPgVaFH361cWE2PnF2nOIAYyT5u0CF4odHoZYlXA%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ee9807c55cc146e8ab3cc0a6c3db4aae&_e=JguKC2e5qvw5SICrY38q4IZZkeHISXKpuK2l5ggCllqqvR20vDsai-nggZz3t7xl7_sxgx8OeiQLHsky0OpE5NZYe6xV2USrkyWP3hky7YNit5quKACQVO7c1fag0Ssye10lgkN6LaN32VFSiy48IdGczlb4FnJt3Je8V5DXJOIbgQzjp8WdkUvpX-isXNnF9rYFeelc85mT9yE-sZA5wio20adZcHc0EsEdg5dUUvZtXArSKrlVB7bDHkrBNsOdf4LDbq90JgOqbJCOIZxGSiTl4TRexhrSnJPqaZmGH0MeamgtLxCRionJPcHx7w3_dE6j1uBp9I3YVm1pzyvMtg%3D%3D)

They do this because they know I’m ready to throw a cog in their corrupt wheel. And they think they can just get away with it. Now, I’m running for Senate again. I’m too determined to win for them to be successful once again. But I need your help. I’m running to be the first Black Senator in Minnesota’s history. But I’m not just a Black man – I’m a free-thinking Republican on a mission to put America first, work with RFK Jr. to defeat Big Pharma, and expose the lies and corruptness from Washington, D.C. | Thank you, Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

The relationship between Elon Musk and President Trump has taken a turn for the worst. It started with the BBB and has nose dived into a more personal spat online. I hope to see this mended as soon as possible and the two back in each other's good graces. Hakeem Jeffries is leading the way on endangering law enforcement. After ICE Director Todd Lyons explained that ICE agents are getting doxxed online with their pictures and threats to family members, Hakeem Jeffries doubles down and said he wants every single agent identified. James Blair, Deputy White House Chief of Staff is with me today to fully unpack the BBB. President Trump's big, beautiful bill has been getting false reporting and James Blair is here to deliver the truth. Blair says Republicans have the opportunity to pass the single, largest spending cut in American history. Contrary to reports that the BBB will add to the deficit, the White House team's reports show that the BBB will reduce the deficit by $8.6 Trillion in 10 years. James walks us through the bill in its entirety, including enormous welfare reform, tax cuts, historic funding for border security and protecting our military. Blair says this is the most Conservative piece of legislation to ever pass through Congress and the most historic piece of legislation any current lawmaker has worked on. Blair says President Trump is delivering on his promises. The BBB will set our country on a better fiscal footing, which will set Republicans up for success in the 2026 midterm election.
Featuring:
**James Blair**
Assistant to President Trump
Deputy White House Chief of Staff
https://www.whitehouse.gov/

---
Cruel. Racist. Un-American. Trump has brought back the travel ban, Peter. This ban isn’t about U.S. national security; it's about making it damn near impossible for folks who don't look or think like Donald Trump to immigrate freely to America and fulfill the same dreams my parents and so many others did. This ban is about more than xenophobia, it will have real-world effects on our economy and America's position on the world stage. ****_**[We have to put a stop to this racist ban, Peter. As an Iranian-American and the representative of a district where over 60 languages are spoken, this fight is a personal one for me. Bans like these keep loved ones oceans away, sometimes in harm's way, and in no way make our country safer.
In 2017, during the first Trump travel ban, my own grandmother could not see her sister in Iran before she passed away.
I promise to do everything in my power to not just overturn this ban, but turn the page on this dark chapter in our history for good.
Thank you for standing with me,
Yassamin Ansari

name: Dr. Trent Talbot
subject: You know BRAVE Books is the antidote to Pride Month
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kD2P4jAQhn-N0xE5M3GcFC4IyBScTqcrVktpbANmbRLsfAh-_QqWpZ15Zt5Hrwq9d4ebILwlACdnEgEguCQA190c4ngO283i_mcXFtfqb2CPLaxe6ARv-KLVsvWyLKI8p5u6j1993U7FGx9uvX3Dr9DcBuX8Y8rXmRF4MLTMrCh42QCjyJrsJJpCsYZSQy3qqkFd1ZxTiqxEoyzlmDkBFBitaAXAAFm-P2jQUO_RlrpWBSMlfebkKtjotCrSMKsYuy7kuguZF6dh6NNTTBKQc-zyy6i9HdPPme4CAflSJiAnAhJa_Ej_l0dTEZTP0nCNm21Yff7rbBaF6WfnvUsVJyU9_r7JJgHfAQAA__9a6W5T)
|

| |

Friend, I think you agree that we used to be a nation where most everyone loved our national motto, “IN GOD WE TRUST.” After all, Judeo-Christian values guided us to become a great nation – a beacon of God’s goodness. But we have to face the disheartening reality that the agenda pushing harmful ideas like CRT and gender fluidity have led many away from God – maybe even people you know and love. And that’s never more obvious than this month of June when the Left “celebrates” Pride Month.
---
* Men dressed as women swarm libraries for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where they groom small children with books like: “The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish.”
* Retailers break out their rainbow flags and slogans
* And anyone who dares to disagree with them is shouted down and called a “bigot,” or a “transphobe,” or a “fake Christian.”

---
| | Friend, BRAVE Books is the antidote to this radical ideology. Thanks to patriots like you, we’re instilling conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment. And I’ve never been more grateful. Right now, “IN GOD WE TRUST” is weighing heavily on my mind. Because when I look at what we’re facing, I know He is where my strength lies. And I’m writing you today because you deserve to know where things stand. Our launch of our children’s show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” was a smash, our 17-citty church tour with Kirk Cameron reached thousands of families, our beautiful Easter allegory “Saving the Easter Bunny” was loved by families... ...AND we launched our very own family-focused streaming service called BRAVE+ to be a foil for woke Disney+ and Netflix! But – we can’t stop now. If we’re going to turn back the Left and truly stop them from filling our children’s hearts and minds with filth... ... we have to do it NOW while we have momentum on our side. We must keep pushing at 110%. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll support BRAVE Books in the next 24 hours.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM9uqzwQxZ_G7EB4xubPggV8QKTv9naR9kbKCg22aWhxoAYSpU9_RZSbjRfHvzNnzpCdhr67ZSwuGMCp1zMDYJgzgO_j1br10_7a-T8vR-t_R69Wbr_w3wO9wBM-K8qLoRbc1Z_zjX7WrykpLvyJL7fJPOFHaGAs9cOmxqWnM-x0KDyT8VikIEOUqXfKVIItAukURYdxzCMMRUwdJaTTVInO6zMIQYZRGAFIQBm0nQIFSYtGqIS4ZCK85wRkjesV8Xm5knPjaAM1Wm_ITssyzffFagb1bNTqTEBno8dlIxjUraOL8dtx_JoZ1EAdyDYOfS5i5QvS0m9TRB8jrgh4ZATqbRbW62KbeVydMgzLotz5--rAINpka3S_WoZl9fuhKLIT9R9nhuW_Rk1R7ppinx-q5u2Yv7_8_-e1avbVoXl7z_f-9jy8i3H27oskb66Oey7T07Ufhn6OYibCj_sBtrqXDP4GAAD__5vplY8) ** Friend, launching our streaming service has been a massive undertaking. And now we’re rolling right into plans for August’s “See You at the Library Day” and our time is quickly running out. “See You at the Library Day” is when Kirk Cameron and our other BRAVE Books’ authors join parents and children in public libraries across the country for “Story Hours” of our own. In stark contrast to the Left’s “Drag Queen Story Hours,” we pledge allegiance to the flag, pray, and read wholesome books together like Kirk’s BRAVE Book, “Pride Comes Before the Fall.” In “Pride Comes Before the Fall” we teach children that pride is a sin – not something to be celebrated! In the past, other BRAVE Books’ authors like Riley Gaines and Missy Robertson have joined us for “See You at the Library Day” and I’m eager to get the final list together of this year’s authors and share it with you. But what’s keeping me up at night is that the materials, security, advertising, travel fees, and all the rest of the “See You at the Library” expenses are stretching our budget to a breaking point. And we have an ambitious goal to reach a record 100,000 children at this year’s “See You at the Library Day.” [**Friend, that’s why I’m writing to you in all urgency and hoping you’ll help BRAVE Books by rushing back a gift of $35, $50, or even $175 right away.** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM9uqzwQxZ_G7EB4xubPggV8QKTv9naR9kbKCg22aWhxoAYSpU9_RZSbjRfHvzNnzpCdhr67ZSwuGMCp1zMDYJgzgO_j1br10_7a-T8vR-t_R69Wbr_w3wO9wBM-K8qLoRbc1Z_zjX7WrykpLvyJL7fJPOFHaGAs9cOmxqWnM-x0KDyT8VikIEOUqXfKVIItAukURYdxzCMMRUwdJaTTVInO6zMIQYZRGAFIQBm0nQIFSYtGqIS4ZCK85wRkjesV8Xm5knPjaAM1Wm_ITssyzffFagb1bNTqTEBno8dlIxjUraOL8dtx_JoZ1EAdyDYOfS5i5QvS0m9TRB8jrgh4ZATqbRbW62KbeVydMgzLotz5--rAINpka3S_WoZl9fuhKLIT9R9nhuW_Rk1R7ppinx-q5u2Yv7_8_-e1avbVoXl7z_f-9jy8i3H27oskb66Oey7T07Ufhn6OYibCj_sBtrqXDP4GAAD__5vplY8) The deceivers on the Left don’t want your children and grandchildren learning all the beautiful lessons we want to bring to them: That humility is more lovely to God than pride. Or that each and every life is worthy of protection. Or that God created boys and girls. The Left wants to confuse children. They want to turn children against the Godly values that their parents and grandparents are instilling in them. And our work – especially “See You at the Library Day” – is a direct way to counter that. The Left has had decades to use Hollywood and even tax-dollar funded PBS and NPR to indoctrinate children. **[Together, we’re making incredible strides to counter them that some would call miraculous.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM9uqzwQxZ_G7EB4xubPggV8QKTv9naR9kbKCg22aWhxoAYSpU9_RZSbjRfHvzNnzpCdhr67ZSwuGMCp1zMDYJgzgO_j1br10_7a-T8vR-t_R69Wbr_w3wO9wBM-K8qLoRbc1Z_zjX7WrykpLvyJL7fJPOFHaGAs9cOmxqWnM-x0KDyT8VikIEOUqXfKVIItAukURYdxzCMMRUwdJaTTVInO6zMIQYZRGAFIQBm0nQIFSYtGqIS4ZCK85wRkjesV8Xm5knPjaAM1Wm_ITssyzffFagb1bNTqTEBno8dlIxjUraOL8dtx_JoZ1EAdyDYOfS5i5QvS0m9TRB8jrgh4ZATqbRbW62KbeVydMgzLotz5--rAINpka3S_WoZl9fuhKLIT9R9nhuW_Rk1R7ppinx-q5u2Yv7_8_-e1avbVoXl7z_f-9jy8i3H27oskb66Oey7T07Ufhn6OYibCj_sBtrqXDP4GAAD__5vplY8)** American corporations are backing off some of their most radical DEI stances. President Trump is on board as he signs executive order after executive order to protect life and stop transgender ideology. And parents are flocking to our books, children’s television show, and streaming service. But we must play the long game like the Left does. BRAVE Books is in it for good. And I hope you are too. Thank you for your attention, Friend. **Your response is critical as we save the hearts and minds of our children.**
---
Sincerely
---
| | **Dr. Trent Talbot**
Founder, Brave Books
---

name: Ken Mitchell for Virginia
subject: Taking A Stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia**
body:
Families in the 6th District will pay more for health care, lose food aid, and more—all to fund tax breaks for billionaires. Help us stop it.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=e9f7599605&e=0fced71d8c)
| | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=ddca7a68f2&e=0fced71d8c)
| Republicans have unveiled their budget plan—and it’s a disaster for working families in Virginia’s 6th District.
While billionaires and corporations get massive giveaways, everyday Virginians will be stuck paying the price.

### What Their Plan Really Means:
* **$7 trillion** in tax breaks for the wealthy and big corporations
* An average **$314,266 annual tax cut** for the richest 0.1%

To pay for it, Republicans are threatening vital services our neighbors rely on.
---
|
---
|

### 🩺 Health Care
* **40,000 people** in our district who rely on the Affordable Care Act would see their premiums go up by an average of **$810 per year** —a **64% increase**.

* A 60-year-old couple making $85,000 would see premiums jump by **$12,417 per year** —a **172% increase**.

* * *

### 🏥 Medicaid (Cardinal Care in Virginia)
* **188,992 residents** could lose their health care coverageThat includes **88,441 children** and over **16,000 seniors**

* * *

### 🍽️ Food Assistance
* **89,000 people** in the 6th District rely on SNAP to put food on the table

* Republicans want to slash it, making it harder for families to eat

* * *

### 🧒 School Meals
* **451,117 children** across Virginia get free meals through the Community Eligibility Provision

* These meals are at risk under the Republican plan

* * *

### 👩💼 Federal Jobs
* **10,896 federal employees** work in our district

* Republicans want to lay off essential workers to fund handouts for the wealthy

clean_body: We need to hold Republicans accountable immediately BREAKING NEWS: AXIOS: “Senate GOP eyes Medicare cuts with Trump's blessing” = | = Peter– FIRST: At Trump’s behest, House Republicans drafted up his “big, beautiful bill”–a piece of legislation that would make Trump’s 2017 tax breaks to his richest friends become permanent. THEN: Despite protests from the American people and Democrats (remember–Kim fought this bill for 26 hours!) , House Republicans passed their bill, using cuts to vital programs like Medicaid, SNAP and more to fund their massive tax breaks. NOW: Senate Republicans want to take it one step further. Cutting Medicaid and kicking millions of Americans off their insurance wasn’t enough–they want to cut funding from Medicare, too! Programs like Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid are lifelines to millions of Americans. Yet, Republicans don’t care one bit. They would rather see Medicare and Medicaid on the chopping block than upset their wealthy donors. It’s outrageous. It’s despicable. And it’s downright disheartening to see Republicans' true colors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for your immediate support, Team Schrier Rep. Trump -- A Distraction From What Matters](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165378838&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1Mzc4ODM4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDkyNTI5MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1MTg0NDkxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9hdghs_mhovWbV1J8Megha91PO6VvxVBw3nIL-nlWzA)
### Sure, Laugh--But Stay Focused. They're Both Trying to Kill Your Healthcare, Your Human Rights, and Probably You Too
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid) and [The Feed](https://substack.com/@beagoodinfluence)
---
| Jun 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)| | [](https://substack.com/@beagoodinfluence)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/musk-v-trump-a-distraction-from-what?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

If you've been online this week, you noticed the Elon Musk Donald Trump honeymoon is over. Musk called Trump's budget bill a "disgusting abomination." Trump hit back by bragging about gutting the EV mandate. Musk replied by accusing Trump of being in the yet unreleased Epstein files. Trump responded by promising to remove Musk's billions in government contracts. Musk is now openly calling for Trump's impechment.
It's the kind of feud that makes headlines for all the wrong reasons: Donald Trump and Elon Musk, two of the richest, loudest, and most destructive men in America, trading jabs like petulant children. Meanwhile, a looming danger remains that this feud attempts to distract from--a danger we cannot afford to ignore. **Let 's Address This.**
**Support** _**Let 's Address This**_**as a paid subscriber and let 's continue to build this movement for justice together.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..2AR2ZDAXDy8JU3iwJQLBmcjQo4p8gtE59tOhi1WCAfU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165378838)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/97e97a6b-e64e-4179-8319-f056712b8363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Elon Musk and Donald Trump. Credit: Allison Robbert/AFP/Getty Images
## Note the Distraction--Because It Is Working
A new poll shows just how effective this distraction has become. Data For Progress [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/246e3778-909c-4857-aadd-1dea788a3b64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> We asked over 1200 survey respondents for the news story they've heard about the most in the past week Only 44 respondents mentioned the GOP budget bill. Of those, only 14 mentioned cuts to social programs like Medicaid.
Meanwhile, 102 people had heard of Musk leaving the administration. When nearly 7X the number of Americans have heard about Musk leaving, as have heard about the likelihood of millions of people losing their healthcare and their lives, we have a problem.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b1e816e-1000-4edd-b89e-39f82a80c4bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And that's why the Trump-Musk feud is so effective as a distraction. Because it lets both men play-act opposition while continuing to collaborate behind the scenes on a shared project: robbing working Americans of their healthcare, civil rights, economic security, and dignity. Meanwhile, Trump's budget bill isn't just bad--it's murderous. According to a Yale-led study, this bill will strip healthcare from tens of millions of Americans, resulting in [at least 51,000 preventable deaths](https://substack.com/redirect/23acc1c7-087f-4cad-a1f4-242d99c44552?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) per year. The non-partisan [CBO likewise confirms this bill will kick 11 million Americans off their health insurance](https://substack.com/redirect/d1582c44-fe21-462c-bfe2-e1512b78501f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And guess who benefits from those cuts?
That's right. The same billionaires who fund the politicians, control the industries, dodge the taxes, and jack up the drug prices. Musk. Trump. Bezos. The same small circle of powerful men who call it "freedom" when they strip you of your right to survive.
Let me put it more bluntly: This bill, if passed, will kill more Americans annually than any single terrorist attack on American soil in history--by a factor of nearly 20. And instead of sounding the alarm, our media is breathlessly covering a fake feud between two oligarchs who couldn't care less whether you live or die. I'm not saying don't laugh at their expense. By all means, enjoy the memes. Satirize away. There's catharsis in mockery, especially when it's aimed at men who treat our democracy like a board game and working people like disposable playing pieces. But while you're chuckling, do not lose focus.
This bill is not about fiscal responsibility. It's about cruelty. It's about consolidating power in the hands of the ultra-rich--like Trump and Musk--while the rest of us are left gasping for air, drowning in medical debt, or dying for lack of an inhaler. Remember, Musk was as much a part of creating this bill as is Trump. Musk used his hundreds of billions to threaten Republicans to vote exactly as Trump wanted, or else. And Republicans, fickle as they are, capitulated to Musk's threats. Don't fall for his faux opposition now.
### Musk's "Resistance" Is a Lie
Since going "full Trump," Musk's net worth has [increased by over $200 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/2a2860f1-9d31-4cbb-ac3b-dbff4bdafe15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That's not a typo. It's a reminder that even when billionaires "fight," they still come out richer--because the system is designed that way.
Remember when Musk's companies were under multiple federal investigations for labor violations, environmental damage, securities fraud, and discriminatory practices? Well, those investigations have all magically disappeared. To those of us who've practiced law and studied power, it reeks of exactly the kind of backroom dealing that Trump perfected in his first term.
Musk has also performed a Nazi Sieg Heil salute--twice--and has never apologized, retracted, or even acknowledged it. Instead, he doubled down. And when mainstream media outlets looked the other way, he took that as validation. This is the man who now wants you to believe he's standing up to Trump? Forgive me if I don't throw him a parade. In short, I see zero valid reason to believe Musk is sincere in his opposition to Trump. And frankly, even if we could somehow 'know' he is sincere in his opposition, it makes no difference. The damage he's caused is done. This includes [the at least 300,000 who have died globally because Musk gutted USAID](https://substack.com/redirect/d1c6d745-9b7c-40bb-b3a0-4f934e9239f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And this budget bill that he now calls an "abomination" will only advance that carnage. It is truly irrelevant what he _feels_ now--he's destructive actions have already told us who he is.
**If you 're finding value in this analysis, join us as** **a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..2AR2ZDAXDy8JU3iwJQLBmcjQo4p8gtE59tOhi1WCAfU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165378838)
### Billionaires Back Each Other--Always
The bottom line is this. History teaches us that billionaires support billionaires--no matter how much they pretend to bicker. Whether it's Trump's tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, Musk's billions in federal subsidies, or the corporate media's refusal to challenge them, it's all part of the same game: keep the working class distracted, divided, and disempowered.
So yes, laugh at their feud. Make the jokes. Post the memes. But while you're doing all that, [be sure to contact your Senator](https://substack.com/redirect/e6bd19bf-09ba-473f-b8d3-301da2df97b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Tell them to vote no on this bill. Tell them that Americans deserve healthcare. That billionaires don't deserve more tax cuts, rather they deserve tax hikes. That we deserve justice. That we will not be distracted by petty billionaire theatrics while our rights are being stolen in broad daylight.
And if you value this kind of unfiltered, truth-driven analysis--please consider supporting my work. I write to inform, to expose, and to fight back. But I can't do it without your help. [Subscribe, share, and help us keep the spotlight where it belongs](https://substack.com/redirect/b04fa6f9-89f2-46f0-9795-8cb4480bc962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): not on the clowns fighting in the center ring, but on activating every person in this country to continue to fight for our human rights.
Let's stay focused. Let's stop this bill. And let's build a country where healthcare is a human right--not a bargaining chip between billionaires.

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I just got off the stage
disclaimer_text: paid for by national Republicans trying to drown out our message, and ultimately flip this seat
body:
|
#
Hi there, I just got off the stage with Senator Slotkin at the People’s Town Hall here in Lansing, where we were joined by hundreds of people... all fired up for change. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109128012/550091670/846650059?refcode=em-6.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGM3ZjA5MC0yZjQzLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajP_Q1V6UWMrj2buUPGRzXOutW9i6fc3_eC7y1HLGrI=) We heard from teachers, parents, and seniors – folks who are living with the consequences of Trump’s and the GOP’s extreme agenda. They’re tired of the chaos. And they’re tired of leaders who bend the knee to special interests. **This is what democracy looks like. And this is how we win back the House. ** But while I was on stage, Michiganders at home were seeing attack ads run against me on their TVs – bought and paid for by national Republicans trying to drown out our message, and ultimately flip this seat.
